I became a U.S. Senator to deliver lasting results for folks in New Mexico and across the country. But I didn’t always know I’d end up here. Before I share more, **[will you pitch in any amount before my campaign’s mid-month deadline tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71633573/432737440/1329421977?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231015_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQxN2YyMC1iOTZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fsOFmpNFoRoaT2FjKw7oP9u_y0wwAMckfssfwC5TQI=)** _(Or, if you’re not ready to chip in, please keep reading!)_ My parents were a union lineman and an automobile wheel factory worker. I went on to study mechanical engineering in college and have held jobs from working on directed energy to serving as an AmeriCorps fellow and doing nonprofit work. All of those jobs helped me become who I am today. Now, I have a job where I strive to help people live the best lives they can — from working to lower healthcare costs and strengthen our economy, to making sure the air we breathe and the lands we live on are protected for future generations. That’s why your support matters so much. subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71633690/432749874/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjFmMTljYy1iZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtlRgCM_pkEs6ajiGZLIIe3rp-qnSX7mN5ixYclOTWo=&emci=bf3dec41-ab6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ef1f19cc-bd6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hello Peter,

I’m reaching out today to humbly ask for your support for the Democratic Party of Georgia. [**_If you know you’re with us already and you don’t need me to tell you just how important Georgia will be next year, click here to rush a donation to help fund our important work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71633691/432749875/710125701?refcode=20231015.2_KO_10S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjFmMTljYy1iZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtlRgCM_pkEs6ajiGZLIIe3rp-qnSX7mN5ixYclOTWo=)**_

As you probably know, in one year, we will be just 3 weeks away from the 2024 presidential election. As you also probably know, Georgia will be one of just a handful of states that will decide that election.

In 2020, Georgia was the closest state in the country. Joe Biden won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast, and as we look at early polls of the 2024 election, it seems likely that Georgia will be just as close next year.

**All of that is to say that we need to be working every day for the next year to reach out to Georgia voters all across the state.**

Here’s our simple calculus: the more voters we reach over the spring and summer, **_the more likely we will be to win Georgia in November._**

That’s it.

If we get a head start over the GOP, then we can beat them.

In a state as close as Georgia, every second is even more valuable, and that’s why we need your help. [**_We need to start talking with voters as soon as we possibly can, and that takes resources. That takes hiring staffers, opening offices, and getting organizers ready to talk with voters all across the state. So, I’m humbly asking for your help today. Please, pitch in whatever you can afford to help support our work over the next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71633692/432749876/710125701?refcode=20231015.2_KO_10S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjFmMTljYy1iZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtlRgCM_pkEs6ajiGZLIIe3rp-qnSX7mN5ixYclOTWo=)**_

We can really use your help, Peter.

– Kevin

Kevin Olasanoye
Executive Director
Democratic Party of Georgia

body:
| That means instead of running in just two elections, Adam will now be running in FOUR — including against a multimillionaire Republican celebrity.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4240%2E5257348%2EOIkpTX)
Derek,
We already knew that the 2024 Senate Race in California was going to be one of the most consequential races in the country.
Now, the stakes have increased tenfold.
Governor Newsom just scheduled the special election to fill the remainder of Senator Dianne Feinstein’s term — and it corresponds exactly with the 2024 Senate race.
That means instead of running in just two elections, Adam will now be running in FOUR — including against a multimillionaire Republican celebrity.
**For many Californians, this is going to be the first time they’re going to see Adam’s name on the ballot. It’ll take a lot of resources to share his message across the state, so we have to ask:**
**[Will you rush in $5.80 to help Adam reach voters in all of California’s 58 counties? name: Karl Rove
subject: While it’s true the environment favors our party retaking the Senate in 2024, things can change in the blink of an eye.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’ve been in politics nearly my entire life and I can tell you what we have before us is a once in a generation opportunity to not only build Republican majorities in the House and the Senate | Fellow American,

In politics, we can’t take anything for granted. **While it’s true the environment favors our party retaking the Senate in 2024,_things can change in the blink of an eye._**

I remember well the night that Al Gore – having previously conceded the presidency – called to tell Texas Gov. George W. Bush that he was withdrawing his concession and would take the fight over who won Florida to the U.S. Supreme Court.

A more recent example of why elections matter would be the 2021 Georgia Senate runoffs. Had Republicans held onto those seats, America won’t not be in the “transitory” phase of inflation we’re in today. **A Republican majority would have blocked Biden’s $1.9 TRILLION “American Rescue Plan.” that set inflation raging.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8869b4ab3438498da3980700bd1dfcca&_e=2wYefKHLMoyWAwUWqxQAfqwQfxEpxtct1eG-zsk3OjYjuBjVb0OCi6ZftJLHzEAJbWzgG6LbgO0lEqqt2j_1H5iAiRuEO1nkZeb5W_M87KW0XYIOVp5oJ1tui_Ch5FCb5WPaNG2PTeCtWdZ_l93WbeuRDK9WN8MidHxmYqhPdfkD3OqqsBy66P_9PecIjBmmdRoM2CSuz8EqBgArjsq6MAPJQ7ntNaps09zeDb3UQ16MVSIv-ILJyaUjZKzFdsPiHQhFey5_tQh2nTjXfbNfvSK49PaHZwJK4MTez52GdBJWY0meDOY0g4IeBgs7OKro_bzzssJyyrrdifQo3cF1q4IJwuTLuN5s4bmqs14nF38L7nq0m_iIS8pfoNHLItooTZJj2NKVrBqcf1EGPLCQ04EeoQ8J3spmRwmCxvNYLQdwY_fA75NTrnQPOF0DcQi3)

The math before is simple.

**3 -> Number of Senate seats now held by Democrats in Red States.
2 -> Seats we need to FLIP the Senate.
1 -> my ask of you today.**

[**Will you help NOW so we can prepare for victories next November?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8869b4ab3438498da3980700bd1dfcca&_e=2wYefKHLMoyWAwUWqxQAfqwQfxEpxtct1eG-zsk3OjYjuBjVb0OCi6ZftJLHzEAJbWzgG6LbgO0lEqqt2j_1H5iAiRuEO1nkZeb5W_M87KW0XYIOVp5oJ1tui_Ch5FCb5WPaNG2PTeCtWdZ_l93WbeuRDK9WN8MidHxmYqhPdfkD3OqqsBy66P_9PecIjBmmdRoM2CSuz8EqBgArjsq6MAPJQ7ntNaps09zeDb3UQ16MVSIv-ILJyaUjZKzFdsPiHQhFey5_tQh2nTjXfbNfvSK49PaHZwJK4MTez52GdBLDJCTZaygv3eaCqejvEyhG0DzXxgXEv2sIUi91TMRWqeF5L4my6p-dZyi0voNstszIhSBmh_vRsODCceIFhMfFyXMMLVRG05mJuJeB-wplTUyxVGFOXkWOzKJnzjnWEixo3DpJDXqoMBq7I1hN_to7)

Fellow American, I’ve been in politics nearly my entire life and I can tell you what we have before us is a once in a generation opportunity to not only build Republican majorities in the House and the Senate – but to correct, mend, fix, and reverse the mess Democrats have thrust upon our country dating back to Barack Obama’s election in 2008.

[**I’m asking you to donate $10 today to help make sure the GOP has the resources necessary to make the best possible investments in Republican candidates when that moment arrives.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8869b4ab3438498da3980700bd1dfcca&_e=2wYefKHLMoyWAwUWqxQAfqwQfxEpxtct1eG-zsk3OjYjuBjVb0OCi6ZftJLHzEAJbWzgG6LbgO0lEqqt2j_1H5iAiRuEO1nkZeb5W_M87KW0XYIOVp5oJ1tui_Ch5FCb5WPaNG2PTeCtWdZ_l93WbeuRDK9WN8MidHxmYqhPdfkD3OqqsBy66P_9PecIjBmmdRoM2CSuz8EqBgArjsq6MAPJQ7ntNaps09zeDb3UQ16MVSIv-ILJyaUjZKzFdsPiHQhFey5_tQh2nTjXfbNfvSK49PaHZwJK4MTez52GdBLs4a45Xj_UeDBWp21aNTcKJbyebGIE6BHg7_kqMKYIAecnz9qP1MlZuX0A4cwwxpGlp8u0oVVj_9wbkTayKZOecPS0VegWSr66mTT2T6Mqoqv9kZeBs1ToFAZm41qaOqMWJuVpNvUkeinu2JJoOPUi)

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: I don't normally send emails like this, but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s important, and I need you to read every word

| |
---
| | |
Friend, this is Representative Ryan Zinke, former commander at SEAL Team 6.

I don't normally send texts like this, but I need you to read every word of this message.

During my campaign for this crucial House seat, Democrats called in all the favors from their billionaire donors to help my far-left Liberal opponent, Monica Tranel, win.

I barely survived - only thanks to support from grassroots Patriots like you was I able to win my seat & give Republicans a slim Majority in the House.

_**But now, Monica Tranel is running again - and this time, Democrats are going to spend more than ever before. They named my seat one of their top targets to flip. **_

Look, Friend, I'm a battle-hardened Navy SEAL and war veteran - _**so I only ask for help when it 's absolutely necessary.**_

**[But I'll be honest, if I can't stock my war chest with support from America First patriots, I won't stand a chance against the dark money Democrat donors. That's why I'm humbly asking for your help by midnight.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zasbf1enji73fsk15gbq8hb4lahe94ctou9kisig_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5j69or4c5h2bs "But I’ll be honest, if I can’t stock my war chest with support from America First patriots, I won’t stand a chance against the dark money Democrat donors. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help by midnight.")**
---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg533mtf0s8vbbpndoh0nmjkjkanjgemd8tc96rg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5j69or4c5h2bs)
---

Democrats know my seat is the key to holding the House Majority & they'll spend ungodly amounts to crush me.

So believe me when I say this - **the future of America is on the line & what happens today will decide everything.**

I'm proud to say that I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior, and I have more combat experience than any other Member of Congress. However, that's simply not enough to win this race.

**[So are you willing to contribute to my campaign and help me go the distance?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeiqjg59foq06ehl3f3s113fqbb93d1113fmdu1o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5j69or4c5h2bs "So are you willing to contribute to my campaign and help me go the distance?")**

The difference between victory and defeat now lies with you, Friend

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My hero son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ap4cr3ksbp71kfpr44h2ul6t7vjmfq684lpo1g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0gb1dbitu4rs378iupl8tn38r138cctr5liprh0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znkduldii3cj8lc98po0sv80nansqpssc87shok0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0diboc24mj343hjfo736laodr0ht3r9r3jfi1g0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl4nmqldo5dhstartq10ub211bjqfnf3urafs61o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpn48kvui0baoubbjep56ubs45jf012dtnjnscgg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zde0kpdcl2ott33l0jsthr67p2uoc22pdeo3s300_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlint5uk4idvnrsk0oj52r12d58o64tp9bli62c0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbl4eptiuhndr4qlahhrfumrdr1mc5jatauuskd0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5im0ob2cth2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://secure.anedot.com/leldf/cb45dfc11fbcdf58baf18?utm_source=BDG-REN&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20231016_BDG_LELDF_DUNN2_REN_PA-AAN)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! There have been many efforts by the Washington D.C. political establishment to sabotage President Trump, the frontrunner in the 2024 Presidential Election, and his efforts to take back the White House. These attacks have come in many forms. For one, the Republican Presidential Primary field is stacked with anti-Trump Republicans who have no true platform themselves, aside from spending their time disparaging the leading candidate for President while polling in the single digits.
The most notable of these failed candidates if Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. DeSantis is currently polling at just 9% in the Republican Primary nationally, and is struggling to compete with no-name candidates like Vivek Ramaswamy in several key states. Nikki Haley, commonly referred to as 'George Bush in heels', also represents a threat to DeSantis.
When it comes down to it, none of these candidates, as evident by their dismal polling numbers, stands any chance to defeat President Trump in any one State, much less the entire Primary. The Establishment Republican tactic of stacking the unnecessary 2024 Republican Primaries with anti-Trump candidates has failed. Seeing no way out, it appears that the establishment is changing the direction of their support. High-level Republican donors are no abandoning Nikki Haley, Ron DeSantis, and Chris Christie for a person who has yet to declare his 2024 candidacy. That man is Republican Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JaFlUoozD5be-tyikKAGs6gr6orJxkzPo2ftxGhLFWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138003488)
I am told by several sources that Youngkin is planning to launch a 2024 run for President in the coming months. Youngkin is set to hold a multi-day retreat fundraiser under his Political Action Committee called 'Spirit of Virginia' on October 17th and 18th at the Historic Cavalier Hotel in Virginia Beach, Virginia. The fundraiser is being held just weeks before Virginia will hold their State elections. Youngkin is hoping to flip the State Senate from Republican to Democrat as a means to promote himself to the National political stage, much like the tactics deployed by Ron DeSantis before he launched his failed Presidential campaign.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/acd4eb28-a00f-45e7-8902-d20e748944ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A quick search on the Virginia campaign finance database reveals that tactics are not the only thing that Governor Youngkin and Governor DeSantis have in common. They also share many of the same donors. In fact, some of the largest donors to DeSantis's Presidential campaign have now crossed over, and are dumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into Republican Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin's 'Spirit of Virginia' PAC.
Upon examination, even the donors who claimed to be supporting Ron DeSantis in the 2024 Election were not only donating to DeSantis, but many of them have also donated to other anti-Trump Republicans currently running for President. This is evidence that these high-level GOP donors are not funding candidates based on policy, or the chance that they might win, but simply funding whoever it takes to stop President Trump from securing the nomination. These donors have absolutely no loyalty to any of the candidates that they are pouring money into. Their hatred for President Trump is greater than their love for their country.
One of these mega donors is Jeffery Yass, a Pennsylvania resident who has an estimated net worth of over $28.5 Billion. His donation history highlights this trend of frantic establishment GOP donors better than almost anyone. Yass Is the wealthiest man in all of Pennsylvania. On June 30th, 2023, Yass donated an astounding $250,000 to a Political Action Committee called 'Tell It Like It Is PAC'. That PAC is associated with current candidate for President, former New Jersey Governor Chris Christie.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ee9e4bd9-8582-447e-af7d-4777b843eee7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yass has also recently donated $2,000,000 to Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin. The Virginia Campaign Finance database shows a $2 million donation from Yass to 'Spirit of Virginia' on October 3rd, 2023, just four months after Yass had dumped a quarter of a million dollars into failed candidate Chris Christie.
When Ron DeSantis launched his campaign for President, he did so after pressuring the Florida Legislator to pass a law which would allow him to transfer his State campaign account donations to his federal campaign account. He was successful in this effort, giving DeSantis an initially inflated cash on hand figure. Of course, DeSantis is broke now, with less than $5 Million in cash before the Primary has even really started. However, much of the cash that DeSantis transferred from his State account "Friends of Ron DeSantis" came from [Jeffery Yass, who dumped a reported $2.5 Million into DeSantis's 2022 Florida Gubernatorial re-electionvcampaign.](https://substack.com/redirect/f3100e11-1a88-4ced-aea2-282f91b06c12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/85a73a86-5785-42fb-badc-9a96ce39687a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yass is a singular representative of a broader movement within the swanky GOP donor class to sabotage the 2024 campaign of President Trump.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JaFlUoozD5be-tyikKAGs6gr6orJxkzPo2ftxGhLFWY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138003488)
Another donor who exemplifies this behavior is Richard Gilliam, founder of Cumberland Resources, a Virginia-based coal mining operation. In the 2024 cycle alone, Gilliam has donated to Nikki Haley, Chris Christie, and Vivek Ramaswamy. Gilliam has recently donated $60,000 to Glenn Youngkin's 'Spirit of Virginia' PAC. These donations once again display a pattern of behavior by a GOP donor class that is eager to interfere in the 2024 Republican Primary. Despite overwhelming support from the Republican voter base, the donor class simply cannot accept that Trump will be their nominee in 2024. Desperate, these donors are now spending millions on any candidate that can level any damage to President Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7552b51d-8566-45a4-9cf5-fc7460a8a1a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b597ba5-41ca-4974-9ffa-56156b946496?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad8e509a-b106-472c-bd73-742843a738e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dff5e02e-09cf-4714-ba73-4cb34d9aadcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Another establishment donor currently dumping millions of dollars into Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin is Thomas Peterffy, the CEO of Interactive Brokers, who has an estimated net worth of over $27.2 Billion. Peterffy is reportedly richest man in Florida. In 2023 alone, Peterffy has given Youngkin an astounding $3 million through his 'Spirit of Virginia PAC'. The sum came through three separate donations of $1,000,000. See those donations below...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e6be266b-d7d8-4f51-9f36-2b53b7fd62c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Peterffy made these donations after telling Rupert Murdoch's Fox News in July that he'd like to see Youngkin join the 2024 GOP primary as a late entrant in the 2024 presidential race and called him an "ideal candidate for the Republican Party." Thomas Peterffy is the richest man in Florida. He [was planning to support Ron DeSantis's](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e67ff8-c677-4bb3-b8e0-83b3e0755136?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Presidential, but then in April of 2023 he said
> "I have put myself on hold. Because of his stance on abortion and book banning ... myself, and a bunch of friends, are holding our powder dry."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/af463733-a530-4930-9495-641be39113c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
An examination of Peterffy's federal campaign finance data shows that he has dumped an exuberant amount of money into coffers controlled by Republican RINO Senate Leader Mitch McConnell, and Former Republican House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. On February 23rd, 2023, Peterffy donated $289,100 to the National Republican Congressional Committee, formerly controlled by Kevin McCarthy. On the same day, Peterffy gave 'Protect The House 2024', a joint fundraising committee also formerly controlled by Kevin McCarthy an enormous donation of $703,700.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/329d4052-8b73-43a1-a8f5-af7f0279cba3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8d5867-eebc-4374-8d3b-24ea0cb36da4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This appears to be a reoccurring trend, as Jeffery Yass has also donated a considerable amount of money to the NRCC in 2023. Yass has donated $25,800 since the beginning of this year.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e43331fe-9235-43d8-b245-bfc9ab6c8b65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Another donor mention above, Richard Gilliam, has also donated thousands of dollars to the NRCC in 2023. His total for the year is $77,800. Gilliam has also given $500,000 to Mitch McConnell's Senate Leadership fund since the beginning of 2022.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07a40c96-0894-48e7-b8e7-380fda49422a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e10a8428-8c66-489f-a982-2b2af05248b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You don't have to look very far into the candidates who are challenging, or planning on challenging Donald Trump in the 2024 Republican Presidential Primary to see that there is not a lot of legitimate support. What we see is a vicious donor class that is desperately throwing their money at anybody they can think of who might be willing to do the establishment's bidding, and attempt to stop Trump from ever serving in White House again.
The establishment GOP donor class is eager to start condensing the field in an effort to consolidate their anti-Trump candidates into the most effective force against President Trump. This was evident by a recent mega-donor summit that was hosted by the American Opportunity Alliance and infamous anti-Trump billionaire hedge fund manager Paul Singer. The event, which was held in Dallas, Texas on October 13th, 2023, was coordinated by Singer, along with fellow GOP mega donors Ken Griffin and Harlan Crow. The event was used to pitch the idea of Nikki Haley and Ron DeSantis running together as the most viable ticket to beat President Trump in 2024.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/264e3115-4f80-48f3-8a1c-2292fe2d5d46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Even Former Republican National Committee finance chairman Steve Wynn donated $250,000 to Youngkin's "Spirit of Virginia" PAC on October 11th, 2023.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/53ed32e3-2067-404f-bfa7-38bf60a846a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Why did Steve Wynn, a previous supporter of President Trump and member of President Trump's Mar a Lago club donate a quarter of a million dollars to Glenn Youngkin's PAC on October 11, 2023?
It should be evident to everyone following a review of the evidence presented above that the establishment GOP donor class is working overtime to draft Glenn Youngkin to run for President in 2024 as another anti-Trump option on the GOP ticket.
It's not a matter of *if* Glenn Youngkin is going to run for President. But, rather it's a matter of when his donors will decide it's time for him to officially file to run against Donald Trump.
What the donor class simply cannot understand, or what they refuse to accept, is that President Trump is the most popular political figure in the history of the Republican Party. That is the truth that keeps the donor class up at night, and keeps them writing checks to every Republican who announces his or her candidacy for President. It is no small fact that these donors also share ties to members of Republican leadership in the House and Senate, who have sat on their hands as President Trump has been persecuted from every angle by a weaponized government.
These donors do not believe in the candidates they are funding. If they did, they would donate to a singular Presidential candidate, as opposed to making donations to multiple candidates. What we instead find is that the mega donors who are funding Nikki Haley, Chris Christie, Ron DeSantis, and now Glenn Youngkin are the same exact people with the same exact goal. And that goal is to stop President Trump at any financial cost, and to defy the will of the American people.

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d362440844d46d0cd2d45d8836eaa060d63006a7e29d0732f324fb12d36fb38b7fad69f4bfb76bdb64ea0c67038ae0118f17a000f797383941c3eec8413acea0bd05631972962f1bf81a3f4e33914065

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a0695647181780d55301715fbd47d960e16349ebe9a350832cd5acaf0d4ce07e81d001c49fcb1661e2380dea4ecf7b7b7be9723862cb21b69311e6cf882f

Friend,

We have some very exciting news! This week, we are launching the Team DeSantis Veterans coalition!

If you've served our country and are a veteran, we'd love for you to join shoulder-to-shoulder the only veteran in this race, Ron DeSantis, to preserve the values that make America exceptional.

Our goal is to make sure that every veteran in every state across our great country knows that there’s only one veteran in the race, Governor Ron DeSantis, and we need your help to make it happen.

Our political team has done a fantastic job reaching out to veterans across the nation, but right now we are 236 veterans short of our goal.

Friend - if you've served or know someone who has served, can we count on you to help us hit our goal?
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a069564718172989e306408cad061ec9bcce37b0957f06b058fe87f8e42ee1c5214bd87ca7a06c75098926ad5cdda3b5cbc4261b875fa526e84ca2ab2b56
Sign up at the link below!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a0695647181780d55301715fbd47d960e16349ebe9a350832cd5acaf0d4ce07e81d001c49fcb1661e2380dea4ecf7b7b7be9723862cb21b69311e6cf882f
SIGN UP HERE

After you sign up, a member of our political team will follow up with you shortly with the next steps. With your help, we will have the largest movement of veterans this nation has ever seen.

We couldn't be more excited to have you on our team!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a069564718174637b945b60d8c7f3516f1f51b2e19273a1d1f70316825453b18cf5177f249a2d4764d2e9cecbe9ce0b23a0c73709e7ab909f5d5c86332da

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a069564718178708fbad699a6061245a256e92181a1c62811d3d75729e07c4342be079a91f8a26340b563eb1e5e8d98f7b2c6b39162f0b23e85811e347c8
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a0695647181734d8ff0f91d08f31ee7ffb84bf0a3931c404ae1cb57e8685b66563caac1bf8a0a2694db669505e61bcc00dc58c125486549395e68f839708
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a0695647181780d55301715fbd47d960e16349ebe9a350832cd5acaf0d4ce07e81d001c49fcb1661e2380dea4ecf7b7b7be9723862cb21b69311e6cf882f

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=34e7a0695647181780d55301715fbd47d960e16349ebe9a350832cd5acaf0d4ce07e81d001c49fcb1661e2380dea4ecf7b7b7be9723862cb21b69311e6cf882f

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: A Weak U.S. President Leads to Death and Chaos Around the World!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Crisis in Israel!
| | | |
---
A Weak U.S. President Leads to Death and Chaos Around the World By Colonel Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
There is a reason that U.S. Presidents are referred to as "The Leader of the Free World" because they are. A strong President can lead the world to peace and prosperity. A weak President, like Joe Biden, leads the world to death and chaos. Just look at what has happened in less than three years since Biden took office:

* A disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan killed 24 Americans and left billions of dollars of modern weapons in the hands of terrorists.

* With no fear of a strong American response, Russia invaded Ukraine. Thousands have already died as the ground war continues with no end in sight.

* A renewed Axis of Evil is forming with Russia, China, Iran, North Korea, and terrorist organizations.

* Biden's open border policies have created chaos and havoc at our southern border, attracting international terrorists from across the globe. What mayhem are they planning?

And now, Israel.
Hundreds of terrorists crossed the border of Israel to indiscriminately kill people and take hostages. Less than a month after Biden paid a ransom for American hostages, we now have more Americans held hostage.
It appears that our National Intelligence Community was asleep at the switch. Just a few days before Hamas launched their killing spree, National Security Advisor Jake Sullivan bragged that our National Security team is spending less time in the Middle East. Our Military leadership, too occupied with woke ideologies, has lost focus on protecting America.
Hamas is solely responsible for their brutal acts of terror. Israel has an absolute right to defend itself and its borders. So does the United States.
Palestinian children living in Gaza are innocent. Their parents should replace Hamas with a government that cares for them and offers freedom and prosperity. This will require courage and action, much like the American Revolution, when men and women fought to replace a repressive monarch with a government by the people and for the people.
We have got to end this dive into death and chaos. The 2024 election allows us to reverse course. We must replace the failed government of Biden with strong leaders who take firm and principled action. Dina Titus has been "ridin with Biden" for too long. She needs to go! America has always been a land of hope. For many, that hope is dimming. We can change the direction of our nation and replace chaos and despair with peace, hope, and prosperity.
*****
Editor's Note: Many politicians will say anything to get votes. Almost all will say that they support our Military and Veterans. Colonel Mark Robertson is the only ACTUAL VETERAN in Nevada's First Congressional District race. Mark served 30 years in the Army, including Afghanistan, Iraq, and Kuwait combat zones. When Islamic extremists attacked America, Colonel Robertson answered the call of duty!
Now that Islamic extremists have attacked Israel, we need Colonel Robertson's experience in Washington. He is once again ready to answer the call of duty.
Please share this post so others can get to know Colonel Mark Robertson.
[www.RobertsonForCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r005lSTmfjFheffybwca9YdM6qto5Jxe5gSVyNdxsnTWnLZGZklpqGMKE8Br9IUKONLhU2dADjohWLD0-G6_pdmUmDlll9PF4cOlGIZQrr8lJAQD2lznj9xpL_ralSETUvq3-VH_P3vidIZsoRe4HOahnqe26mnZ&c=tPD6CvdJ4xooEsshnjqCXtEcwZB93tdnIIEHjj78QnW6KU33v4eaEQ==&ch=_psS8LGvHFs8FOcTJDDsDWA0-IgSn35psOt1rD9cf9dQXNroSf3vGw==)

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8f9bc20960900f8045f715ca8a7fbfdda48eabadf3902b1f58fd4a021cd024026fe4db43e7de23276d5e9e511e2aa93b3f0837b3f4e453f8a8bb7d93ca7f1005843e87ac0abacad9128d5fa2671227b9

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d1dc83cd6d17a17380ff5aced1e651dffd550878a8d8d2e9fdd484becf6f79480a4907ba98e559b05f010993d55342877f6eeb9c20a34d27227d2065a917587b

Friend,

What we're seeing is gut-wrenching. Americans are stranded in Israel as war ensues, and we DO NOT believe Joe Biden is responding strongly enough. Joe Biden's record in the Middle East is littered with mistakes, and we've got his report card below for your review.

DO YOU AGREE?
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d1dc83cd6d17a17380ff5aced1e651dffd550878a8d8d2e9fdd484becf6f79480a4907ba98e559b05f010993d55342877f6eeb9c20a34d27227d2065a917587b
RESPOND TODAY.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

--------Forwarded Message--------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d1dc83cd6d17a17380ff5aced1e651dffd550878a8d8d2e9fdd484becf6f79480a4907ba98e559b05f010993d55342877f6eeb9c20a34d27227d2065a917587b
Team DeSantis

Subject: Does Biden negotiate with terrorists?
Friend,
The level of barbarity unfolding in Israel is inexcusable and deeply saddening.

Since his earliest days of serving our military in Iraq to supporting bills in Congress, to now standing with Israel as both Governor of Florida and as candidate for President, Governor Ron DeSantis has been unapologetically outspoken about the blood on Iran's hands and his refusal to support a government that funds terrorism.

MEANWHILE, Joe Biden has a track record that aligns more with negotiating with terrorists than defending America's interests.

Joe Biden's Middle East Track Record:

-
On Day One as President, Biden restarted U.S. taxpayer-funded payments to the Palestinians despite knowing the money would fund Hamas terrorists.
-
In September, Biden gave $6 billion to Iran, which supports Hamas and helped plan the terrorist group's attack, as part of a hostage exchange.

-
Biden oversaw and conducted the embarrassing and deadly withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan.

-
As our fallen troops arrived home from Afghanistan in caskets, Biden repeatedly looked at his watch, and the families of the fallen noticed.

-
Biden accidentally droned 10 Afghan civilians in the wake of the U.S. withdrawal.

-
Biden opposed the strike that took out Iran’s top general, Qasem Soleimani.

-
Biden opposed the raid to take out Osama bin Laden.

We are looking for your input, friend. Do you believe Joe Biden has acted strong enough in response to Iran?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d1dc83cd6d17a17380ff5aced1e651dffd550878a8d8d2e9fdd484becf6f79480a4907ba98e559b05f010993d55342877f6eeb9c20a34d27227d2065a917587b

Ron DeSantis will crack down on Iran, end our dependence on their foreign oil, and stop our flow of money into their terrorist-backing hands immediately. There will be no justification for the murder of innocent Israeli citizens under a DeSantis presidency.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d1dc83cd6d17a17380ff5aced1e651dffd550878a8d8d2e9fdd484becf6f79480a4907ba98e559b05f010993d55342877f6eeb9c20a34d27227d2065a917587b
Respond today to let us know if you think Joe Biden has acted strongly enough against Iran.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d1dc83cd6d17a17380ff5aced1e651dffd550878a8d8d2e9fdd484becf6f79480a4907ba98e559b05f010993d55342877f6eeb9c20a34d27227d2065a917587b
Respond to the Biden-Iran Survey

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Friend, The level of barbarity unfolding in Israel is inexcusable and deeply saddening. Since his earliest days of serving our military in Iraq to supporting bills in Congress, to now standing with Israel as both Governor of Florida and as candidate for President, Governor Ron DeSantis has been unapologetically outspoken about the blood on Iran's hands and his refusal to support a government that funds terrorism. MEANWHILE, Joe Biden has a track record that aligns more with negotiating with terrorists than defending America's interests. Joe Biden's Middle East Track Record: - On Day One as President, Biden restarted U.S. taxpayer-funded payments to the Palestinians despite knowing the money would fund Hamas terrorists. - In September, Biden gave $6 billion to Iran, which supports Hamas and helped plan the terrorist group's attack, as part of a hostage exchange. - Biden oversaw and conducted the embarrassing and deadly withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan. - As our fallen troops arrived home from Afghanistan in caskets, Biden repeatedly looked at his watch, and the families of the fallen noticed. - Biden accidentally droned 10 Afghan civilians in the wake of the U.S. withdrawal. - Biden opposed the strike that took out Iran’s top general, Qasem Soleimani. - Biden opposed the raid to take out Osama bin Laden. We are looking for your input, friend. Do you believe Joe Biden has acted strong enough in response to Iran? # MONDAY, OCTOBER 16, 2023

**Good morning!** On this day in 1962, the Cuban missile crisis began when President John Kennedy was shown secret surveillance photos indicating Soviet nuclear missiles just 90 miles from Florida. [Here's one of the key photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GOrCAUgOGngU4DBwQtKG5jN7fd0iAch7NBMcKOmbff7Nbb__mT7-OxPDxlOp7__Y6ubWXxodELFyk6aTpQi-bRbYiAiqOTZrLaSAGaJxfGEUcLYOLqMUgFQazjgCasFmMQyMmBACWFNGIaBjn1Sq92VNoYZQDthkwLjNTK1X8WOlrCLb_LC68-lJ1nl1o7K1P_GMwM5vu--3K0RDX690_BYD5TaaUymMPX6o9up1opYxcuqlT55eJ5U85UjWVaPHdP-Xfd_pZ-BwAA__8DpFX1). |
---
## **Iran Threatens Wider War in Mideast **
Iran's foreign minister warned that the coming Israeli offensive in Gaza [would force Iran to intervene](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1utDAQAJ8GOiP_nQ2Fi6-57r42JTJ4DRsZ78l2IMnTR5c67Uwx0rw95ofHhHn77w9wLdLs14YnzIIzYZhUs-6DiwASVA9OmMlqI7jU_e4UcBMnq8IY_Qp21evIJ1iUWbgX4wI9OsmlElwYPt1uYhqUXuyotDHKSLAROs0hYKMyvBPmtkNMX3RCGVY6-uT21p61U_86ee_k_bquIdJnhqu-_ItQSaGTdyw-s7YX8A1yZViLh8QS0YF5Y1uhjxwYxQi54gls89-eFXhSaX1x4XlhSliN7TTfDo_pt97-nvETAAD___bdY2M), widening the war to other areas of the Mideast, including Lebanon, where Hezbollah has a significant military presence. Top U.S. officials also warned that the war could widen as [two American aircraft carrier groups](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vgzAUAH-N2Yz8hYHBQxe2dO2IHvYjeZXBkW2C8u8rOnXoerec7us234Ai7fdP2NDVNc3gK71wloJLy5WeTRPciqhQN-ikHXtjpVCmeTgQoxyMsUNn-iC07BapFpCL8OOwyBEackooLYW0Yuw6ObbaLP2gjbXaKuxXZEZgoJpy-51orw9c4zu9MLc-bU10j1qfhekPpiampvM824xHxVwuf5GUY2Bq2iiEiByhVKYmn_Y1kq_8D-Y-HTFwLB4iVORH4TtUSjtEXtAfmeqbQ3hRwcxPyHvhVzq_LnRMTU124XlSjFRsz4y4b0Dxt7L-P-0nAAD__-QTbjY) headed to the east Mediterranean to deter Iran and Hezbollah. The U.S. halted the release of $6 billion in frozen Iranian assets it had promised to return as part of a prisoner swap. The State Department on Saturday updated the American death toll to [29 citizens killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9ytCAUBfCnwe46_BM-C4qvsdu0KR1cLutNUBxg10mePmPqtOc0v3Peb_PNU6L98eY3dC3m2d8bvXAWHIQBqWbdBRcRJaoOnTCj1UZwqbvVLSKGZeHRW-vVYLlFFDJGLfgixlFjR05yqQQXho_DIMZe6cX-U9oYZSTaiExzDNRy6T8y7W3FmL7yC0t_z1uX3NraUZn6z-TE5HSeZ1_w2bDUq7-SXFJgcnpWqM03hIBHA3_6giBHuFOjb9wrBPQBxAAb1Ur7A-qRP7EeWGre4SLCtVYzOXXFheOklKgayzR_bJ7Sr6b9fc5PAAAA__9FBWVk) in Hamas attacks and at least 15 Americans still missing. The government said it was "working around the clock" to find them.
## Study Ranks Best Careers for Two-Year Degrees
A new analysis from PayScale ranks the [top-paying careers available with a two-year associate's degree](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuxCAQBb8Gd1iwcDguKNK4u7QpLYwXsxGGE6Cz8vfRRSnTPelNMZrP-3p3lCgfH-5E20NZne_0xFUKLg0HtephtwERUA1opZknbaQAPUSrtPPOCzOZWSonIfiAwU9GgVdbkHIgCwKUFNKI-XaT86j0Nr0pbYwygFNApgXu1EsdvwrlHjGk7_LEOvpyDsnG3h-NqXcGC4Pluq7Rby3j1V4_g-U1GSy-pIQHctda8eQ68h2Pith4pCNi5ZR9OZH36DLfnI-YSm1_EO_lwdHVTPlgsAzV7o-LUqJmJqbFcTpKvzr9_zo_AQAA__9f42h-), with some leading to six-figure salaries. The top-earning majors requiring only a two-year degree include radiation therapy and software engineering, and they tend to lean toward technology, information, and engineering fields. The ranking is based on earnings in mid-career, after ten years in the field, while also showing early-career incomes for dozens of careers. You can see the [full list here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQQOGnMZ2R_3YMhYvb0O1tU6JZMwZvzBrZziLePkrq9Ec60vdxn-8YU3yt_3En10Ke0bf4plkKLoErPZtucYFIke7ISRitASmU6TY3kpcPSwqGYRQWEBYYpAkCgqTgve-iU0JpKSSI8XaTY6_Nww7aAGhQZAMxI2iJLZf-meOrbRTSld9Uep_3LrmttaMy_Y-pianpPM_-wKt6TPQTMDX5nBKtxCsmLBcvdOTSmJp2fOZSeduw8QMvfuUv_kD_ydSEtWYfsVFX3HKcMaVYwTIj1h1j-h23vx2-AwAA__97BmBT)
## "Three's Company's" Suzanne Somers Dies
Actress and fitness icon [Suzanne Somers died Sunday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngQ3r8mOIB4Yu3tK1o0XCJaHCEMFt3Pbpq3bufIaj7-28nUMuud5ew46eUtvClfITNwlCWqH0Znj0CVGh5uilXZyxEpThdw_aOAl2hkVGddFLmENIMJ8wOX1KYHj2CpSWIC0s8yyXSZuLO2ljrbYKXUJmAGOm1qf3livdMZWv9sQ-XdvOi78TPQbTL0ytTK3HcUypfVY8xm9nasVK2CnkumMlptZwpY5jiPHxHWpFMdqOfYiIIQpneffxceRS8rCOGbjtIZe_E_0P_wkAAP__RV5aEg) from breast cancer, a disease she had fought for many years. She would have been 77 today. Somer is best known for her early [roles on TV's "Three's Company" and "Step by Step,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GNiK4g8MMDF2ypWtHi5pzTIWNZdNU7ddX6dztSU960nu7jbdUatnur2nl2Oc2pqmXB49GK0MKcLQyx5kZGCVHQ8FbMhqsXCKGJw02e2cSknOc9cApTJQCemtkiaABjTakg3MmXNC--wEtERKwn1lYzbn0dlw-Wtn6wnP9bg8-LlNbZY1L7_sp8EXAVcB157ZXfioB1_PzJ20bq7OtfJwqc8oqdeVJDegGAC-PmPevUms5yQur72sq9a_b_9_8DQAA__9taFE9)" but later in life she wrote more than 25 books and built a health and fitness business around the Thighmaster exercise equipment. Her family had planned to gather for her birthday today. Friend, this is Representative Ryan Zinke, former commander at SEAL Team 6.

I don't normally send texts like this, but I need you to read every word of this message.

During my campaign for this crucial House seat, Democrats called in all the favors from their billionaire donors to help my far-left Liberal opponent, Monica Tranel, win.

I barely survived - only thanks to support from grassroots Patriots like you was I able to win my seat & give Republicans a slim Majority in the House.

_**But now, Monica Tranel is running again - and this time, Democrats are going to spend more than ever before. They named my seat one of their top targets to flip. **_

Look, Friend, I'm a battle-hardened Navy SEAL and war veteran - _**so I only ask for help when it 's absolutely necessary.**_

**[But I'll be honest, if I can't stock my war chest with support from America First patriots, I won't stand a chance against the dark money Democrat donors. But now, Monica Tranel is running again - and this time, Democrats are going to spend more than ever before. They named my seat one of their top targets to flip. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)| |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country.[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
__But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

| | | | | I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter: President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!! I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [Please split a donation of $10 today between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02c06a04-12ec-459a-9989-ca544467dc89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fc52c65-d38c-4f99-af18-caff5e10c9f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter. When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress. Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows. The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!! And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement. In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden. Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics [Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and Leaders We Deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f23f32f-f78c-41ec-9cbf-632298f89ad7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN $10 OR MORE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b4eda39-b8a8-4818-bbca-db19916a9cf0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon. There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few. There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country. [If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help fund our work. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T906e5e71-5392-442a-b5c0-7f4b1b180b66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Put a gag order on Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Urge Judge Chutkan to Impose a Gag Order on Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4335fb42-fcb9-4620-9f09-b50e2b10ee48/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a3d91f0-2cdd-4b30-9df8-b0cc386a29ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [It's time to impose a gag order on Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc268000-2f79-4b36-99dc-bbec68f98b45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and hold him accountable for his threats, lies, and attempts to intimidate those connected with the trial. [**This could happen as early as today:**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f898955-7aef-4cbc-840f-5f3727a78a17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Federal prosecutors and lawyers for former President Donald J. Trump will square off on Monday over whether a gag order should be put on Mr. Trump to restrict his often threatening statements about his federal indictment on charges of conspiring to overturn the 2020 election._ _Gag orders limiting what trial participants can say outside of court are not uncommon. But Mr. Trump's status as the front-runner for the Republican presidential nomination, and his decision to portray the gag order request as part of an effort by the Biden administration to stifle a political rival, makes this request by prosecutors especially fraught and complex._ _The prosecution and defense are scheduled to gather at 10 a.m. in Federal District Court in Washington. They will argue their positions on the order to Judge Tanya S. Chutkan, who was assigned to the case when Mr. Trump was charged in August. It is possible Judge Chutkan could rule from the bench by the end of the hearing. (source [NY Times](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9914cfd-286f-4cd6-9b56-bf3fb626dd0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ Trump is not above the law, and we shouldn't treat him like he is. [**Add your name, urge Judge Chutkan to impose a gag order, and let her know you will stand with her if she does.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a138f15-50c6-4b66-9895-39364d43295d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1
