Dear Friend,

The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election.

The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.

Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1 Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1

This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense.

Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court.

This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs.

All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.

DONATE $15 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24271%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JB5YcdwXDta5xvPpZVU4RA&sysid=1

DONATE $25 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24272%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gv76vByq4EJKxtV%2f0qLsEw&sysid=1

DONATE $50 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24273%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y%2f%2bAUwJqxisBltwDTMP20g&sysid=1

DONATE $100 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24274%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MiPrA13WknNWiQBgySTHbA&sysid=1

DONATE $250 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24285%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4o7k6xJdM68XTVgMEx%2bnkA&sysid=1

DONATE $500 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24286%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n%2bQyODKoVyHSit%2fhTrTMew&sysid=1

DONATE $1,000 or more https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24287%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Hv8%2flm7mULFO8urujdZMA&sysid=1

Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me:

Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes.

Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.

https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1

These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office!

Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted.

For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters.

Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.

Help Me Fight These False Charges https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1 Help Me Fight These False Charges https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1

So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities.

I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there.

In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.

Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1 Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1

As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges.

The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will have my back https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24270%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2syW6H4Ap6LdNUAYI%2fsSaQ&sysid=1 .

The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.

I'll help by donating $15 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24271%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JB5YcdwXDta5xvPpZVU4RA&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $25 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24272%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gv76vByq4EJKxtV%2f0qLsEw&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $50 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24273%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y%2f%2bAUwJqxisBltwDTMP20g&sysid=1

l'll help by donating $100 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24274%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MiPrA13WknNWiQBgySTHbA&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $250 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24285%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4o7k6xJdM68XTVgMEx%2bnkA&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $500 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24286%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n%2bQyODKoVyHSit%2fhTrTMew&sysid=1

Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers.

John Eastman

Constitutional Scholar

Attorney for President Donald Trump

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8ef8410724543f105bba06102793a425e2461776cf24cb20f2a314c97d5b214e038ad460c7555440ec00570edac0519ab762a0e7ee0bb37b9659771de389de7b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8ef8410724543f105bba06102793a425e2461776cf24cb20f2a314c97d5b214e038ad460c7555440ec00570edac0519ab762a0e7ee0bb37b9659771de389de7b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjg5LTI4NjdhMDY1OWMxMTQwNWY5OTEzODM1OGNkOTc3MTVkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDM1OTAmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/9L5F6mtvUrW3K7NeqxcNVg)

| | Dear Friend,
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors—material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom—a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals—visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook— _Victory and the Savior Generals_ —a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjg5LTI4NjdhMDY1OWMxMTQwNWY5OTEzODM1OGNkOTc3MTVkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDM1OTAmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/4I7PBJGtF1xeMWeJv_noEg)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjg5LTI4NjdhMDY1OWMxMTQwNWY5OTEzODM1OGNkOTc3MTVkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL3ZpY3RvcnktYW5kLXRoZS1zYXZpb3ItZ2VuZXJhbHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zYXZpb3JfZ2VuZXJhbHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDM1OTAmb2xjPTQzODkzIn0/juDeOWbvPKnc24igkskMPw)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

subject: OUTRAGEOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | | **[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zld8vevktnghsdrsf4j74q0r408ij4d1ekt1ad28_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z84ju0c2d862u0ta6n6bs9fcpcm53n48iqku2q10_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt05jqqg5q86tofej0tn5mpkoeu7mk6g921e2n8g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrcdspe3n710l0ppvki7uoi72i895fs9eslh49k8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqvn1ps63kmjlifarjfamcm4pno2okl5hgikfl08_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
---
**[DONATE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zssaa1hr5jn96tsmjo9o9s853bl7a6fut656kuoo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
**[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcnb5pk7ldgjpv3cjcmbdqq5b7cq0ujid63lpdjg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
**[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc53vlv1srao2lp8m4nv0jola6soq3k3v7fg1p08_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
**[DONATE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2jeca58te2ep775h6cbnapne83n7pt7taflt2kg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
**[DONATE $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4a00djih7cidrk90mvg82th6qpj7orb268bu1bg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
**[DONATE $1,000 or more](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmb4oc1t0bs3m6jmkmav3rjf0460ckl0jk1t3rmg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**
| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8r2bk3fvcsh518vc9o85sbe8r1oecvu75tq657g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkheekit15b4r5dt84icfohdf7sun53lvvdf7240_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrbo21ng06ig524q9pfcv1iduh9i01ju3q9so010_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbeckkidcvlio3homb746831oab2llrue5ckag70_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jm4pb0sth2bs)**. The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.

clean_body: The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, | | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer. This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. body:
Just a quick email.

| I’m in a bit of a bind. We recently learned that Marsha Blackburn has a $6.5 million campaign war chest. I’m convinced that grassroots supporters can take her on, but that means it’s even MORE important that we don’t fall short of our goals. Our October mid-month goal is 3,000 donors. Right now, we’re short of that total. Look, we know that overcoming Marsha’s advantage won’t be easy — that’s why we’re pushing so aggressively to meet our target. name: John Eastman
subject: OUTRAGEOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | | **[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlj6sn1kndi3htl08qpr70qeejiv2erukc7bktn8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuvvvekpn39i912q5ls4sks5b8hmv34qisqiv2so_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zntrkjk99eumgc60t837na5l0fjj999evhose0ig_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8s5ngoes0ioitchca4rht09i22fjuvf9cdkglq0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z97jma651aabjk5qqjjud51bqmb7d59ftuv6e0jo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
---
**[DONATE $25](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi3vcsjdv74qsmvfr7rbnc6ketfrl5kcjve6ai0g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $50](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z02aostgm2064oua3tnkbkbaksoc81g3enngo5o8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbbdnojopjo31fac462e1b5q1fpgm5o436s41nog_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $250](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5nomr5k2364ja6itjfjdb17t8g913l4cas7mbs0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $500](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0skbi68kkv7g2i3j2u309nqlnnqci9nj274rkfg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $1,000 or more](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmqftgqs86qf2ka3j418jb1fganqscr3aene9b9g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd987rkrv8ktcv2o3b7ace462i0plh0hm8hjfd28_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdk7d7f63pgq16cecqt5gq6a65222d8qtrdqv6eo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc7jqa29elu46f7t1fv7f7q77i3865q7iel090b0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6m05vhcnh567u9o1cmqgep7epoasqhja2q5f4vo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**. The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.
| | **[I'll help by donating $15](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z20rv1aqkld4i5k7f3878pv9colo31439sj6dkvo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
---
**[I'll help by donating $25](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z47fdr8sm3o8hajs83jhkqb5sbn8tmbp6vnbdef8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $50](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkjoofa629ljaqmthlii8a5j2m2c1htcc7ob8jt8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[l'll help by donating $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcdeke46kacbncehvacppkg267ha7hglp2qa122o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $250](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhqc71jjbq7j4l42vi77fjgpk9kg4velqq6k6qro_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $500](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zslvbnpn5ngh0t2nhdvansae88je703afjfhmtfg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $1,000 or more](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi1q3qk14921sn2j4uf92dfvtgil2ra3i3f4gouo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmco71chh2bs)**
| | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers.
---
| | | Sincerely,
---
John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump
P.S. Contributions to my legal defense fund are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI?=
subject: Critical Volunteer Needs!
body:
Critical Volunteer Needs! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8f7067e628&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | |
**Critical Needs:**
** **
**Everyone Can Do Something,**
** **
**Nobody Should be Doing Nothing!**

---
|
The grassroots, conservative community in Ohio is coming together into a coordinated, united, focused, voter bloc that can no longer be ignored. It's time to take the next steps to solidify a durable, multi-generational, growing movement. To do this, we need volunteers to help with a few activities. Here's what we need:

##
[CRITICAL: CHURCH & PASTOR (OHIO) DATABASE DEVELOPMENT DATA ENTRY](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4ae0d0412d&e=5c740fa3e2)
As part of our efforts to defeat November's Issue 1, we need help organizing a pan-Ohio, church & pastor database. We need volunteers who we will direct to websites where church & pastor data can be found. Volunteers will enter what they find into an online form we've developed that automatically builds a spreadsheet for us. There is no spreadsheet experience necessary. This is a data entry or data "cut & paste" activity. It's essential we have this contact information so our army of phone callers can contact pastors about defeating Issue 1. Anyone can do this!

To volunteer for this CRITICAL need, please go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=845dc16e26&e=5c740fa3e2) and fill in the form. Someone will be back to you very quickly! Thank you!

##
[SOCIAL MEDIA TEAM](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=382ab93acd&e=5c740fa3e2)
GFI, together with OhioFAN and OhioFAN's member organizations, are building a social media powerhouse. We envision having a world-class, social media team, who develop messaging and messages, post original content developed by the team, and amplify, through sharing, the "reach" of our messages. This will be a well-organized, well-managed, team of volunteers working to get out our messages of freedom, small government, self-responsibility, sanctity of life, and constitutional order, to name a few.

To put your hat in the ring to be part of this team, please go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=52a62c33d9&e=5c740fa3e2) and fill out the quick survey. Someone will be back to you soon. Thank you!

#

[RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f24062de6d&e=5c740fa3e2) -and- [LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c558223dd1&e=5c740fa3e2)
We're developing two statewide working groups to use the legacy media to our advantage. We're looking for volunteers who can (and will) write & speak (call-in radio). The writing will be letters to the editor and opinion pieces ("Op-Ed"). The speaking will be calling into talk radio shows. This is a statewide effort we're already building-out across Ohio.

We're going to work on crafting consistent messaging across the state, so this will be a team effort - you won't be on your own! If you'd like to explore this volunteer opportunity, please fill out one (or both?) of the forms linked below. Thank you!

[**RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1145c15948&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7c7c660c5d&e=5c740fa3e2)
#
* * *
---
|
---
| |
**What else can you do to help TODAY?**

---
| Today, you can do two things.

**First** , download our new app calle**d GFI _connect_**. It's available for both Google and Android and it's **FREE**.

Go **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=686db37be0&e=5c740fa3e2)** to download and install **GFI _connect_** , or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1eabc14290&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Second** , you can forward this message to 5 friends or family members who you feel would be willing to consider joining us. Please ask them to download and install the **GFI _connect_** app, but also ask them to fill out the questionnaire found **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4632c394c6&e=5c740fa3e2)** or by clicking on the image below:

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=235cddda72&e=5c740fa3e2)

**South/60 • North/30** is part of our effort to ACTIVATE more Ohioans to our movement while the **GFI _connect_** app is a way to UNITE, COMMUNICATE with, ORGANIZE, and EDUCATE those in our movement, striving for constant improvement of our knowledge, skills, and tactics.

* * *
---
| |

You May Find Valuable**

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9baefa46bb&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=207a075c25&e=5c740fa3e2)

---

| **Another Way You Can Help GFI:**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=57461e6c29&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1bbfd15545&e=5c740fa3e2)

name: Letitia James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter,

I'm coming to you with some tough news: My finance team just told me we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal by $681.

But I know this team of fighters has come through before in difficult times, so I'm not giving up hope. We're just too close to this $20,000 goal.

**So we’re extending our fundraising deadline, for just one more day, to midnight TONIGHT. Peter, when I’ve needed you most, you’ve come through for me time and time again.

[Please, will you make a $5 donation right now so we can close this shortfall and keep up the fight next month and beyond? The stakes are simply too high, and your donation will make all the difference as I fight for reproductive justice, voting rights, and so much more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71639524/432778509/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1220-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE0N2U5ZC0yNDZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrB-eHB3e-R4ECB1Y6mdUqmEMa7p9_cZBQ9ORoFOJoY=)**

name: John Eastman
subject: OUTRAGEOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | |
---
|
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaj4op2l9kgabupmetfp40g0u3j06lrepvgd1erg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuiv9ie33lerlv08uqf3k06bsv33f05sck8k6388_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
---
**[DONATE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ua3nhj86keg2kkqshd3hc5ftqe2sdtcci6jlc0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[DONATE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zahdenmrgk1oqhh2fso08if8kl9b6diuoq2f9ct0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[DONATE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlt2ds1dmner27olh4pmfratitae1l6jvaa8kovo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[DONATE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6gknbc0l8n0s6hso0v99bo4069qs1sbn4qg95pg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[DONATE $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znmf1vtcq2k8g83ojs8248u6uaam2bt29mjk1j70_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[DONATE $1,000 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zthv37gvpl9126f6sg90p85an6u7155sjtb57tvg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkv6nlhj0sngj5230f0ion1gf1eetelgo7d6rt0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhvcudb5eqo2173aggh890d4rkd4ev60t9pnpgug_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk60s0ll9abpubs6jafvh9dh6sg0se82qjq0poe8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zch70ahghdbrjrfv6k9q8tj0knm2paetrr9b4bd0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**. The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.
| | **[I'll help by donating $15](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgruta8gubah4o2gcjv1bsaurb1pjkrc0rh8i80_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
---

**[I'll help by donating $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbq0d8t07d2rlik0f1i85rs30s4iokb6a6076oco_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[l'll help by donating $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeb1hmie4lngd1sraajhhpe9r82ou9hild07ld6o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbngmvmi9suafrcoopjt5d29j9aan9jbs9ci31hg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbkt29nej0uobkf89dlil9ouabopfm40dfduegp8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $1,000 or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3fo7untnla3ndqhaps0g6ut3cjpd2goler68d0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5jmaor2c1h2bs)**
| | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers.
---
| | | Sincerely,
---
John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump

All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers. | | | Sincerely, John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump P.S. subject: Tickets are going fast for the Cigars and Dinner with Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.!
body:
Get your tickets now! October 26 - 5:30 PM
| | | |

SHERIFF JONATHAN M. SAMMONS, COMMISSIONER CHRISTOPHER KONAWEL, JR. AND COMMISSIONER NICHOLAS DESILVIO
---
| cordially invite you to their Cigars and Dinner Event with special guest
---
| "America's Sheriff" Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.
---
| VIP Cigars and Meet & Greet with Sheriff Clarke will start at 5:30 PM. There are very limited spots for the VIP Cigars and Meet & Greet, so get your tickets now!
Dinner will start at 6:45PM.
We are offering a Discounted ticket to Law Enforcement Officers and Military Personnel for the Dinner portion of this event. Please provide proof of LEO/Military.
Tickets will not be sold at the door.
All check payments must be accompanied by the Donation Form found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016U5K7IBgD4oFzZW4o9sQZpk7IoT-JfENncinIJu7MiNx__K5ekWMIPVuQ_CYH_QP8FgLfTUMs1OyX63qaJVN3GD9Es5n_FQ3VwmrbDocPV-PZQU79kmB0Wr18J8OrQ3v67ZkgO3x_14bje0Ml59k5SDIGyS4dbDNEZfvFawFuuCAh1p2YSYYIUHRU8bDylVLsY8y--2jUJkNXRyE8MYDx-9b3TQMEdXcMap1J_ea_4hNHGHv2nWWzw==&c=cUBAzedce0VU-p7_NLYlNUdEDpHnS-19wJir7GsRtZ8Qjiybrp95aA==&ch=1NmGQAFh3KS_fK_uuCXWhus1Fk20KNvV2-kzNo2lBSn4wwBl1kQXOQ==).

Sponsorships must be in by October 23, 2023.
If you have any questions, please reach out to Samantha Sammons at stsammons@gmail.com) or 856-535-7113.

### About Sheriff David A. Clarke, Jr.

After nearly four decades in law enforcement, Sheriff David Clarke has found innovative ways to serve the public that gives him the freedom to reach millions of Americans with his message, unfiltered by the confines of holding an elected office. In addition to his dedication and focus as the Sheriff of a large metropolitan county, Clarke developed a passion for political commentary. He is fondly referred to as the "America's Sheriff" after being given that name by Sean Hannity because he has the natural ability to explain complicated national controversies in a way that everyday people can understand. He is the keynote speaker at countless events across the country, where the audience praises his no-nonsense way of promoting conservative values. He truly enjoys mobilizing everyday Americans to become more politically active and civically engaged. Clarke has ramped up his massive social media activism, including regular communication with his nearly one million followers. In 2017, he became Spokesman and Senior Advisor to America First Action, dedicated to supporting the Trump-Pence Administration. Sheriff Clarke is President of America's Sheriff LLC, President of Rise Up Wisconsin Inc, best selling author, host of Straight Talk With America's Sheriff David Clarke Podcast, and has signed with TruBlu Streaming Service to host, COPS Under Fire, coming out later in 2023. He is also one of the country's most sought after keynote speakers and thought leaders in the conservative movement.
---

subject: Tell It Like It Is Launches New Ad Featuring Christie Ripping Into Trump For Hezbollah Comments: “Fool”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC
body:
Tell It Like It Is Launches New Ad Featuring Christie Ripping Into Trump For Hezbollah Comments: “Fool” | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7fe702b2abcd/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13560124-bio63ogl56-13560244?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
October 16, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com?subject=null&body=null)
**Tell It Like It Is Launches New Ad Featuring Christie Ripping Into Trump For Hezbollah Comments: “Fool”
** _Christie: “Trump Cares About One Person & One Person Only: The Person He Sees In The Mirror”_
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released its latest ad of the 2024 cycle featuring Governor Chris Christie taking former president Donald Trump to task for praising the terrorist group Hezbollah as “very smart” and criticizing Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
Entitled “Fool,” the :60 second spot will be featured across digital platforms.
Trump’s comments occurred during the [deadliest assault](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=ace591163b&e=d0a9afa930) on the Jewish people since the Holocaust and as Iranian backed Hezbollah is said to be “[fully prepared](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=452c7831b6&e=d0a9afa930)” to join Hamas’ fight against Israel.
Governor Christie swiftly denounced Trump’s remarks and labeled him a “fool,” who has once again has shown that he is unfit to serve as President of the United States. Christie lambasted Trump: “He’s a fool. Only a fool would make those kinds of comments. Only a fool would give comments that could give aid and comfort to Israel’s adversary.”
Trump’s comments continue a troubling pattern of sympathy for some of the world’s worst actors. He has previously called Chinese Community Party leader Xi Jinping “brilliant” and straight out of [“central casting](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=634afb483b&e=d0a9afa930),” and he’s gushed about authoritarians [Vladimir Putin](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=fd90920adc&e=d0a9afa930) and [Kim Jong Un](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=741c053ee8&e=d0a9afa930).
**“Fool”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=72d104099e&e=d0a9afa930)
**TRANSCRIPT FOR “FOOL” (:30)**
**Reporter:**_As Israel fights Hamas in Gaza, in the south of Israel, the IDF have also traded rocket fire with Hezbollah._
**Reporter:** _The ties between Hezbollah and Iran are far greater, far more organized._
**Reporter:** _Hezbollah is Lebanon’s most powerful armed group and is committed to Israel’s destruction._
**Donald Trump:**_You know, Hezbollah is very smart, they’re all very smart._
**Chris Christie:**_He’s a fool. Only a fool would make those kind of comments. Only a fool would give comments that can give aid and comfort to Israel’s adversary._
_This is someone who cares not about the American people, not about the people of Israel, but he cares about one person, and one person only - the person he sees in the mirror when he wakes up in the morning._
_We cannot once again nominate a fool like this and get him anywhere near the Presidency of the United States._
_And having a fool like Donald Trump who would make those comments in the tone that he made them, has proven to folks that he has no business being President of the United States._
**VO:**_Tell It Like It Is PAC is responsible for the content of this advertisement._

_-###-_

# We Can Do This!

**Peter -**
I am so grateful for the outpouring of support and kindness I have received since launching my campaign.

With you by my side, I know that we can make a positive impact on communities here in TX-8, and if we flip this seat, **we can potentially change the entire electoral ma** p!
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=68f3c32901&e=a2a46ff12c)
I want to raise awareness of kitchen table issues that matter most. Things like education, access to healthcare, and the struggles that everyday Texans face in our trying times.

These are the things that Texans want to change. We deserve fair and compassionate representation that works to improve our lives, and that is what I aim to provide.

[**If you are ready to see real representation and see one of us deliver for all of us, please donate to our campaign today to ensure that we have the support needed to flip Texas**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=eb3d2d2a47&e=a2a46ff12c)[**BLUE**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=3c7cf13303&e=a2a46ff12c)[**.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=8a29555c25&e=a2a46ff12c)

name: Zak M.
subject: We must take a hard stance on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend,

Every woman deserves to make decisions about their own bodies and their own healthcare. Whether it’s abortion or contraception – it’s your body and your choice.

**We cannot elect leaders who are unwilling to take a hard stance on this.**

Especially not when elected officials are working overtime to outlaw abortion and insert the government into decisions best made by a woman and her doctor.

**Let me be clear: I will always support a woman’s right to choose.**

That means codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law, increasing access and funding to family planning services, and speaking out whenever legislators on either side of the aisle waiver from these values.

With gratitude,
Zak Malamed

[Support our team today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-new-gen?amount=10&refcode=em20231016-el&refcode2=507_8507_UtLSQJ&akid=507%2E8507%2EUtLSQJ)

name: John Eastman
subject: OUTRAEGOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UplOx6oXl3QtXCVlREcWtQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UplOx6oXl3QtXCVlREcWtQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UplOx6oXl3QtXCVlREcWtQ&sysid=1

Dear Friend,

The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election.

The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.

Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UplOx6oXl3QtXCVlREcWtQ&sysid=1 Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UplOx6oXl3QtXCVlREcWtQ&sysid=1

This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense.

Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court.

This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs.

All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.

DONATE $15 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670196%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zU%2fp6BlCfg8kTnr7qPR98A&sysid=1

DONATE $25 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LUN18aQudxlyx1rhx6FgRw&sysid=1

DONATE $50 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670198%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jP0P%2fuA6ihWj84HDDG1EtQ&sysid=1

DONATE $100 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670199%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y1w%2f1T24QfLKplh2KoaD4Q&sysid=1

DONATE $250 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670190%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z5mNptcJE6mOBQXOiU8Hug&sysid=1

DONATE $500 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670191%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WTjZ%2fTRJWYMOOqDPh6%2biFA&sysid=1

DONATE $1,000 or more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hL%2fAB4VQMg756OBFKl%2bbiA&sysid=1

Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me:

Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes.

Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UplOx6oXl3QtXCVlREcWtQ&sysid=1

These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office!

Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted.

For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters.

Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.

In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers. | | | Sincerely, John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump P.S. Contributions to my legal defense fund are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | | | John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC PO Box 32654, Santa Fe, NM 87594 Copyright Â(C) 2023 John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC | | Donations to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 🎙️NEW: Border Security and the Middle East | No Doubt About It Podcast
body:
A border fence between Texas and New Mexico! | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2290ea5dd5&e=567664f14c)

This is a must-listen episode of [**No Doubt About It**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4d8d6d4e9e&e=567664f14c) for anyone concerned about border security and the potential collapse of life as we know it thanks to the conflicts in the Middle East!

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5e4dcdc15c&e=567664f14c)
* [Apple Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=37bfac7aec&e=567664f14c)
* [Spotify](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=114af5046d&e=567664f14c)
* [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=169d11180a&e=567664f14c)

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e08129775f&e=567664f14c)

In this episode, Mark and Krysty dive into the crucial issue of border security, discussing **Texas Governor Greg Abbott's decision to build a fence between Texas and New Mexico.** The rationale behind this move is New Mexico's unwillingness to stop illegal immigration, leading to concerns about illegal immigrants crossing into Texas. Texas has had enough with Governor Lujan Grisham’s dangerous open border policy.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1e159a5b5d&e=567664f14c)
But the episode doesn't stop there! **DO NOT MISS — Former Gubernatorial Candidate and Brigadier General Greg Zanetti joins the conversation to share insights into the situation in the Middle East**. He addresses the recent, vicious, and unprovoked attack by Hamas on Israel and its potential consequences for the United States. Greg also explores the possibility that the 2024 election could be delayed as the Democrats seek ways to hold onto power.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8dbd71306&e=567664f14c)
|
---
We invite you to listen to this thought-provoking episode on your favorite podcast platform. Don't forget to like and subscribe to stay updated on our latest content.

You can also catch us on YouTube and visit our website at [**nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1daf37efd1&e=567664f14c), where you can support the podcast, purchase merchandise, and make donations to help us continue bringing you valuable discussions.

Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to sharing more engaging content with you in the future.
Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=13a2c94e48&e=567664f14c)
