name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CRITICAL Call to Action Oct. 16: Jim Jordan for Speaker – Call-in Rally for America
body:
| | |
---
Over the weekend, there were reports that a small number of the GOP House conference were figuring out how to block Jim Jordan from becoming Speaker. As of this morning, two of those opposing Congressman Jordan have now endorsed him, so that is great news! But it’s not over yet and we need to ensure he has all Republicans on his side. The Republicans are meeting tonight around 6:00 pm ET and the floor vote for Jim Jordan is scheduled for Tuesday at noon ET, so it’s imperative these calls happen today, Monday, October 16. **The call to action is what we have named a Call-in Rally for America! Since we knew it would be hard to put in-person rallies together this quickly, we are asking you to join our rally by calling your Republican member of Congress with the message below and then share our sample social media post as well.**
---
**Phone Message** When you call, simply call the Capitol Switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask for your Republican member by name and they will transfer you to that office. Or you can look up your member and his or her number on the [House website.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzI4OS01YTFkYjMwNDIwNzY0NGZmODcwNzA4NWM3YzAzODBjOSIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIwIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQ2NTQyJmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/TmQ1d5junjgt7H64NRVRoA)
---
| | **If your representative is _Mike Rogers_ from Alabama, _Ken Calvert_ from California, or _Ann Wagner_ from Missouri, please use the following message:** _Hello, my name is ______ and I am a constituent. My zip code is _______. I’m calling to say thank you to Representative _______ for his/her commitment to vote for Jim Jordan for Speaker. I’m grateful that he/she is putting the country first and wanted to let him/her know._
---
| | **If you have any other Republican representative, please use the following message.** _“Hello, my name is _______ and I am a constituent. My zip code is ________. I’m calling to see if Representative _______ has committed to voting for Jim Jordan for Speaker.__ _**IF YES** _**:** “Thank you! I am so grateful that my representative is putting our country first, and that the House will be able to get back to work quickly. Thank you so much!”_ _ _ **IF NO/UNDECIDED/WON’T:** “ _Jim Jordan has been endorsed by Representatives McCarthy, McClintock, and Mike Rogers. He has leadership and grassroots support. As a constituent, I’m urging Representative _____ to vote for Jordan for Speaker, please._ _The Republican Party must unify to be able to deal with all of the crises the Democrats have caused._ _I would also like your office to follow up with me once [he or she] commits to vote for Jordan for Speaker so that I can say thank you for voting for Jim Jordan.”_
---
| | |
---
**Social Media Post** Share [the graphic below](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTQyJmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/ErNp3Leg8PVpHmt3MKf0LQ) on social media and use the following text when you post it. _Join me for this nationwide Call-in Rally for America to help us get Jim Jordan elected as the next Speaker of the House!_
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTQyJmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/eUyf69CLgeXRFXC8HpEspA)
---
**Please share this call to action with other likeminded friends and let’s get Jim Jordan across the finish line!** In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzI4OS01YTFkYjMwNDIwNzY0NGZmODcwNzA4NWM3YzAzODBjOSIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiI0IiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00NjU0MiZpZD1UMTdVTlRzZlpKdHdrU3lUVEMifQ/T8z_SpI2zCY7Oc3DBCnOaQ)

name: Hill Harper
subject: A better future is possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I believe that our government should work for the people, be a force for good, and protect our freedoms.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=welcome&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2 - website&t=1)
We can all feel it, Peter.
Whether you’re a driver, a nurse, a teacher, a construction worker, or a business owner, **you’re not truly represented in Washington**.
Now, I’m not a politician. But when I see that D.C. politicians are delivering for special interests — instead of everyday people — it’s clear we need a system overhaul in Washington. And that means we need representatives who'll get money out of politics, and make our government work for _us_ again.
**That’s why I’m running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate!****I’m going to need your help to take on and defeat the special interests, so I’m personally asking:**
[**Peter, can I count on you to help us get this campaign off the ground by becoming a founding donor and pitching in $5 today?**](https://act.hillharper.com/go/40?amount=5&refcode=em20231016-439&t=2&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/40?amount=5&refcode=em20231016-439&t=3&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2)**
As a union organizer, activist, single father, and the owner of a small business in Detroit, I understand the pressures Michiganders are facing right now:
* We pay **14 times more for a vial of insulin** than our neighbors to the north.

* We’re **49th in the nation for growth**.

* We rank **41st in the nation for teacher pay**.

* In the last three years, more small businesses **closed their doors for good** here than in _any other state_.

These challenges are not any single politician’s fault — it’s the system that’s broken. To change that, we need a new voice and a new perspective.
I believe that our government should work for the people, be a force for good, and protect our freedoms — not take them away.**But that won’t happen if we keep electing the same career politicians to office who will just uphold the status quo.**
And that’s what this campaign is all about — fighting for the future of ALL of our communities and our democracy.
**As a political outsider, I’m accountable to you from day one. We won’t have the most endorsements from DC insiders, but we’ll have something better: A movement of everyday folks who are tired of our broken politics and ready to vote for dynamic change.**
**[If you believe in better, join our campaign as a founding donor by pitching in $5, $15, or anything you can to help us build the resources we’ll need to win.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/40?amount=5&refcode=em20231016-439&t=4&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/40?amount=5&refcode=em20231016-439&t=22&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2)**
Thank you for your support,
Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=welcome&refcode2=439_62735_iojcD2&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2 - website&t=23)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=439%2E62735%2EiojcD2)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=be10d4c430cb18621b7f04e6953e5b9b13f85542b4b197ecdd4e920c65378ddf6be5021ae460e0bd75e1dbd6102719dd2031c37a226d45120df451c70def3042

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=be10d4c430cb18621b7f04e6953e5b9b13f85542b4b197ecdd4e920c65378ddf6be5021ae460e0bd75e1dbd6102719dd2031c37a226d45120df451c70def3042

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: I don't normally send emails like this, but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s important, and I need you to read every word

| |
---
| | |
Friend, this is Representative Ryan Zinke, former commander at SEAL Team 6.

I don’t normally send texts like this, but I need you to read every word of this message.

During my campaign for this crucial House seat, Democrats called in all the favors from their billionaire donors to help my far-left Liberal opponent, Monica Tranel, win.

I barely survived - only thanks to support from grassroots Patriots like you was I able to win my seat & give Republicans a slim Majority in the House.

_**But now, Monica Tranel is running again - and this time, Democrats are going to spend more than ever before. They named my seat one of their top targets to flip. **_

Look, Friend, I’m a battle-hardened Navy SEAL and war veteran - _**so I only ask for help when it’s absolutely necessary.**_

**[But I’ll be honest, if I can’t stock my war chest with support from America First patriots, I won’t stand a chance against the dark money Democrat donors. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help by midnight.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24282%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d0jc8gFyU3m%2fFPP%2fcAYRsw&sysid=1 "But I’ll be honest, if I can’t stock my war
chest with support from America First patriots, I won’t stand a chance against the
dark money Democrat donors. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help by
midnight.")**
---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24283%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bFhBd8z6OJzUenK9En6uhg&sysid=1)
---

Democrats know my seat is the key to holding the House Majority & they’ll spend ungodly amounts to crush me.

So believe me when I say this - **the future of America is on the line & what happens today will decide everything.**

I’m proud to say that I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior, and I have more combat experience than any other Member of Congress. However, that’s simply not enough to win this race.

**[So are you willing to contribute to my campaign and help me go the distance?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24284%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y3lgUDjccBjvqglq8gZZGw&sysid=1 "So are you willing to contribute to my
campaign and help me go the distance?")**

The difference between victory and defeat now lies with you, Friend

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

Fellow American,

After a closed-door mega-donor summit, Nikki Haley said:
> _'I think it's up to the voters,**and I think it's up to the donors to decide which candidates should get off the stage."**_
Every other major candidate in this race was summoned to mega-donor summits in Utah and Dallas to sing for their support. I refused. Cronyism leads to corruption.

Fellow American, I want to hear from you. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=6b1883a87138474d93da4c112e9e41c6&_e=vbD--eqLUqZBrK_l0NLkW0wrluItNFy_hNDd9X3-pmUIgJhW22tl4AVUM84yZIyhgC08jkv_d9EEmxgT_7il4MvsLONPzoWtQht_fpKz89n1817u0EPmCvJfQp39WhV9MD-kM_3grBmSngGrgyz8c1upJrM7FpOMWjqFcbx2etiwfio4nTEjSSyYEjkB7TWeYuTZ4fc0y8ZUhI65fkItYXy7oYFbZphUrV6jK0D3rKVHCl66HrhWJzz1WkdT-e8C0SuKx-jDEJo1f36igEc9H6tR098qBec8i6Pt8lxfuqUM6l9vGQ4owldeyYEEdu18QYCL4L7kJ9KTkU6WnsCLLJI3qbUUvzQelFwyv9DRSh2-RcPm54jNltRrCAjE8zbCUmQCnpzA_ltKWOqN2WIOkA%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: DuPage Township Trustee Calls Israel a "Terrorist Country"
body:
Calls for DuPage Township Trustee Reem Townsend to resign are expected at tomorrow night's board meeting in Bolingbrook.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/9431492b1047/breaking-dupage-township-trustee-calls-israel-a-terrorist-country?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=f55eed4c13) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=f55eed4c13)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Progressive Democrat and DuPage Township Trustee Calls Israel a "Terrorist Country," Slams U.S. for Supporting Longtime Ally After Surprise Attack Killed 1,300 Innocent Israelis (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/progressive-democrat-and-dupage-township-trustee-calls-israel-a-terrorist-country-slams-u-s-for-supporting-longtime-ally-after-surprise-attack-killed-1300-innocent-israelis.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/progressive-democrat-and-dupage-township-trustee-calls-israel-a-terrorist-country-slams-u-s-for-supporting-longtime-ally-after-surprise-attack-killed-1300-innocent-israelis.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Palestinians with their belongings leave their homes in Gaza City following the Israeli army’s evacuation warning. (Mahmud Hams/AFP/Getty Images)

DuPage Township Trustee and progressive Democrat Reem Townsend (https://dupagetownship.com/township-board/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , a Muslim American and the daughter of Palestinian immigrants – has taken to social media in the last week to call Israel – a longtime ally of the United States – a “terrorist country” after Israel declared war on the terrorist organization Hamas following a surprise attack that has left over 1,300 Israelis dead – including innocent men, women, children and babies.

In a Facebook post earlier this week, Townsend wrote,

“Israel is a terrorist country. Any act against them is an act of liberation and self defense.”

The DuPage Township Trustee – a Democrat, has been active on X over the last several days and has continued her anti-American and anti-Israel rhetoric. On October 11th, she posted,

“Basically the stance the US is taking is that killing children and babies is just a matter of war. Disgusting.”
Since the surprise terrorist attack on Israel last weekend that has left over 1,300 dead (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/israel-declares-war-on-hamas-after-surprise-attack-targeting-innocent-civilians-state-political-parties-express-outrage-as-il-gop-remains-silent.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – Israel has launched a barrage of missiles aimed at the Gaza Strip, where Hamas has its headquarters purposely situated alongside civilian residents.

Hamas is known for using innocent civilians as
human shields (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_MLY-Yy4Vpw&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and they fire rockets from schools and hospitals – knowing that military strategy and response includes firing weapons back at the targets where they were fired from.

Israeli Defense Forces have reported in the last few days that last weekend Hamas terrorists assassinated innocent Israeli civilians including men, women, children and babies. In many cases, Hamas fighters decapitated babies, brutally murdered children while in their beds and burned their little bodies. Photos released by the Israeli government show homes and children’s bedrooms riddled with bullets.

On Friday, the Israeli military ordered 1 million civilians to flee Gaza and head for safety before a ground invasion begins that will undoubtedly involve intense battles between the military and Hamas fighters.

Earlier this week, Israel shut off all electricity, food, water and fuel in Gaza to weaken and disrupt the terrorist organization, while at the same time warning civilians to flee the area as soon as possible – even dropping leaflets all over Gaza warning residents to “evacuate your homes immediately.”

Several days ago, Townsend reposted a post on X that said, “Israel is committing a mass atrocity: bombing and starving Palestinians indiscriminately. And it’s doing it out in the open – with US backing.”

Townsend even took a shot at Los Angeles Lakers NBA star LeBron James, who posted on his X account with 52.7 million followers – a message of support for Israel that read,

“The devastation in Israel is tragic and unacceptable. The murder and violence against innocent people by Hamas is terrorism. The SpringHill Company family send our deepest condolences to Israel and the Jewish community. We pray for peace in the region and reiterate our continued commitment to fight hate in all its forms. We all must work to ensure this tragedy does not spread even more hate, racism, and antisemitism.”

Townsed replied to James’ post with a short response: “You should know better.”

Here in the United States, synagogues and law enforcement officials are on high alert. And on Thursday, a temple in Skokie (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/hamas-leaders-call-for-a-global-day-of-anger-friday-leaving-chicagoland-area-and-major-cities-around-the-world-on-high-alert.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , just north of Chicago received a bomb threat and had to be evacuated.

Fortunately, no explosives were found after local police searched the temple, but the threats of terrorism and hate crime incidents against the Jewish community remain a real threat following Hamas’ call to action earlier this week.

In Washington, Democrat U.S. Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-MI) has sparked outrage for referring to Israel as an
“apartheid government.” (https://thehill.com/homenews/house/4251115-hoyer-supports-tlaib-amid-hamas-attack-pushback/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Both Republicans and Democrats have come out against her comments – and the Democratic leadership in DC has remained silent – an indication that they do not agree with her position.

Late on Friday, the Chicago City Council approved a
resolution (https://www.chicagotribune.com/politics/ct-city-council-israel-palestine-war-resolution-20231013-c4mrbdujafagjl5vncvl7kjore-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) condemning the attacks by Hamas on Israel by a voice vote.

The next DuPage Township board meeting is scheduled for Tuesday, October 17th at 7:00 pm in Bolingbrook, and Townsend’s public comments are expected to be a topic of discussion.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f55eed4c13-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_01_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f55eed4c13-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

subject: Drill, Baby, Drill!

America's hydrocarbon industry can reduce geopolitical tensions, lower inflation, and yes, believe it or not, help save the environment.

# [Drill, Baby, Drill!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=137971836&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3OTcxODM2LCJpYXQiOjE2OTc0NjY3MTMsImV4cCI6MTcwMDA1ODcxMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zaNw-iDFAYWMQ6wRyv3B-SZ2aZ53-yX2nYAVBgtl53Y)
### America's hydrocarbon industry can reduce geopolitical tensions, lower inflation, and yes, believe it or not, help save the environment.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/redirect/9258decc-abfb-4981-91df-b4b4c9ac975f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/drill-baby-drill?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/53f7eaf8-e86f-4304-955d-0cc2d85181bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The world is fragile, something we all feel as wars rage, inflation persists, economies slow, and the climate changes. Unlocking America's vast energy potential and aggressively developing our hydrocarbon resources is one strategy that could reduce geopolitical tensions, lower inflation, and yes, believe it or not, help save the environment.
### Issue #1: Geopolitics
We currently have two major wars (_[both proxy wars that are part, I would argue, of the US-China War](https://substack.com/redirect/8a5b0699-47bc-4953-ad5d-f68e95e02fa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_) taking place, one between Russia and Ukraine and the other between Israel and Hamas/Iran. Both wars are being funded, directly or indirectly, through the sale of petroleum and petroleum products.
Consider Moscow's situation. [Despite banning the import of Russian oil, liquified natural gas, and coal in 2022](https://substack.com/redirect/10e68db8-c857-44eb-b58f-b329f9d0157d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the United States still buys lots of petroleum products that originate in Russia, thereby funding Putin's war machine. Shockingly, this is allowed per the executive order as [Russian crude oil that is refined in India, for instance, can be sold in the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/da267110-7bb6-48d2-8060-f591a0c19fb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
This dynamic has produced a set of "[laundromat](https://substack.com/redirect/06fdfb7b-0fc3-439d-9631-f6cee744a1cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" nations that buy sanctioned crude oil and proceed to sell products made from that oil without any constraints. As noted by _The New York Times_ : "[This activity is legal: Once Russian crude oil has been "substantially transformed" by being refined in another country, it legally ceases to be Russian. The same standards have long applied to oil from other nations that are under sanctions, like Iran and Venezuela.](https://substack.com/redirect/8a756440-a967-416a-a046-131a383e4957?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Further, because Europe is dependent upon imported gas, [imports of Russia liquified natural gas have risen 40% since the invasion of Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/b6cf6c8c-0199-4099-b34f-3a64b614e204?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), further enriching Moscow. And it's not just Europe, it's also the Northeastern part of the United States. [In a letter to President Joe Biden dated October 27, 2022, Eversource CEO John Dolan](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) lamented the implications of American dependence on foreign sources for natural gas:
> _[To the extent New England power generators are forced to increase their reliance on foreign-sourced natural gas- if that is even possible - ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[it](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[will exacerbate well-documented shortages in Europe](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[. More fundamentally, from a national security perspective, ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[it will put](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[upward pressure on prices](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ in the international market for natural gas. As a major gas supplier, ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Russia will directly benefit](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ from higher prices, and that in turn threatens to ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[subsidize the Russian military and prolong the war in Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/8a3e2e84-73f8-469d-bf1e-a5c31bde3026?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [emphasis added}_
In addition, let's not forget that the war in Israel began with an attack by **Iran** -backed Hamas, and Iran is obviously funded by oil revenues. It's not a big jump to say that Hamas is funded by oil revenues. Interestingly (but surely not coincidentally), [Iranian oil exports hit a 5-year high](https://substack.com/redirect/f71a8503-65fd-40f3-b339-159d0d59960d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), despite US sanctions, earlier this year. Also noteworthy is that [during the first half of 2023, China imported more than 11 million barrels of crude oil per day](https://substack.com/redirect/0cf9eaaa-beaf-44f6-a64b-530736b52f95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), 10% more than they did in the same period of 2022. So, what we have is Chinese money, flowing to Iranian coffers, and used to support Hamas. According to a recent _Reuters_ article:
> _["Sanctions are in place but perhaps they are not fully implemented or monitored," said Sara Vakhshouri of SVB, who has previously said during Biden's term there hasn't been any serious crackdown or action against Iran's oil exports...China is Iran's biggest customer while volumes also head to Syria and Venezuela, according to analysts and shipping data.](https://substack.com/redirect/f71a8503-65fd-40f3-b339-159d0d59960d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
Iran notes that it's [producing and exporting around 3mm barrels of oil per day](https://substack.com/redirect/f71a8503-65fd-40f3-b339-159d0d59960d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Reports indicate that Tehran earned more than $40 billion from oil exports in 2022, up from the pre-Ukraine rate ~$25 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/1ebe3348-0e37-4edb-8de2-60886b86ee28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When we factor the [Iranian state budget is based on producing 1.8mm barrels of oil per day at $85 per barrel](https://substack.com/redirect/1ebe3348-0e37-4edb-8de2-60886b86ee28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we can guess that the Islamic regime is likely flush with cash. Throw on top of that the recent release of $6bn of funds seized by the United States that are going to be made available to Tehran ([although that may now be paused](https://substack.com/redirect/9fb208a7-39cb-4334-86cc-57deb10164e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), and it's not unreasonable to assume [Iran was emboldened to give Hamas a green light to attack Israel, likely to scuttle the normalization of relations between Israel and Saudi Arabi](https://substack.com/redirect/8a5b0699-47bc-4953-ad5d-f68e95e02fa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)a.
### **SO WHAT?**
Given the obvious link between high oil prices and the ability of Iran and Russia to wage war, might an increase in US hydrocarbon production both lower global prices and decrease dependency upon those regimes? If the US were to meaningfully increase its production of natural gas and make it available to Europe via LNG shipments, might this deprive Russia of much needed cash? We also know that additional supply, all else equal, would lower the prices of crude oil and natural gas, thereby lowering revenues -- even if sales continued. Relatedly, how might increased US hydrocarbon production impact Iran's attitude towards the West? Might the mullahs of Tehran be forced to deal with [rising domestic unrest](https://substack.com/redirect/72665670-6dad-4e7d-89d9-8b1fac239d60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), rather than support terrorism, as their funding dried up? Of course, one downside of lower prices is that it provides economic relief to China, one of the world's largest importers of crude oil and petroleum products.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
_SIDE NOTE: As I prepare to transition to a paid-only newsletter service, I 'm experimenting with ways to improve the value of my offering. One idea I'm trying is to harness the collective insight of the amazing group of readers that have been attracted to my global generalist perspective. Given that rationale, I'm going to make these newsletters interactive...so let's turn to our first poll:_
| | POLL
---
Do you think increased US energy production would make the world safer?
| [Yes](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.zfhAbGeTh-W69_YU8-dxAFv6J63Wt3BJQ2wYcvPipg4?)
---
[No](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.OVFZy8bZk2fxiwf5FXdbU4KeDu5IUM4HcmKEuynL1rk?)
[unclear](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.b2RmHfh2AD5vNPO1dsRf7G2v-b5GgYebexYCMvdEpXc?)
Another important variable is US demand for petroleum products. Unfortunately, [there is a mismatch between the type of crude oil needed by our refineries and the crude oil we produce domestically](https://substack.com/redirect/29f61571-6fe0-4981-8479-15f99f77f851?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but that can be fixed with investments. What if American energy companies invested in optimizing domestic refineries to handle the lighter, sweeter crude oil that happens to be available in the United States? Might this reduce global demand for petroleum products, thereby disincentivizing (or undercutting the economics of) "laundromat" countries from helping Russia and others monetize their hydrocarbons?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
### Issue #2: Economics
Given inflation is a major economic issue of our day, it's important to note that [inflation is a de facto tax on the poor and working class](https://substack.com/redirect/eb827cbc-4a06-4d48-a806-79acc307eb91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It slows economic activity as budgets are strained and reduces business confidence as investments may get postponed due to the economic uncertainty produced by inflation.
In addition, it's important we don't fool ourselves by distinguishing between core and non-core inflation. Energy prices, which are are admittedly more volatile than other prices, [impact the prices of everything carried by ships, planes, and trucks](https://substack.com/redirect/a9c460e6-eda2-44c7-aa3d-bb171268b403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Don't believe me? Go buy a plane ticket. Even [the US Chamber of Commerce notes, in a report published in June 2022, that "high diesel prices are flowing through to countless goods and services](https://substack.com/redirect/d552f61a-0400-4831-89c8-be87a5720691?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6784bd1a-93ed-4d85-b3df-8a43f2f16869?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://investingnews.com/daily/resource-investing/energy-investing/oil-and-gas-investing/oil-price-and-inflation/](https://substack.com/redirect/3793943d-a455-470c-bd93-c824ffd2ec28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
The blunt reality is that increased energy production will lower prices across the board (not just energy prices). And while lower energy prices may not "eliminate" sticky inflation, it will surely reduce the upward pressure exerted on prices. All else equal, more supply leads to lower prices, and lower prices drive lower inflation.
Further, there is an impact on consumer and business confidence. Inflation and price uncertainty usually depresses consumer confidence, economic activity, and business investments. Stable prices do the opposite: they lead to greater consumer spending, higher economic activity, and robust capital expenditures from business.
### SO WHAT?
Increasing US hydrocarbon production would lower inflation. If American consumers are less exposed the vicissitudes of global oil prices, might they be more confident and spend more? Could that drive greater economic activity? And of course, business confidence and therefore spending would rise if there were less economic uncertainty. Thus, **allowing US hydrocarbon production to grow could power the economy via lower and stable energy prices, lower inflation, and greater business and corporate confidence about future prices levels**.
| | POLL
---
Could a vibrant and growing US energy sector improve the overall health of the US economy?
| [Yes](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.Oft6l7QfTinmBHKW-GCXm-X25tGKxf3Aad5pBjBWT4k?)
---
[No](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.wx-nV_l1XHrsPl_3J5I4IpUb02McAIhYUXmjC7ok4zU?)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
### Issue #3: Environmental Impact
Consider two alternatives: (1) drilling for oil in a sparsely populated area of Texas, subject to the rules and regulations imposed by permit-issuing bureaucrats who care about the possible impact the project may have on the environment; or (2) [drilling in the Okavango delta region of Botswana, one of the last remaining wildlife refuges in the world in which nature has been preserved the environment protected](https://substack.com/redirect/ef7bdc8f-4df4-4de3-bb8d-b6ee4d497524?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Which do you think might have a greater impact on the planet?
Or how do you think drilling fluids, coincident methane gas, or other environmental toxins from energy production are treated in the developing world, compared to how they are treated in the United States? For better or worse, producing a barrel or oil or a cubic foot of natural gas in America is better for the environment than producing a similar volume of the same resource in a developing country that doesn't have environmental regulations. What this means, simply, is that if you want to protect the environment, you want to increase production in America and reduce it in less regulated regimes.
It's also important to think about the [environmental footprint of extracting hydrocarbons](https://substack.com/redirect/6352a7a7-e332-4da5-b8ba-4abb1edd415f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Turns out, in addition to inappropriately handling energy production byproducts and externalities, many of the nations from which America is currently importing crude oil have significantly higher environmental costs associated with their production than those of US production.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..eY4OsFQA4v3VhyDoO6SM6-uKMltSd5_6VTP6kTHPi0E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=137971836)
### SO WHAT?
Is it possible that increasing US fossil fuel production will actually lower carbon emissions or help the environment? Given the world will continue to consume hydrocarbons for the indefinite future, wouldn't it make sense to replace production that doesn't care about the environment with production that does? **As counterintuitive as its seems, one of the most promising strategies to protect the environment may be to increase US oil and gas production as rapidly as possible to displace production from emerging economies that don 't really care about the environment.**
One of my major issues during [my campaign for the US Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/683868a0-ebbd-4a77-a8d9-48633dee3e62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was about how US energy policy imposed **certain costs** on the American people while generating, at best, **uncertain benefits** for the environment. We chose to do this while China had chosen a strategy that produced **certain benefits** for the Chinese people (via reliable, cheap hydrocarbon-based energy) and **uncertain costs** for the environment. Let's not forget that [China is deploying 2 new coal-fired power plants each week](https://substack.com/redirect/34b5673b-7362-44fc-b9a4-2b155b10a0f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and is not subject to any carbon emission restrictions before 2030. Net net, the environment is not necessarily better when American restricts is use of reliable hydrocarbon energy.
Last poll:
| | POLL
---
Would an increase in US hydrocarbon production be a net positive for the global environment?
| [Yes](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.-zmzarwF2FnlTPanMcMNH2lL0f4Cx2aJH5-bteSDQd4?)
---
[No](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.BRdpcAuB42bmo5EDkUMtzVdlcWuggoV0_4C3_Aq1suA?)
[Unclear](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.uNZl5Amv2RiHQShR3kU2AScuwo8aK30VVPAYgeLCdSw?)
As I often state, we simply cannot know what the future holds for our families, businesses, or careers. The best we can do is to consider alternatives and to think through possible ramifications before events transpire, a process that will better equip each of us to deal with the uncertainty that is sure to characterize the future. And when I do that, it sure seems like American energy production offers an elusive trifecta of reducing geopolitical tensions, fighting inflation, and helping to save the environment.

Dear Friends,

Today, Monday, Oct. 16, is the last day to register for this year's election.

If you need to register or update your voter information, then please go to this link right away- [Virginia Voter Information - Citizen Portal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n4HDJqXwirCKbgtorYaih2iF6uluN2-oEMFtmOPm0VHGexr8s_c6tDU_ENUsa_P0VTep2zrroiEaN0RnqzrDsauEKQajOSwE8XM-Vh_uIyUBQhDDrksg3jH-M-JXT6FBO7PG35qFnKbZrqJLJ6eaU12Oj6eLxVO6ccFyoWo9q8wvAjMt5W8y2A==&c=KGmrhOyjyeepZxquZ8uDA0Hlz4Hq4nge8C6EHv4wkPQAloZW-NsdPA==&ch=a94J7JHcddkRVDnqWvksq0GmOSqXmH1lUagrYkV5k3vgZ6NuhWDdDw==).

Nearly everyone on my email list is most likely a registered voter, but what about the rest of your family and friends? Are they registered? If you have new neighbors, are they registered?

Please share this right away with family and friends.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

body:
| | | Hi team, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I’m reaching out because even after multiple indictments and pushing our democracy to the brink, Donald Trump is _still_ statistically tied with Joe Biden in the polls!

We need to know that Democrats everywhere are prepared to stand against Donald Trump -- because it’s going to take _all of us_ to keep him from inflicting four more years of misery on the country.

**We’ve launched our Official 2024 Straw Poll to make sure our grassroots team is prepared to take on Donald Trump once again, but I just checked our records and didn't see your response --_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15883?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231016-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231016-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&akid=12249%2E9716520%2Emz7a1g)
**Who do you support for president in 2024?**
| | | [BIDEN](https://go.dscc.org/go/15883?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231016-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231016-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&akid=12249%2E9716520%2Emz7a1g)

Diana

subject: Rolling out the red carpet
body:
| | | Fellow American, I’ll start with the bad news: Col. Mike Waltz fell short of his end-of-quarter goal last month.

_And that was after Democrats put up MAJOR numbers in Florida._

But we have good news too: **we still have time to catch up.**

Fellow Conservative,

We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records.

Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser.

_**Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter.**_

Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign.

**Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. **

clean_body: The amount of cash my opponent has to spend this early in the race is astonishing. | | Fellow Conservative, We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records. Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser. Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter. Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign. Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. Fellow Conservative, the Senate majority runs through Montana. – anything – right now because we need to take back our country from the Democrats and career politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Jon Tester. For America’s Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: Another War!
body:
Another War! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c501de54e83/conforti-for-congress-8247612?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

As I return from an energy conference this week where we discussed resiliency of the Grid during immense electrification, I find the world in a much different state of affairs. We went from working towards peace in the Middle East with the alliance between Israel and Egypt, to now war.

The atrocities that are happening are unimaginable. My thoughts and prayers are with the many that have friends and family dealing with the terror there. Among the kidnapped and killed are many Americans. We are in dangerous times. We must fight against this evil and protect America's interests for stability in the Middle East.

At home, we are faced with a second proxy war.

With so much of American resources and funding going to fight foreign wars, we are weakened on our own shores. These wars take our eye off the ball of defending the American people. There is an increasing possibility of a terror attack here at home - especially with so many fighting age men from foreign adversaries coming through our open southern border.

We need a Congress that protects the American people. Sean Casten sides with AOC and other progressive radicals to support policies that threaten America's security. He is working against the American people, and it is time for him to go!

Help me get to Congress and push policies that are pro-American. Please consider making a contribution to my campaign so that I can go to WDC and defend our rights. No amount is too small.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=b71028650f&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Stay strong!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=601d42fcd5&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=7480de4e12&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=957e1fc973&e=25f4fa3311)!

name: VoteVets
subject: Please, endorse the VoteVets Mission.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We need you behind us to keep up this fight.
#
Derek,
Today marks 600 days since Putin’s unprovoked and illegal invasion of Ukraine. A ground war in Europe, with the fate of Ukraine and ultimately the rest of Europe hanging in the balance.
And in the Eastern Mediterranean, with tensions rising to levels we haven’t seen in a generation or more, two U.S. Naval Carrier Groups have been deployed.
In so many ways, this is the world Donald Trump and the GOP led us to. Authoritarianism, lies, and chaos on the rise, with democracy on the ropes.
That is why the work that VoteVets does is so important. Dispelling and combatting disinformation, defending our democracy, supporting Veterans and our National Security. And yes, making sure that in this critical time, the right officers fill the right seats by ending Tommy Tuberville’s irresponsible, dangerous, traitorous hold on senior Military promotions.
It is important for any organization to have the backing of good people who support its goals. For an organization like VoteVets, it is the only way that we can continue to operate successfully. We need you behind us to keep up this fight.
So today, we have a simple request: Please, endorse the VoteVets Mission.
**[Add your name to the thousands of others who stand with VoteVets. It may seem like a small act with so much happening in the world, but when you join the thousands of others who have already added their name it becomes a profound symbol of strength.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231016_vv_sign/?source=em231016-1-30?refcode2=17431.3013755.oAoEFb&akid=17431%2E3013755%2EoAoEFb)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231016_vv_sign/?source=em231016-1-30?refcode2=17431.3013755.oAoEFb&akid=17431%2E3013755%2EoAoEFb)
---
Thank you. We can’t do this work without you. Never could.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=17431%2E3013755%2EoAoEFb).

body:
| | |
Hello,
My name is Hanieh Jodat, and I have the honor of serving as Derek Marshall’s Campaign Manager.
I want to express my immense gratitude to you, our incredible supporters and community leaders, for your unwavering support and love during Derek’s previous campaign. You are the true champions, and our journey wouldn't have been the same without your dedication.
**Now, we have exciting news to share - a Virtual Volunteer Barnstorm event that promises to be informative!
****
[Derek Marshall for Congress Virtual Volunteer Barnstorm!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Sy9FyWzo9kqacbVzd5vG5d2sXsw8BwyDpfxXdrER67jWF7o19sAL2uulvLjM0JvMmifpx5MTuZ77-6GHHKFscbMOoSMqAIuokx1l4GxonQ095gaEmzooQTLAdWcOgbr51T2gbMkiBPY-pjDiK5Nc2dldhwgowsVzpoPJSsjji_O9IetQWEZZlb4UwakhbW9h8XSZWJLqzy-W7Ez6kvSLXetyj0PuzoA5OMBP-5GyUVkmcyqkmlajNRfTcI3V11D9eKDNX68wlDDYmtFNvasRM6FLez_LoYiaOF4fdRXuTQadlhyhhNC9S7fAayPAkeUPQGtDVvPjsFVA4tWwS9eFFYM/40h/7AInaXkiS8-DDz-t3K6Pbw/h0/tsR7HgUVgBI0KXEiYT0oPkJ-7iE4mNOfw9u87h7EppY)
**📅 Date: Tuesday, Oct 17, 2023
🕒 Time: 5:30 PM (PT) / 8:30 PM (ET)
**📍[Join us here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Sy9FyWzo9kqacbVzd5vG5d2sXsw8BwyDpfxXdrER67jWF7o19sAL2uulvLjM0JvMmifpx5MTuZ77-6GHHKFscbPmh4i1WaX78e-R7AjvyANLVut-qbbo4UZNozQlfHq7mM8Yco7aes66fCss4-VHL7u1beHN_JMyIVkiPZtISpn9Njo7Vf1rzoM5xVOjiyHOF7PNgW2np8TV6utfkjsfR5N1eYr4rrq9V5ipC4PfSs3FjE_wCX4zE6YCllEH2dmkE9lgoqbe7LN3gEDOWBH9MW97OeraUquuANUSDTTVGoDeQrU5SLUbh9aE8yl0g6vk7_Q3w_rd32CSbnSJzLiHeBo/40h/7AInaXkiS8-DDz-t3K6Pbw/h1/TQp1Skr5_pvKk99cuOBNzWYTke741ApZ-rxuQ5KUrsE)
**_
Can't make it?[Support our voter turnout and organizing work with a donation here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KPX_nDCWMLNVHMUVq0Gc-otdoiKtvjSsneUWjiPxpsvcaIXw_BviED1NfhedCniVJ6_bC-4BrGUToyh5MN5WqevLNd26uISIRWXos2znY_Mhb9WfWg3RpkBjMDfEwQRZQZorxGPai0Wg7AfrBjr6DAv3bWrBcP63TDgJp9T_Bw6zQRG6uXGWUYj69fBn-aaiOGyaCHGXaY-4eBlywFiNySY5M9vvKBy1VhSD4qKBtlp5-wEk1kDS_QW8G5DfUhP10JY7dnHATiNAFCQkiygij1IE8a4T_nm0VhNqcWt22_5gw/40h/7AInaXkiS8-DDz-t3K6Pbw/h2/-OqZfXVk1zdnIAOti67orQb3DYE7cOwNNu5a-kAeccc)_
During this event, you'll have the opportunity to hear from Derek himself about his vision and policies for CA 23 and other team members who will share our campaign strategy. We have some surprise guest speakers lined up, and their names will be revealed closer to the event.
This Virtual Volunteer Barnstorm is not just an event; it's a celebration of our shared passion, unity, and lots of fun! We'll discuss our plans to turn CA 23 from red to blue and how you can play a pivotal role in this journey.
So, save the date, spread the word, and invite your friends and family to join us in bringing the community together.
**Let's make this campaign cycle even more unforgettable than the last. Your support is our superpower, and together, we're an unstoppable force for positive change!**
****[**Mark your calendars for Tuesday, October 17, at 5:30 PM (PT) / 8:30 PM (ET) with a big smile, and let's get ready to party with purpose!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Sy9FyWzo9kqacbVzd5vG5d2sXsw8BwyDpfxXdrER67jWF7o19sAL2uulvLjM0JvMmifpx5MTuZ77-6GHHKFscbOlAWxF0ojLaLYPMKSi3I-Hi4RdbHWAMYisSq6Wgc4nTT5McGCkakUjDVk6UxPFmmiU-ERCQDVCtt--FITw_I-T5vla5YKfKODumH4vUL8DQ_AmOiPa_DWOGAUbBMa2mFPiptI0EoQeAV7hsoDyxIFM1bs274YXC3GYZNBWjOyWErbRDDSM-Mu2hG_ORddY3xvDtN5P9RVlsIaD7YovHp3Eb7cpZevCSPWoA0rxGAcCVednRmoCz054OV9DOu4VpdU/40h/7AInaXkiS8-DDz-t3K6Pbw/h3/p9FSSF4ozi1CiIYv497LqW3-hUrJ6Fl8HYmWwfv9A9g)

I want to express my immense gratitude to you, our incredible supporters and community leaders, for your unwavering support and love during Derek’s previous campaign. You are the true champions, and our journey wouldn't have been the same without your dedication. Now, we have exciting news to share - a Virtual Volunteer Barnstorm event that promises to be informative! 📅 Date: Tuesday, Oct 17, 2023 🕒 Time: 5:30 PM (PT) / 8:30 PM (ET) 📍 Can't make it? During this event, you'll have the opportunity to hear from Derek himself about his vision and policies for CA 23 and other team members who will share our campaign strategy. We have some surprise guest speakers lined up, and their names will be revealed closer to the event. This Virtual Volunteer Barnstorm is not just an event; it's a celebration of our shared passion, unity, and lots of fun! We'll discuss our plans to turn CA 23 from red to blue and how you can play a pivotal role in this journey. So, save the date, spread the word, and invite your friends and family to join us in bringing the community together. Let's make this campaign cycle even more unforgettable than the last. body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hi Peter,
Today is the last day to register to vote before the November 7th election! There’s a lot on the line this November, and it is up to us to vote for affordable medication, accessible child care, fully funding public education, and more by electing economic freedom champions.
Whether you choose to vote by mail, early in-person, or on election day your vote matters, so get out and vote! You can register to vote or check the status of your registration here. [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/registration/]
Here are more important upcoming dates prior to the election:
October 27th:
Deadline to apply for a ballot to be mailed to you.
Apply here [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/casting-a-ballot/early-absentee/]
October 28th:
Voter registration offices will be OPEN on Saturday for early voting
November 4th:
Last day of in-person early voting
November 7th:
Election day! Polls will be open from 6am to 7pm.
We look forward to seeing you at the polls!
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

name: Poll Alert [via Team Haley]
subject: Breaking: Nikki defeats Biden in latest poll
body:
Everything you need to know about Nikki’s surging poll numbers

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING: NIKKI DEFEATS BIDEN **
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24294%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h9reSkydX8uLc%2f9a21P1ZQ&sysid=1)
---

Fox News just released a poll showing Nikki as the ONLY CANDIDATE decisively defeating Biden in a head-to-head match up.

That’s not all.

She’s second in New Hampshire and South Carolina, she’s gaining ground in polls across the country, and her team of grassroots supporters is expanding in droves.

---
| | [KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24205%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qS%2boMotxoWLYbIQ1%2fVP4sw&sysid=1)
---

Nikki is the one who will win and get our country back on track, but now we need YOUR help.

**[Will you rush in a donation right away to help Nikki fuel her campaign so we can amplify this message across America and WIN?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24206%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8tPLuhzG%2f2GXvGV2g17aUQ&sysid=1 "Will you rush in a
donation right away to help Nikki fuel her campaign so we can amplify this message
across America and WIN? ")**

_**With just 23 days until the third debate ...

With just 91 days until the first votes are cast...**_

Keeping this surge of momentum going has never been more important.

**[Will you rush your support for Nikki NOW?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24207%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eZN4nf22bIE4RatX7ZXvUQ&sysid=1 "Will you rush your support
for Nikki NOW?") **

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24208%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sZ1mU9MbvsECUgjeaUhzuA&sysid=1)
---

Thank you for your support!

-Team Haley

---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24209%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qQnUcamvv8Kphzdf%2fKf9jQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24200%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9jsjaHN45sCWcdfRO6ZWvw&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24201%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jIFSJFVL8gLUGCYqPZTxpA&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24202%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5PloEu7IZm0b3r0KpOPq6Q&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and

clean_body: Everything you need to know about Nikki’s surging poll numbers | | | | | BREAKING: NIKKI DEFEATS BIDEN | Fox News just released a poll showing Nikki as the ONLY CANDIDATE decisively defeating Biden in a head-to-head match up. That’s not all. She’s second in New Hampshire and South Carolina, she’s gaining ground in polls across the country, and her team of grassroots supporters is expanding in droves. | | Nikki is the one who will win and get our country back on track, but now we need YOUR help. "Will you rush in a donation right away to help Nikki fuel her campaign so we can amplify this message across America and WIN? " With just 23 days until the third debate ... With just 91 days until the first votes are cast... Keeping this surge of momentum going has never been more important. "Will you rush your support for Nikki NOW?" | | Thank you for your support! -Team Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: What it’ll take
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7c23f347ea5f7c2fd433c06f92ef7c6774e39241c77608cbf9b4925cea63c9cb779fadd4b6993d0661f112638c55adca0e44313d795f7740b1e2a237550bfb8e2b58edcce0e35e76bd0a1764a36f7356

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f5d61a25628c53db5a9a6cf04e29a5087e1b9b29a9aff09a43b47c693fce2de6b4d92f4620fa505d1e7fdf47a2f388d9ad56dbcab059a56984

Hey Friend, it’s Ron DeSantis with a quick info guide on the best way you can support our mission. I am campaigning at a pace impossible for our opponents to keep up with. We have chosen to take the opposite approach of Joe Biden and Donald Trump; you don’t win elections and earn support of Americans by hiding away in your basement and feeling entitled to anything. Answer me this: How do they expect to get our country working again for the American people if they spend 0 time with the ones who will be impacted most by their decisions? I haven’t governed in Florida by hiding out, and I would never run things like this as President either.

I’m out on the trail meeting inspiring Americans every day, and I want to host even MORE town halls and campaign events, order even more yard signs and merchandise to give out, and travel around, making as many appearances as possible to spread our message.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f5d61a25628c53db5a9a6cf04e29a5087e1b9b29a9aff09a43b47c693fce2de6b4d92f4620fa505d1e7fdf47a2f388d9ad56dbcab059a56984
Donate Here

The greatest impact you could make on this team would be volunteering to donate any amount once—and then checking the box that asks you to make that donation a monthly occurrence. While this may seem like a small act, one monthly donation, from everyone that supports this mission, would give us every resource necessary (and then some) to blaze forward and defeat the Left next November. The monthly donation that hits every 30 days gives our team the extra boost we need to hit our goals and stay ahead—every time, it allows our financial team to budget our upcoming events based on the revenue we know we have supporting our ideas and plans, and it’s a constant reminder to everyone else in this race that our team is willing to put everything we can into winning and month
after month, we refuse to back down.

Without your monthly contribution, though, we run the risk of playing catch up to the deep pockets of the incumbent candidates in this race, and we risk slowing down when we are just beginning the most intense ramp up of our strategy yet. I can’t let us fall behind without reaching out to ask for your help.

It’s critical that we win this race next year, and we only have so many months to close in. Will you consider supporting the foundation of my campaign?

If you can, we’ve checked the monthly donor box for you here:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f50641085c185845d8d7cd53b33d806968471350a4c20ea0d35c3f5b4a8710de90c8f8d629d44cf5a18b1098286a4bfd1721de2ca709638876
Be the foundation of my campaign

I know what it’s going to take to win, and I’m excited to put in the work to earn your support. I’ll need you to help me go the distance because I won’t slow down, and I will never back down.

Thanks for all you do,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f5d61a25628c53db5a9a6cf04e29a5087e1b9b29a9aff09a43b47c693fce2de6b4d92f4620fa505d1e7fdf47a2f388d9ad56dbcab059a56984

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f57bc6841301eaa54a6d0acbab32b0d9be6ff459a2e52700e9ae776b0fa7b7d746ca9db80197bcdc4ea84052387cd032efd98374f7d890297c

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f50b2962ac700ee67aa1325eff257e9edc34fd02bbc3a914de4d89b7af5dd4a0aee8e736993322b52eead50ed5b20fefcf34b48b5d13ab4778
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f53ff7175663a99046a040aa544f7f31cb83f3c9848ab319a35555ebebc4d296990c3b6ff076d8272fd5ea334eb9b1cf6af1fdf712ceba5372
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f5d61a25628c53db5a9a6cf04e29a5087e1b9b29a9aff09a43b47c693fce2de6b4d92f4620fa505d1e7fdf47a2f388d9ad56dbcab059a56984

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fe21cf8befb6b0f5d61a25628c53db5a9a6cf04e29a5087e1b9b29a9aff09a43b47c693fce2de6b4d92f4620fa505d1e7fdf47a2f388d9ad56dbcab059a56984

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
