clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Hey Friend, it’s Ron DeSantis with a quick info guide on the best way you can support our mission. I am campaigning at a pace impossible for our opponents to keep up with. We have chosen to take the opposite approach of Joe Biden and Donald Trump; you don’t win elections and earn support of Americans by hiding away in your basement and feeling entitled to anything. Answer me this: How do they expect to get our country working again for the American people if they spend 0 time with the ones who will be impacted most by their decisions? I haven’t governed in Florida by hiding out, and I would never run things like this as President either. I’m out on the trail meeting inspiring Americans every day, and I want to host even MORE town halls and campaign events, order even more yard signs and merchandise to give out, and travel around, making as many appearances as possible to spread our message. Donate Here The greatest impact you could make on this team would be volunteering to donate any amount once—and then checking the box that asks you to make that donation a monthly occurrence. While this may seem like a small act, one monthly donation, from everyone that supports this mission, would give us every resource necessary (and then some) to blaze forward and defeat the Left next November. The monthly donation that hits every 30 days gives our team the extra boost we need to hit our goals and stay ahead—every time, it allows our financial team to budget our upcoming events based on the revenue we know we have supporting our ideas and plans, and it’s a constant reminder to everyone else in this race that our team is willing to put everything we can into winning and month after month, we refuse to back down. Without your monthly contribution, though, we run the risk of playing catch up to the deep pockets of the incumbent candidates in this race, and we risk slowing down when we are just beginning the most intense ramp up of our strategy yet. I can’t let us fall behind without reaching out to ask for your help. It’s critical that we win this race next year, and we only have so many months to close in. Will you consider supporting the foundation of my campaign? If you can, we’ve checked the monthly donor box for you here: Be the foundation of my campaign I know what it’s going to take to win, and I’m excited to put in the work to earn your support. I’ll need you to help me go the distance because I won’t slow down, and I will never back down. Thanks for all you do, Ron DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. I want to get it all out before a possible gag order is imposed TODAY.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=b94580eb742b45879bdfb5331b2f0cd5&_e=O5naAy8UJiZdXLGCJglrxucvqPO5NOTAF-xG3Fqg6i2OviF5fAM9srfAO15Cg5fhjfpN1jqdlpG7dIkfEm8RaF9DUkalitYJ2tV3qCxupxHCBju0kYdLArewKuxnx6qsbrC-YFEEuu13R7VMxjRS2g03zX6rkudEIapZJo_DFSlh_GbW8K7bqmJb2ebyO_QSZlxqASx8TeRH3wfQ3TCJPBsegPtk74diMW3p7NbScMkrVwQpeIJYgX78g44tqava3ZGXdB4Rx9Tv-utjL3wDIIZM5MpzqaUy7iL7P_BaQi4qwhoh-FjyOaGZWMoXhsl-yi5amAAJQY9UzyroQPv6qafw_oS3ByKQf1JhO9GTxQIQks4iffBofoKfNE41DrA05r-k_sEjSFHfix31IKS9dt-j0xPZk-d-GbIYi8vYyjtg4eH7hueUcUYFU6MFQvKa4DTy6bhIa0eM4x0Mr9kvrrvZXq1oijEvbnTozmREoyl3RGioTtlUgrpf8GpN_qK2)
---
| | Patriot,

---
Today, a hearing is taking place in our nation’s capital to decide whether or not Joe Biden can get away with imposing a GAG ORDER on his leading opponent – me.
---
Because I may be prohibited from speaking out against his corruption as of later today, I want to say all I can right now in this final email to you before the hearing.
---
Patriot, I have a lot to say, but it all comes from the heart.

---
Today really isn’t about gagging _me_ ...
---
** _...It’s an attempt to gag the American people._**
---
Allow me to explain...

---
For years and years, hardworking and honest citizens have cried out for help from their elected officials – only to be ignored and silenced by the Washington Swamp.
---
Americans watched their rights get trampled on, they watched their jobs get shipped overseas, they watched our border get overrun with illegal aliens, they saw billions of our taxpayer dollars sent to faraway nations while our own roads and towns crumbled to pieces.

---
But that all changed on June 16, 2015 when I announced my candidacy as a political outsider and vowed to give a VOICE to these forgotten Americans.

---
_I became a megaphone for the American people._

---
**Suddenly, the Silent Majority was HEARD all across the world – and no matter how much the establishment wanted to turn me off, they** _**couldn’t**_**.**

---
Our America First message was on every channel. It took over the Internet. Our gatherings turned into massive rallies and began filling up football stadiums. There wasn’t a soul on the planet that didn’t know the demands of the Silent Majority.

---
I _FORCED_ the Swamp to finally listen to the concerns of the American people that they had ignored for decades.

---
They’ve even gone to extraordinary lengths to try and shut us down. They raided my home, spied on me, intimidated my associates and family, wrongfully indicted and arrested me, made a mugshot of me, and even tried to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me.

---
Despite all of these vile attempts to break us, our movement has only gotten stronger.

---
But now, they’ve decided to try and __FORCIBLY__ SILENCE me – and, by extension, our movement – by imposing a court-sanctioned gag order upon me.

---
**Today, I will not be attending the hearing. I refuse to dignify this attempt to STRIP ME of my First Amendment rights.**

---
**Instead, I will be on the campaign trail in Iowa with the people to whom I have proudly given a voice ever since I rode down the Golden Escalator on June 16, 2015.**

---
Now, after years of being _your_ voice, I am asking _YOU_ to be a voice for America and prove that NOTHING can silence the greatest movement in American history.

---
_Of course, if you’re doing poorly due to the tyrannical administration that would rather gag its leading opponent than lift a finger to help our hurting citizens, then just hit the back button and go about your day._

---
**[Before the gag order hearing, please make a contribution of any amount – truly any amount – to prove that the American people will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to put America First and to save our country from tyranny.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=b94580eb742b45879bdfb5331b2f0cd5&_e=O5naAy8UJiZdXLGCJglrxucvqPO5NOTAF-xG3Fqg6i2OviF5fAM9srfAO15Cg5fhjfpN1jqdlpG7dIkfEm8RaF9DUkalitYJ2tV3qCxupxHCBju0kYdLArewKuxnx6qsbrC-YFEEuu13R7VMxjRS2g03zX6rkudEIapZJo_DFSlh_GbW8K7bqmJb2ebyO_QSZlxqASx8TeRH3wfQ3TCJPBsegPtk74diMW3p7NbScMkrVwQpeIJYgX78g44tqava3ZGXdB4Rx9Tv-utjL3wDIIZM5MpzqaUy7iL7P_BaQi4qwhoh-FjyOaGZWMoXhsl-yi5amAAJQY9UzyroQPv6qY_HbscQkGeFraGJpvwlmNO8MCbQRc8PsOEma7Q1Q5rQVoFCilXqfPkvKk9T2a3_MV4EncNHjiN4V2jZHKaGZIBg5BcEt8ockHpoQjcBMxItv6U0XpHt2BWGGK5wlAVI2FhqrzT0rag0PHv-9pSsfwxo26hwcotSdKJfUoQYLpet)**

clean_body: I want to get it all out before a possible gag order is imposed TODAY.| | | | | Patriot, Today, a hearing is taking place in our nation’s capital to decide whether or not Joe Biden can get away with imposing a GAG ORDER on his leading opponent – me. Because I may be prohibited from speaking out against his corruption as of later today, I want to say all I can right now in this final email to you before the hearing. Patriot, I have a lot to say, but it all comes from the heart. Today really isn’t about gagging me ... ...It’s an attempt to gag the American people. Allow me to explain... For years and years, hardworking and honest citizens have cried out for help from their elected officials – only to be ignored and silenced by the Washington Swamp. Americans watched their rights get trampled on, they watched their jobs get shipped overseas, they watched our border get overrun with illegal aliens, they saw billions of our taxpayer dollars sent to faraway nations while our own roads and towns crumbled to pieces. But that all changed on June 16, 2015 when I announced my candidacy as a political outsider and vowed to give a VOICE to these forgotten Americans. I became a megaphone for the American people. Suddenly, the Silent Majority was HEARD all across the world – and no matter how much the establishment wanted to turn me off, they couldn’t. Our America First message was on every channel. It took over the Internet. Our gatherings turned into massive rallies and began filling up football stadiums. There wasn’t a soul on the planet that didn’t know the demands of the Silent Majority. I FORCED the Swamp to finally listen to the concerns of the American people that they had ignored for decades. They’ve even gone to extraordinary lengths to try and shut us down. They raided my home, spied on me, intimidated my associates and family, wrongfully indicted and arrested me, made a mugshot of me, and even tried to impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me. Despite all of these vile attempts to break us, our movement has only gotten stronger. But now, they’ve decided to try and FORCIBLY SILENCE me – and, by extension, our movement – by imposing a court-sanctioned gag order upon me. Today, I will not be attending the hearing. I refuse to dignify this attempt to STRIP ME of my First Amendment rights. Instead, I will be on the campaign trail in Iowa with the people to whom I have proudly given a voice ever since I rode down the Golden Escalator on June 16, 2015. Now, after years of being your voice, I am asking YOU to be a voice for America and prove that NOTHING can silence the greatest movement in American history. Of course, if you’re doing poorly due to the tyrannical administration that would rather gag its leading opponent than lift a finger to help our hurting citizens, then just hit the back button and go about your day. | | - Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

**URGENT/ URGENT/URGENT URGENT/ URGENT/URGENT**
**Re: FREEDOM WATCH SEEKS REMOVAL OF BIDEN WHILE REPUBLICANS WON'T NOW THAT HE'S WARTIME PRESIDENT!**
Dear Fellow Patriot:
**Joe Biden must be legally removed as so-called president now!**
We have, just in the last few days, witnessed just how worthless, braindead and criminal he is! After Hamas’ attack on Israel, it took White House staff over 5 hours to even get him out of bed during a crisis.
The risk of leaving Biden in office has thus become even more evident and urgent with the massacre of thousands and counting including women and children by Hamas in Israel, which is the direct result of Biden’s appeasement of Iran, the mastermind behind this horrific Holocaust-like event, where even the heads of babies were chopped off by these less than human barbarians.
Having been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, for which your Freedom Watch has convicted and sentenced Biden through a citizens grand jury and citizens court to 20 years in prison, as well as for his negligent homicide in Afghanistan, we have now called upon law enforcement to have him arrested! **To the contrary, the Republicans in Congress have just been playing political games, while appearing on Fox News to raise more money.**
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=e229181625&e=8edd2b8f7d)
**As just one example, the Republicans just complain about our open border, which is allowing terrorists to run across now threatening our nation, particularly now that there is war in the Middle East. The risk to our citizens is now acute and dangerous!**
**THERE IS THE RISK OF ANOTHER 9/11 AND EVEN WORSE!**
Ask yourself this fellow patriot: why have the Republicans not impeached Biden or sought other means to get rid of him? They could, themselves, send the Capitol Police to arrest him for his crimes, as the right of citizens arrest exists in the District of Columbia when there is probable cause that a felony crime is being or has been committed.
But the Republicans want to leave him in office to have a weak, braindead and criminal moron to run against in 2024. Their own political interests trump We the People’s interests to a safe and secure country!
Biden has not just been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, he has undoubtedly been bribed in one manner shape or form by Iran.
It is time to remove him legally and peacefully before this nation experiences what Israel has just experienced, but even worse!
[**Please donate to Freedom Watch with tax deductible contributions to support having Biden legally incarcerated and removed NOW before it is too late.**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=2c0a2d7183&e=8edd2b8f7d)
Please listen to the embedded podcast of today about removing Biden and provide your generous support and prayers that this braindead criminal will be peacefully and legally removed from power before the same fate that Israeli citizens have experienced happens to your loves ones by leaving this dishonest and corrupt bribed loser in power to rule over this nation and the world.
**If you care about your children, grandchildren and loved ones and do not want to see them suffer the same fate at what just happened in Israel, please step up to the plate and support your Freedom Watch, the People’s Justice Department!**
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=9b0c9702d9&e=8edd2b8f7d) Yours in Freedom and Liberty, Larry Klayman, Esq.Chairman and General Counsel Freedom Watch, Inc.[www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=423d22e77d&e=8edd2b8f7d)[leklayman@gmail.com](mailto:leklayman@gmail.com) OR asher.andersonfw@gmail.com**P.S. TIME IS SHORT. PLEASE SUPPORT FREEDOM WATCH, INC.** [**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=ecd59d544f&e=8edd2b8f7d)

To get America back on track.

OFFICIAL HOUSE SPEAKER SURVEY

DO YOU THINK THE NEXT SPEAKER OF THE HOUSE SHOULD
PRIORITIZE BORDER SECURITY?

⭕️ YES

⭕️ NO

TAKE THE SURVEY NOW >>

Friend,

Imagine each Speaker of the House Candidate pitching you
on why they should be the next Speaker. Who wins you over? And
what should they focus on? Israel? The Border? The Debt?

Ahead of the critically important vote to decide the next
Republican Speaker of the House, we want to hear how YOU think
the People's House should be run.

The next Republican Speaker of the House is responsible
for stopping Joe Biden and radical congressional Democrats from
forcing their socialist agenda on the America people.

It won't be easy, Friend, but with your input, our Party
will be in a strong position to elect the best candidate for the
job.

Please complete the Official House Speaker Survey in the

responses. >>
Thank you,

RNC HQ

| [Register to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71656468/432832260/123942394?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTczMDY2ZC0zOTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awPsBx2aR5pnk3S7yUGqz5c0ENle3XDvrCExCEmM0Vg=&emci=3099c6d0-6368-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0573066d-396c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend, Pennsylvania’s voter registration deadline is on October 23 — just one week away!
That means there’s just one week left to make your plan to vote in November. And with so much riding on the outcome of Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court election, there’s no better time than right now to register to vote and make sure you’re able to cast your vote.
**[There’s just one week left. Register to vote today and make your voice heard.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71656469/432832261/-1798371907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTczMDY2ZC0zOTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awPsBx2aR5pnk3S7yUGqz5c0ENle3XDvrCExCEmM0Vg=&emci=3099c6d0-6368-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0573066d-396c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)**
We’re not exaggerating when we say the outcome of Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court election could change everything. Republicans are doing everything they can to close in on our pro-choice majority on the Court. We need to bring some major energy to the polls to keep that from happening. **And that starts with making sure you’re registered to vote! **
When the youth vote shows up, we make a difference. So we’re calling on you, friend, to help us make a difference. **Register to vote today before time runs out.**
[Register to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71656470/432832262/930511448?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTczMDY2ZC0zOTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=awPsBx2aR5pnk3S7yUGqz5c0ENle3XDvrCExCEmM0Vg=&emci=3099c6d0-6368-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0573066d-396c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")
---
Let’s do this,
NextGen Pennsylvania

name: Team Kaiman
subject: Countdown to Victory Fundraising Rally: November 2nd
body:
Countdown to Victory
Dear Peter,
You are cordially invited to join the North Hempstead Democratic team for our Countdown to Victory fundraising rally on November 2nd.
Please click here to register today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/demswin2023]
With only 22 days until election day, we need your help to get out the vote and win!
Thank you for all your hard work and continued support. We look forward to seeing you in Great Neck on November 2nd.
Regards,
Team Kaiman
Click here to join us [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/demswin2023]

Date: Thursday, November 2nd
Time: 7:00 PM
Location: The Inn at Great Neck; 30 Cutter Mill Road, Great Neck

clean_body: The amount of cash my opponent has to spend this early in the race is astonishing. | | Fellow Conservative, We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records. Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser. Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter. Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign. Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. Fellow Conservative, the Senate majority runs through Montana. – anything – right now because we need to take back our country from the Democrats and career politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Jon Tester. Hi, Peter -- it’s Gretchen Whitmer. As governor of Michigan, I’ve had a front row seat to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s work to grow the economy from the middle out and bottom up, not top down. With the help of this team, we’ve rebuilt the economy and added nearly 14 million jobs, lowered costs for working families, and passed historic legislation like the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_ and the _Inflation Reduction Act._ Michiganders and folks all across the country are feeling the benefits -- and Peter, I know we’re just getting started. **But in order to keep building on the progress we’ve made, Joe and Kamala need your help today.** [**Can I count on you to pitch in $25 today so they can continue championing our families and communities for years to come? clean_body: Together, we can keep building a brighter future where every person can succeed. | | | Hi, Peter -- it’s Gretchen Whitmer. As governor of Michigan, I’ve had a front row seat to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s work to grow the economy from the middle out and bottom up, not top down. With the help of this team, we’ve rebuilt the economy and added nearly 14 million jobs, lowered costs for working families, and passed historic legislation like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the Inflation Reduction Act. Michiganders and folks all across the country are feeling the benefits -- and Peter, I know we’re just getting started. But in order to keep building on the progress we’ve made, Joe and Kamala need your help today. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The work that Joe and Kamala are doing is crucial to ensuring that our businesses, families, and communities will be able to thrive long into the future. That sustained progress will only be possible with support from folks like you, Peter. So I’m asking: Thank you, Gretchen Gretchen Whitmer Governor, Michigan

name: Jasmine Smith, via Team Emerge
subject: did you see our message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Peter, **we fell short** of our crucial mid-month goal. With so many of our rights at stake and elections coming up just next month, we can’t afford to miss these deadlines.
---
**So, we're extending our deadline – but only by one day – to give you the chance to activate your 2023 membership.**
At Emerge, there are no off-years in our fight to transform politics, and we need your help to empower Democratic women to lead this year and in 2024. So please, before our extended mid-month deadline: **Will you donate $10 or more to activate your Emerge 2023 membership right now?**
**Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Emerge2023](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71657131/432834903/-1657939538?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNDUyYmE2LTNiNmMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uhGsM4jKMx6pyWx9D_JHnTczifyDSD6HNmfakogjp7k=)**
Thank you for fueling this crucial fight,
Jasmine Smith
Development Manager,
Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Emerge**
Date: Sat, Oct 14, 2023
Subject: [Membership Update] Your Emerge Strategy Brief
| | |
---
Peter, Emerge is working day-in and day-out to help Democratic women change the face of politics. **[In just a minute, I’m going to ask for your help so we can meet our crucial mid-month deadline and continue this crucial work.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71657132/432834904/-1657939538?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&refcode=jtk1327-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNDUyYmE2LTNiNmMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uhGsM4jKMx6pyWx9D_JHnTczifyDSD6HNmfakogjp7k=) But first, let me tell you about our progress so far: **
**45 states and territories.** Our recruitment and training programs have empowered bold Democratic women to run for office, win elections, and blaze new trails in politics across _45 states and U.S. territories.__ _

**71 percent.** That’s how many Emerge women WON crucial elections in 2022, from school boards to Congress! In a year when polls and pundits told Democrats to expect defeat, **Emerge women played a major role in stopping the red wave, building new Democratic trifectas, and flipping critical seats blu****e.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: Initiative 2113
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Restoring reasonable police pursuit for law enforcement is a common-sense approach that all voters can get behind. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fcaba9d711&e=6a281f566d)
---
| Dear Peter,

Thanks for taking the time to watch our latest YouTube video below and to read our release on the WAGOP's policy plan to **Fight Crime** in Washington.

One thing I want to make sure to highlight in our **Plan to Fight Crime** is** Initiative 2113 - Reasonable Police Pursuit**. By allowing police to pursue criminals, I-2113 can help fix a broken system handcuffing our law enforcement. It’s common-sense policy: **If someone commits a crime, police should be able to pursue** and make an arrest**.** This is a policy that **all voters can unite behind** , because people care about restoring safe neighborhoods and protecting their families. It’s that simple.

I-2113 is one of six initiatives being sponsored by** _Let's Go Washington._** Each initiative needs to reach **400,000 signatures by the end of 2023 **in order to proceed. Use the link below to find a location where you can **sign all six****initiatives****...if you haven't already!**

If the initiatives qualify, they will proceed to the state legislature for consideration. If the Democrat-majority in Olympia refuses to pass these policies into law, **they will go to the November 2024 ballot** to be approved by the voters. In that case, we will use the Democrats’ lack of action to get more Republicans elected to the legislature in Olympia.

The **WAGOP is proud to have already endorsed all six initiatives** earlier this year. These six policies are common-sense approaches that protect the safety and pocketbooks of WA citizens. **Listed below are all of the initiatives:**
**_For more information on the initiatives and how to sign them visit: [letsgowashington.com](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=54adcc9f39&e=6a281f566d)_**
**Public Safety**
1-2113 - Reasonable Police Pursuit

**Cost of Living**
I-2117 - Stop the hidden gas tax
I-2124 - Opt out of state-run long term care coverage tax
I-2109 - Repeal the capital gains tax
I-2111 - No state income tax

**Parental Rights**
I-2081 - Parental Notification

These initiatives are a common-sense approach to fixing what's broken in our state. Thank you for your support to get them qualified in the next two months. And thank you for your support of the **WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime**.

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| |
---
| From: Chairman Jim Walsh <jim@wsrp.org>
Date: Thursday, Oct. 12
Time: 9:15 AM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| Following the successful launch of the WAGOP Plan to Save Basic Education, we are excited to share with you the release of our next policy plan.

**WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime** Below is a video from Chairman Walsh highlighting the key principles of our plan to fight crime. Our full written release of the plan is copied below.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cbb4c6729b&e=6a281f566d)
---
WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh's weekly video (10/11/2023)
Highlighting WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime
| **WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime**
WAGOP HQ - This week, Chairman Jim Walsh unveiled Republicans’ plan to fight crime in Washington. “The citizens of Washington state should always feel safe in their homes, their communities, and at work,” said Chairman Walsh. “Olympia and D.C. have failed the people of Washington on public safety.”

The WAGOP principles to fighting crime in Washington State:
* Protect Citizens
* Get Back to Prosecuting Criminals
* Support Practical Rehabilitation
* Champion Law Enforcement
* Restore Safe Neighborhoods

The top priority of government is to protect its citizens. From Seattle to Spokane, Washington citizens are less safe in their communities, at work, and even at home. The headlines on violent crime in our state have become part of our daily lives. Here are some of the facts.
* According to a report from Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), murders in Washington increased by 96% between 2019 and 2022.
* Washington has the fewest police officers and deputies per capita of any state in the country.
* Washington is ranked third highest for total car thefts—and that number is rising.
* Between 2015 and 2021, rape increased by 51%—and that number is also rising.

The data points go on and on and on....

“Soft on crime” and “defunding the police” rhetoric and policies promoted by Democrat lawmakers and liberal judges are to blame. Our criminal justice system is empowering criminals, not protecting citizens.

As Republican state legislator Rep. Dan Griffey stated recently: “People that would do harm to society know the rules now, and they’re playing by it.”

In Olympia, GOP lawmakers were able to help restore some measure of common sense by making fixes to recent anti-cop and drug-possession laws. They are committed to protecting WA citizens and fighting crime to make our neighborhoods safe again. But there’s more work to do.

WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime includes the following policy proposals:
* **Hire more law enforcement officers** —not community safety officers, not social workers. And provide those officers ample support. The anti-police rhetoric needs to stop. According to _War on Cops_ author [Heather Mac Donald](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2045293deb&e=6a281f566d), there is **_no_** epidemic of fatal police shootings against unarmed Americans. And yet, that’s all we hear from the media and Democrat politicians.
* **Allow police officers to pursue criminals and defend themselves**. WAGOP has endorsed [I-2113](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b045d67437&e=6a281f566d), which would allow reasonable vehicular police pursuits. Having more police officers establishes a visible community presence to create positive relationships. This prevents crimes from occurring.
* **Celebrate law enforcement professionals** , don’t denigrate them. For the past several legislative terms, Democrats in Olympia and D.C. have disparaged sheriff’s deputies and police. This affects how the media—and even some impressionable young people—treat law enforcement officers. And it isn’t good. We need to restore positive interactions between the public and police.
* **Get back to prosecuting criminals.** We need to fix our criminal justice system. Too many local prosecutors have become politicians first. Their focus needs to be on protecting their communities. We cannot afford criminals roaming free in our streets creating more crime and chaos. We need to prosecute crime and get criminals off the street.
* **Enforce strong bail** **and parole processes.** When felons are released without bail and/or strong parole accountability, they quickly re-offend. It is critical to call out bail funds, like [Northwest Community Bail Fund](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5e1c83e36c&e=6a281f566d). Michael Sendejo, 51, was found guilty by a jury in a King County court of second-degree murder with a deadly weapon— after NCBF bailed him out of jail, following his arraignment in 2021.

Left-wing policies that started in Seattle have spread across Washington through radicalized city councils, activist legislators in Olympia, and prosecutors who refuse to prosecute. The WAGOP and Republican lawmakers in Olympia are committed to restoring safety in our streets and stopping repeat offenders.

Victims of violent crime do not have peace of mind that their attackers will be brought to justice. Police officers are now the ones “handcuffed” as radical lawmakers curtail their ability to pursue criminals. At the same time, the prospects for our youth decline as they fall into drugs, gangs, and homelessness.

“The time for cheap rhetoric is over,” concludes Chairman Walsh. “These problems can be fixed. Troubles caused by bad policies can be cured by better policies. All it takes is telling the truth about crime and being courageous enough to enforce our laws. We’ve been timid for too long. Now we need to be brave.”
###
---
| Team WAGOP

body:
Holy cow.

| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfngnu4i2usiobn66si25n72ji7kgmni25fjkbno_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5geapr3c3h2bs)

|

Friend, I wanted to send you a quick update on our work in Washington. There’s a lot going on in DC, but our investigation continues with urgency, and we just found a trove of new evidence once again proving Joe Biden lied about his family’s shady business dealings. As a Presidential candidate, Joe Biden said there was an “absolute wall” between his official work and the Biden family “business”, but that was just another lie from Joe. **We just found out his Vice President’s Office sent and received over 29,000 official emails with Hunter, his brother Jim, and their companies while Vice President. Here’s what we found:** 19,335 emails with Rosemont Seneca (Hunter’s company) 4,243 emails with Hunter Biden 1,751 emails with Jim Biden 3,738 emails with Jim’s Lion Hall Group _**That is 10 emails every single day of his tenure as Vice President.**_ The level of corruption and self-dealing by the Biden family while Joe was Vice President is astounding, and every week we find more and more evidence. Our team is hard at work, and I’m sure I’ll be emailing you soon with more breaking news in our investigation.
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znga6sb1drg0vbvoieog35vpjasene68n4jf1ujo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c5geapr3c3h2bs)

clean_body: Holy cow. | | | Friend, I wanted to send you a quick update on our work in Washington. There’s a lot going on in DC, but our investigation continues with urgency, and we just found a trove of new evidence once again proving Joe Biden lied about his family’s shady business dealings. As a Presidential candidate, Joe Biden said there was an “absolute wall” between his official work and the Biden family “business”, but that was just another lie from Joe. We just found out his Vice President’s Office sent and received over 29,000 official emails with Hunter, his brother Jim, and their companies while Vice President. Here’s what we found: 19,335 emails with Rosemont Seneca (Hunter’s company) 4,243 emails with Hunter Biden 1,751 emails with Jim Biden 3,738 emails with Jim’s Lion Hall Group That is 10 emails every single day of his tenure as Vice President. The level of corruption and self-dealing by the Biden family while Joe was Vice President is astounding, and every week we find more and more evidence. Our team is hard at work, and I’m sure I’ll be emailing you soon with more breaking news in our investigation. With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Friend,

We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records.

Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser.

_**Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter.**_

Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign.

**Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. **

name: Ron Wyden
subject: $34 billion in unpaid taxes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71660235/432845262/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE3N2Y4Ni00MTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSypJBG3D88CbJC-LZIY9V3Foz_8seDJGqDfU2hNczA=&emci=48983289-7364-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ac177f86-416c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I know that for most Americans, the IRS probably isn't a topic of conversation at the dinner table every night. But here's why you should care: for decades, Republican lawmakers have been bleeding the IRS dry of the resources it desperately needs to go after wealthy tax cheats. The IRS is in charge of investigating and going after the super-wealthy Americans who are gaming the system to avoid paying what they owe. But for a long time – under years of Republican budget cuts – it wasn't able to. That's all changing now, thanks to Democrats' historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which gave the IRS the resources it needs to go after wealthy tax cheats. **And it's already delivering.** Recently, I received brand new data from the IRS that I requested. And you won't believe these numbers. _Just shy of one thousand millionaires who didn't even file taxes owe an estimated $34 BILLION in unpaid taxes._ **You read that right, it's not a typo. Thirty-four BILLION.** This is just one example of wealthy tax cheats that the IRS can now go after and hold responsible for failing to pay what they owe. And think about how far $34 billion could go. We could fund schools, fix roads and bridges, expand broadband to every community, reduce the deficit, and much more. Think of what we could do if every super-wealthy American paid what they owe. I've often said that our country is a tale of two tax codes: one for working families that pay taxes out of each paycheck and one that's riddled with loopholes for the super-wealthy to get away without paying their fair share. Unfortunately, these latest numbers are just further proof that I'm right. Democrats are working hard to make sure everyone's playing by the same rules: paying what they owe and their fair share. But we can't do it without your help. [**We've seen what's possible with a Democratic Congress. It's crucial that we defend and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, retake power in the House, and send progressive leaders to Washington, D.C., who will fight for working families, not the wealthy and well-connected. Chip in now to make this a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71660236/432845263/-2044921950?refcode=2023-10-16-wealthytaxcheats&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ac177f86-416c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE3N2Y4Ni00MTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSypJBG3D88CbJC-LZIY9V3Foz_8seDJGqDfU2hNczA=) Together, we can create an America where _everyone_ pays their fair share. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

subject: We Came Up Short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Let’s show Larry what we’ve got!
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=4c5205eb1e&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# We Came Up Short
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, Matt here again. I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but Larry feels it’s important that we’re always honest with our supporters. We **_barely_** missed our mid-month fundraising goal. We were **_so close_**. We fell just $5,750 short. But it’s not too late to show Larry just how much we all support him! [**What can you give TODAY to help us meet that mid-month goal? Your donation of ANY SIZE can bring us one step closer to hitting the target and, ultimately, to the White House.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=1e5536ffd3&e=0be619cbaa) So many of your fellow patriots have already stepped up to contribute to our campaign. Each donation, from the biggest amount to the smallest, adds to our ever-growing list of supporters. The GOP Establishment are trying to keep out our campaign, going so far as to ban our staff from debates! I must ask: what are they afraid of exactly? That Larry Elder is courageous enough to take on the big fights that career politicians never could? That we’re not beholden to the special interests who have run Washington for decades? [**Larry is in this race to win it. You can show him you are, too, by helping us close the fundraising gap. Your donation of ANY AMOUNT makes a huge difference. Will you help us?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=5424b78239&e=0be619cbaa) Thanks for your continued support,
Matt Ciepielowski, Campaign Manager
Elder for President
---
[**P.S. None of us on staff are doing this to get rich. We’re working for Larry’s presidential campaign because we believe in his unique ability to bring about restoration for America. If you agree, please donate today.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=c60213a291&e=0be619cbaa)

name: Jena Griswold
subject: 14th Amendment and Trump update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
Donald Trump incited the January 6th insurrection and attempted to overturn the 2020 Presidential election. Last month, a lawsuit was filed to determine whether former President Trump’s actions disqualify him from the Colorado ballot. The 14th Amendment of the United States Constitution says that anyone who swore an oath to the Constitution and then engaged in “insurrection or rebellion” or “given aid or comfort to the enemies” of the Constitution is disqualified from office. There are many questions about how this provision works.
This is an extraordinary situation that we haven’t seen before as a nation. A sitting president incited an insurrection, and now there are constitutional questions about whether he is disqualified from the Colorado ballot.
I look to the Colorado Court’s substantive resolution of the issues, and I am hopeful that this case will provide guidance to election officials on Trump’s eligibility as a candidate for office.
It is important to me to make sure Americans have facts about our elections and this important lawsuit. You can see my explanation of the lawsuit in these interviews: PBS News Hour [https://twitter.com/NewsHour/status/1702094073715155216] , The Reid Out, [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold/status/1700200223795196305] and Deadline Whitehouse [https://twitter.com/DeadlineWH/status/1700256116813291761] .
In addition to this lawsuit, Trump faces criminal charges for his attempts to steal the 2020 election and the right to vote from the American people. The American people have chosen democracy over chaos time and again in recent years, and they will have to do so again in the coming months during the presidential election. The future of our nation is still on the line as we enter 2024.
Stay up-to-date on the lawsuit by following me on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado?%7B%7B%7BEngagementData%7D%7D%7D&emci=f1f14831-c145-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold?%7B%7B%7BEngagementData%7D%7D%7D&emci=f1f14831-c145-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D] , Threads [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold?%7B%7B%7BEngagementData%7D%7D%7D&emci=f1f14831-c145-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D] and Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/?hl=en&%7B%7B%7BEngagementData%7D%7D%7D&emci=f1f14831-c145-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D] .
Thank you,
Jena Griswold
Colorado Secretary of State
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]

Louisville, CO 80027

clean_body: The amount of cash my opponent has to spend this early in the race is astonishing. | | Fellow Conservative, We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records. Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser. Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter. Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign. Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. Fellow Conservative, the Senate majority runs through Montana. – anything – right now because we need to take back our country from the Democrats and career politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Jon Tester. For America’s Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.

| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---

These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5200fcd962fe40cc884eef1cb8ae7e45&_e=ijOfWWeCE8yO_487hczJNDft2HesTOKVrQn8-F7NieDXgfB9nj1bOYxyzqRTMwzu0MItcdmV3NaLeABaYoNG89IHDxd29bsfe8180ZwJu6XB4KgO2Kt3DI5E1rngyt6QmES_KPlII5oXDXmwZ7Q4l_LKBWv7ZiBva4eVosiDo-5t16z2xXFwAXNoOWEkmOt_J76msoPwqR-yPF7MP22T-wB6TmuZATg5DTdgWXWZD7sNFepr6ejANkKcSGiNWqbAKd_qdFRQeNq98NTELoKuhrG0VvXf_jiKUzEIvYBBW2rXa-H1EknXSXe2T40W7pC7w_5__iEI6m-hUtBF4TP7og%3D%3D)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. clean_body: The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, | | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer. This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers. | | | Sincerely, John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump P.S. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9d20cb1d393614165d02e0217f628041170f0a08b5c716eff783f5ee9fb18207fdce6f5595c31b239b839bf8b0e8d0a5b8794b22163ae58a35de53dc2499252b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Protests across the nation are erupting in support of terrorism. This is unconscionable. Ron DeSantis has signed an executive order to get into Israel and rescue our people, spoken out on every platform, in front of every camera, and called for cutting off all American funding of Iran. The Left's propaganda has caused people, young and old, to be so out of touch with reality that they can no longer recognize the horror in front of them. This cannot be the America that we're okay with. We have to stand up for what's right. THERE SHOULD BE NO CELEBRATING, PRAISING, MIMICKING, OR COMPLIMENTING TERRORISTS IN THIS NATION. Joe Biden has cultivated a broken system, and our nation needs a leader who will put the mission first, protect Americans, and fight against threats to freedom. Biden doesn't have the focus. Biden doesn't have the discipline. Biden doesn't have the strength. Biden doesn't have the backbone. The world is watching. If you believe we need new leadership to face the challenges ahead, then please consider rushing in your support today to elect Ron DeSantis. Chip in $25 Chip in $47 Chip in $65 Chip in $100 Chip in $150 Chip in $250 Ron DeSantis is the leader this country needs. In Freedom, Team DeSantis DONATE ANYTHING YOU CAN TO OUR CAMPAIGN 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. body:
It has been an incredible journey on the campaign trail, and I wanted to share some of the amazing experiences I've had recently.

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I hope this message finds you well. It has been another incredible week on the campaign trail and I'm more energized than ever for the journey that lies ahead! I am truly humbled by the support and enthusiasm we've received.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** In the News: Indiana leaders push for added support to Israel after deadly Hamas attack (https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/indiana-leaders-push-for-added-support-to-israel-after-deadly-hamas-attack/?fbclid=IwAR2HDsmRu8gfpN_Drj7OVyagACEH9XkZiYqsk9Ss6uZIGybKVQHhcnuU1Vk&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

The recent attacks in Israel by the terrorist organization Hamas are reprehensible and unacceptable. We must stand united, condemning these inexcusable acts of violence.

Praying for our Israeli friends as they face the unimaginable.
https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/indiana-leaders-push-for-added-support-to-israel-after-deadly-hamas-attack/?fbclid=IwAR2HDsmRu8gfpN_Drj7OVyagACEH9XkZiYqsk9Ss6uZIGybKVQHhcnuU1Vk&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/indiana-leaders-push-for-added-support-to-israel-after-deadly-hamas-attack/?fbclid=IwAR2HDsmRu8gfpN_Drj7OVyagACEH9XkZiYqsk9Ss6uZIGybKVQHhcnuU1Vk&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** In the News: Indiana Police Superintendent Carter is Upset with Indianapolis (https://wibc.com/162252/indiana-police-superintendent-carter-is-upset-with-indianapolis/?fbclid=IwAR3K0d5ge4lpHlvxybXpqGOxzc50cls_DkmI7wBdnmHWJCFBaJCFlC4ahdo&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Indiana State Police Superintendent Doug Carter is right—the current approach to crime in Indianapolis isn’t working. We need a tougher approach to crime that keeps criminals behind bars. I applaud Superintendent Carter’s willingness to speak out.
https://wibc.com/162252/indiana-police-superintendent-carter-is-upset-with-indianapolis/?fbclid=IwAR3K0d5ge4lpHlvxybXpqGOxzc50cls_DkmI7wBdnmHWJCFBaJCFlC4ahdo&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Read The Article (https://wibc.com/162252/indiana-police-superintendent-carter-is-upset-with-indianapolis/?fbclid=IwAR3K0d5ge4lpHlvxybXpqGOxzc50cls_DkmI7wBdnmHWJCFBaJCFlC4ahdo&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** On Social: Mental Health Advocacy (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid02ecbfqkeBWqhwk4rSq5XJF9AsmhMQCszc2V8ZwRmbJJrBTiLyCLCwju2vJhWb9mEnl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Oct. 10 marked World Mental Health Day. Indiana has made strides in mental health services, and as your Governor, I'm dedicated to further improving access for all Hoosiers.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid02ecbfqkeBWqhwk4rSq5XJF9AsmhMQCszc2V8ZwRmbJJrBTiLyCLCwju2vJhWb9mEnl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

** Hancock County Republicans
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the privilege of addressing a vibrant group of Republicans in Hancock County. I️ was inspired by this group's energy and commitment to conservative values.

** Talitha Koum Recovery House
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

One of the most touching moments of this past week was visiting the Talitha Koum Recovery House in Greenfield. The name "Talitha Koum," meaning "Little Girl Rise Up" in Syriac, reflects the remarkable work being done there. I had the honor of meeting Linda Ostewig, the home's director, who shared her heartfelt commitment to helping women on their path to recovery. It's a place of hope and healing, and I am deeply moved by Linda's dedication.

** Harvest Homecoming Festival in New Albany
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the pleasure of attending the Harvest Homecoming Festival in New Albany. This incredible event has been thriving for 55 years, bringing the community together to celebrate our rich history and culture.

** Decatur County Lincoln Day Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was an honor to speak at the Decatur County Lincoln Day Dinner. I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to the Decatur County Republican Party for organizing such a wonderful event. It's inspiring to see so many people dedicated to our conservative values.

** Mt. Zion Applefest
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Visiting the Mt. Zion Applefest was a reminder of the warmth and hospitality that we find in the communities across Indiana.

The people we met were friendly, and their passion for our state was evident in every interaction.

** Team Crouch Spotted Around Indiana
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

One of the most heartwarming aspects of this campaign has been the incredible support we've received from individuals and communities all across Indiana.

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

These photos capture the spirit and unity that our campaign represents. Each smiling face, each "Crouch for Indiana" shirt worn with pride, is a testament to the strong and vibrant community that stands behind our shared values.

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I am humbled and honored to have recieved the endorsement of 11 Spencer County elected officials. Thank you for your support! Let's continue building a brighter future for Indiana, together!

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“I've known Lt.Governor Crouch for over 25 years. There is not anyone more prepared for the Governor's office than she is. Her life's work has been serving the citizens of Indiana. I endorse her as a friend and a dedicated officeholder. Her hometown of Evansville and Vanderburgh County are excited to endorse Suzanne to be our next Governor!”
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I am honored to support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. Suzanne is qualified, dependable, and has always shown a great commitment to her duties in representing all residents of Indiana."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne has a strong work ethic to get the job done. The energy she has put forth for getting various projects up and running is amazing!"

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

As I travel across Indiana, I am reminded of the incredible people and communities that make our state so unique and wonderful. Your support keeps me motivated and committed to serving you as your Governor.

Thank you for your continued support, and I look forward to the road ahead. Let's keep working together to make our great state even greater.

Onward and upward,

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=a5bf9d5536-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_13_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a5bf9d5536-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .
