clean_body: It has been an incredible journey on the campaign trail, and I wanted to share some of the amazing experiences I've had recently. Friends and fellow Hoosiers, I hope this message finds you well. It has been another incredible week on the campaign trail and I'm more energized than ever for the journey that lies ahead! I am truly humbled by the support and enthusiasm we've received. Read on for last week's highlights! In the News: Indiana leaders push for added support to Israel after deadly Hamas attack () The recent attacks in Israel by the terrorist organization Hamas are reprehensible and unacceptable. We must stand united, condemning these inexcusable acts of violence. Praying for our Israeli friends as they face the unimaginable. Read The Article () In the News: Indiana Police Superintendent Carter is Upset with Indianapolis () Indiana State Police Superintendent Doug Carter is right—the current approach to crime in Indianapolis isn’t working. We need a tougher approach to crime that keeps criminals behind bars. I applaud Superintendent Carter’s willingness to speak out. Read The Article () On Social: Mental Health Advocacy () Oct. 10 marked World Mental Health Day. Indiana has made strides in mental health services, and as your Governor, I'm dedicated to further improving access for all Hoosiers. Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Hancock County Republicans I had the privilege of addressing a vibrant group of Republicans in Hancock County. I️ was inspired by this group's energy and commitment to conservative values. Talitha Koum Recovery House One of the most touching moments of this past week was visiting the Talitha Koum Recovery House in Greenfield. The name "Talitha Koum," meaning "Little Girl Rise Up" in Syriac, reflects the remarkable work being done there. I had the honor of meeting Linda Ostewig, the home's director, who shared her heartfelt commitment to helping women on their path to recovery. It's a place of hope and healing, and I am deeply moved by Linda's dedication. Harvest Homecoming Festival in New Albany I had the pleasure of attending the Harvest Homecoming Festival in New Albany. This incredible event has been thriving for 55 years, bringing the community together to celebrate our rich history and culture. Decatur County Lincoln Day Dinner It was an honor to speak at the Decatur County Lincoln Day Dinner. I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to the Decatur County Republican Party for organizing such a wonderful event. It's inspiring to see so many people dedicated to our conservative values. Mt. Zion Applefest Visiting the Mt. Zion Applefest was a reminder of the warmth and hospitality that we find in the communities across Indiana. The people we met were friendly, and their passion for our state was evident in every interaction. Team Crouch Spotted Around Indiana One of the most heartwarming aspects of this campaign has been the incredible support we've received from individuals and communities all across Indiana. These photos capture the spirit and unity that our campaign represents. Each smiling face, each "Crouch for Indiana" shirt worn with pride, is a testament to the strong and vibrant community that stands behind our shared values. Last Week's Endorsements I am humbled and honored to have recieved the endorsement of 11 Spencer County elected officials. Thank you for your support! Let's continue building a brighter future for Indiana, together! “I've known Lt.Governor Crouch for over 25 years. There is not anyone more prepared for the Governor's office than she is. Her life's work has been serving the citizens of Indiana. I endorse her as a friend and a dedicated officeholder. Her hometown of Evansville and Vanderburgh County are excited to endorse Suzanne to be our next Governor!” "I am honored to support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. Suzanne is qualified, dependable, and has always shown a great commitment to her duties in representing all residents of Indiana." "Suzanne has a strong work ethic to get the job done. The energy she has put forth for getting various projects up and running is amazing!" Last but not least... As I travel across Indiana, I am reminded of the incredible people and communities that make our state so unique and wonderful. Your support keeps me motivated and committed to serving you as your Governor. Thank you for your continued support, and I look forward to the road ahead. Let's keep working together to make our great state even greater. Onward and upward, Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! SHOP () DONATE () ============================================================ Copyright © 2023 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

name: Al Franken
subject: the hard way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Running for office is tough. You have to ask a bunch of people for money (like this), and then the other side gets together and says lots of mean things about you.

Having a baby is tough, too. There’s lots of screaming and crying, poop gets everywhere, and you don’t get any sleep. Now that I think about it, it’s a lot like running for office...

Peter, I’m writing because my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is doing BOTH. First, I laughed and told him he was crazy. When I realized he wasn’t joking, I said I’d help!

[**Josh is running for Congress in NY-19, and his race could decide the House majority. Will you join me and split a contribution between Josh Riley and Upset the Setup today to help him win one of the most important races in the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71664845/432852374/-137539994?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231016_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkYWMzMDZjLTQ1NmMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CPNusZEsbAV4WultIMGWFEE3lAsZdzfKhjsldOXCRCA=)

Josh is used to doing things the hard way.

He grew up in the district in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law.

In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law.

**Now, Josh is running for Congress without taking any corporate PAC money. He knows it’s not the easy route, but it’s the right thing to do.**

But that means he’s relying on folks like you and me chipping in. And with his time spread thin between the campaign, the new baby and, ya know, still having time to breathe, he’s relying on us now more than ever.

[**So if you can, please split a contribution between Upset the Setup and Josh’s campaign today. name: Mayra Flores
subject: I was sexually attacked by a liberal pervert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
This is my story

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=af0a2419a66b4ab086421564f02eeac9&_e=i8FniTejtZMT31n_ipINYv2aU_jq4KaujrnT-jT36JYdrM8XxEALmgH6HAiKeWdBZXE7C7YNBaWgON13UmQB94k1-DtHdapH09DYY0wx-GaAxbXIjiYvWQZFWqDQJ5Cf5DO86bvlkpM-eraXoVFdgrpcHrOnVYkDmOh43MyRhI54sxcBbdqZRE7WF2_nzivw0nkTQbB6Gu0t8PPL-Q-lrYspOqU18g5186XbjkcSyJ0nT2P30dFa04ECqRtmLvO-01uWf_L6U_-a6IhppvE64vY8GPDO3dqR5onOJNCsu5dndfGdHrhwPeQB_zliJriEemAkHGyk2IxmGRN1ZyuwsJz5NJfFicRq5DmAGD4yQfBZgkJ-WgMjexxrNcNx3ShFgPnQzNOB57GwyZizeX73iudvzbysD3rWtCfeUHa9ehU%3D)

---
Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a "white nationalist Latina" and a "self-hating Latina."

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don't buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me. They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=af0a2419a66b4ab086421564f02eeac9&_e=i8FniTejtZMT31n_ipINYv2aU_jq4KaujrnT-jT36JYdrM8XxEALmgH6HAiKeWdBZXE7C7YNBaWgON13UmQB94k1-DtHdapH09DYY0wx-GaAxbXIjiYvWQZFWqDQJ5Cf5DO86bvlkpM-eraXoVFdgrpcHrOnVYkDmOh43MyRhI54sxcBbdqZRE7WF2_nzivw0nkTQbB6Gu0t8PPL-Q-lrYspOqU18g5186XbjkcSyJ0nT2P30dFa04ECqRtmLvO-9esZIY41t0sOae2VwyFxXbebm5hmpjTgQ9B-_YexoFfi3dYMrlNeQRJBehphJ4Yo9J4Jx4DOJfqRo1s_nWqcW6d8zbfFegFKRFro8mVIdniHFhieLg3y3HDEIQHUsYFtPYlsmQDUQpjj4TNe8xj24cFkOjfL9K_IoXQUtE9VCOU%3D)
---

Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn't ask you to donate if it truly wasn't important.

_** But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING.**_

---
| | Friend, **This email is how we're taking on the climate crisis.**

Here at Evergreen, we advocate every day for bold, actionable policies that match the scale of the crisis, and we can't do it without your help.

**Emails like this one are how we connect real action opportunities with people like you** —people who want to help build a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future.

**That's why I need your help making sure our emails get through.**

You see, email providers like Gmail and Outlook have algorithms that are constantly making decisions about what will hit your inbox, or your spam folder, or your promotions tab.

So the more you open and click on our emails, the more likely it is we'll make it to your inbox with the latest climate policy analysis, opportunities to take action, and more.

**To make sure you keep receiving emails from Evergreen in your inbox, please add us to your address book or click below:**
---
[Yes, I want Evergreen in my inbox!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5040?t=4&akid=13747%2E53494%2ELQ18-A)
---
We believe in treating our subscribers with respect, which means sending you impactful ways to take action. We don't believe in scammy email tactics, and we'll only ever share actions that we believe will make a real difference.

To make sure you keep hearing from us, **[let us know here](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5040?t=5&akid=13747%2E53494%2ELQ18-A) or add us to your contacts!**

name: Kim Nguyen-Penaloza
subject: We’re expecting something major
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71665485/432853345/1978139865?amount=25&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_1MO_231016_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZhMWIwYjgtNDU2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mW5S2fO3aPCMv3dKvZ5ZLr67k-3-WIUDRpO4SF4UA9Q=) | | Hi there!

You may have noticed a few changes around here, so I wanted you to hear the (very exciting!) news directly from me:

**I’m so happy to share that I recently married my longtime partner, Santa Ana Councilman David Penaloza, and I’ll now be going by Kim Nguyen-Penaloza.**

**And I’m even more overjoyed to announce that we are expecting a baby daughter this January!**

This is such an exciting time for our family, and I’m grateful to everyone who has supported us on this journey.

So you may be asking: **What does this mean for my campaign for Congress?**

In some ways, nothing! And in other ways, _everything_.

From the beginning of my campaign, I’ve focused on the very real issues Orange County families are facing as politicians in Washington put their own interests above those of our children and our communities.

Now, as an expecting mother, **_I’m more determined than ever to get to Congress and fight for our future._**

Climate change, reproductive freedom, gun violence... all of these issues will impact our children’s lives even more than they have affected our own. We can’t leave their future in the hands of MAGA extremists who only care about themselves.

I know that running for Congress with a newborn will be a unique challenge, and I’m privileged to have a strong support system in place to help me do it.

I’m certainly not the first woman to be pregnant or caring for a newborn while continuing to work. Unfortunately, we still see open prejudice against working mothers – even among fellow Democrats.

**But I am committed to our fight to flip CA-45 blue and deliver on our Democratic values in Congress to build a future our children can be proud of.**

I’m so grateful for your continued support.

More soon!

Kim Nguyen-Penaloza | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71665487/432853346/770972230?contactdata=nK0lYpzknEPQB/yS70MfzYFSu5aQd6tg/zynspFEW2QLTvP/fj/huLt7hHFdLRsXgRo3ZGqqTuHuAbceQYl1dZQW3xi7Xnm6kVLfH4h8bDU=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_1MO_231016_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWZhMWIwYjgtNDU2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mW5S2fO3aPCMv3dKvZ5ZLr67k-3-WIUDRpO4SF4UA9Q=)**
---

|
* * *
---
| **Democrat Kim Nguyen-Penaloza is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

clean_body: = | | Hi there! You may have noticed a few changes around here, so I wanted you to hear the (very exciting!) news directly from me: I’m so happy to share that I recently married my longtime partner, Santa Ana Councilman David Penaloza, and I’ll now be going by Kim Nguyen-Penaloza. And I’m even more overjoyed to announce that we are expecting a baby daughter this January! This is such an exciting time for our family, and I’m grateful to everyone who has supported us on this journey. So you may be asking: What does this mean for my campaign for Congress? In some ways, nothing! And in other ways, everything. From the beginning of my campaign, I’ve focused on the very real issues Orange County families are facing as politicians in Washington put their own interests above those of our children and our communities. Now, as an expecting mother, I’m more determined than ever to get to Congress and fight for our future. Climate change, reproductive freedom, gun violence... all of these issues will impact our children’s lives even more than they have affected our own. We can’t leave their future in the hands of MAGA extremists who only care about themselves. I know that running for Congress with a newborn will be a unique challenge, and I’m privileged to have a strong support system in place to help me do it. I’m certainly not the first woman to be pregnant or caring for a newborn while continuing to work. Unfortunately, we still see open prejudice against working mothers – even among fellow Democrats. But I am committed to our fight to flip CA-45 blue and deliver on our Democratic values in Congress to build a future our children can be proud of. I’m so grateful for your continued support. More soon! Kim Nguyen-Penaloza | | = | | Democrat Kim Nguyen-Penaloza is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, | | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer. This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers. | | | Sincerely, John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump P.S. body:
We’re going to party like it's 1989

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71670453/432859262/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMzNDQ2YzItNDg2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lsXH9lSkVVSfbgL4asfDUUC-D7K0WEpeWZ5tkqwxYAY=) Peter –

🎶It’s me. Hi. I’m Andrei’s daughter. It’s me. 🎶

Two things you should know about me: 1. I love my dad. 2. I love Taylor Swift. I'm not picking favorites between the two. My dad’s not an _anti-hero_ , he’s just my hero.

Friday, as you may have heard, Taylor's Eras Tour Movie came out. In also very exciting news, my dad's campaign is launching a new program called Cherny Champions. By becoming a Cherny Champion, you’ll get:

✨Private campaign updates
✨Conversations with special guests
✨Behind-the-scenes videos from my dad (and me!)

[**To join Cherny Champions, sign up on your phone here or text GO to 1-844-931-2709 and make a recurring monthly contribution of $13 (Taylor's lucky number) or more. You’ll be helping to make our country a better place.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71670454/432859263/-988283941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMzNDQ2YzItNDg2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lsXH9lSkVVSfbgL4asfDUUC-D7K0WEpeWZ5tkqwxYAY=&emci=c3a17ee2-4f69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=333446c2-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922) | [JOIN ON YOUR PHONE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71670455/432859264/-988283941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMzNDQ2YzItNDg2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lsXH9lSkVVSfbgL4asfDUUC-D7K0WEpeWZ5tkqwxYAY=&emci=c3a17ee2-4f69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=333446c2-486c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=13520922)

When my dad and I first talked about him running for Congress, I felt very proud of him for wanting to help make things better and make our country a better place. I have spent a good amount of time (12 years) with my dad, and I know _All Too Well_ that he will do everything he can to make America the best it can be.

I've gotten to go with him to hear him speak at events -- and he didn't embarrass me too badly. And I even address envelopes for thank you notes. So it may be my handwriting you'll see (the messy handwriting on the inside is his).

My dad is _Fearless_ and I believe he would do such a good job in Congress. To make a _Long Story Short_ , I really appreciate everyone who is helping to make sure he gets that chance. And, though it may not be as good of a view as going to a Taylor concert, we want you to get a front-row seat for this campaign.

Thank you for considering joining Cherny Champions. We promise, there won’t be any _Bad Blood_ in this campaign. **Text GO to 1-844-931-2709 to join.**

– Belle Cherny

clean_body: We’re going to party like it's 1989 = Peter – 🎶It’s me. Hi. I’m Andrei’s daughter. It’s me. 🎶 Two things you should know about me: 1. I love my dad. 2. I love Taylor Swift. I'm not picking favorites between the two. My dad’s not an anti-hero , he’s just my hero. Friday, as you may have heard, Taylor's Eras Tour Movie came out. In also very exciting news, my dad's campaign is launching a new program called Cherny Champions. By becoming a Cherny Champion, you’ll get: ✨Private campaign updates ✨Conversations with special guests ✨Behind-the-scenes videos from my dad (and me!) | When my dad and I first talked about him running for Congress, I felt very proud of him for wanting to help make things better and make our country a better place. I have spent a good amount of time (12 years) with my dad, and I know All Too Well that he will do everything he can to make America the best it can be. I've gotten to go with him to hear him speak at events -- and he didn't embarrass me too badly. And I even address envelopes for thank you notes. So it may be my handwriting you'll see (the messy handwriting on the inside is his). My dad is Fearless and I believe he would do such a good job in Congress. To make a Long Story Short , I really appreciate everyone who is helping to make sure he gets that chance. And, though it may not be as good of a view as going to a Taylor concert, we want you to get a front-row seat for this campaign. Thank you for considering joining Cherny Champions. We promise, there won’t be any Bad Blood in this campaign. Text GO to 1-844-931-2709 to join. – Belle Cherny To learn more about Andrei, visit | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States Emails are a really important way for our campaign to be in touch with our supporters. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: U.S. Capitol Police Federal Court Filing Reveals Officials Were Aware of the Potential for a Significant Disturbance on January 6
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received the court-ordered declaration of James W. Joyce, senior counsel in the Office of the General Counsel for the Capitol Police, in which he describes emails among senior officials of the United States Capitol Police (USCP) in January 2021 that show warnings of possible January 6 protests that could lead to serious disruptions at the U.S. Capitol.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.
And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $15 between Serve America and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Thomas J. Royals, Naval Flight Officer
subject: A life dedicated to service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Royals for Congress
body:
When I die, I want to know that I have led a noble life in the service of God, country, and others.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=200a266f2a03406986341b70fba02148&_e=4N3VkKJT7kDn_HL-U8xx43II1LAxprN6_1ZXQVa49rQukKZhrgD-YY5A9tn8Le9OqGQXZ9f3S6gKp6lQ7-YtsyGUSM3DspNjd8wFUM3kQn6Jn5ZQzSdsUHDToTGj17PLRSRh_48zgLaizE4EHeetENM-jYHks4X9FxNUlp9sz6Mu00R2I5QqJHuhzVd2_AK8H1L-gW1UBwr0AYngZlz9100NT5l_IFrUP7Y8Qld_Ryln-UT_FwX8cxE-VJG74lYtYbxslZBYftyANVAbGEFoCefZU-qZUucgNIA0lbf_eqaRe6T10EFwtq9ldWe6F_asx8ULKk1CwC0G8PYa6oldsYac-Yy6Ck3cnxqYygKS4MuP1uz7s1GqWT8ActQzlvTfZUXXHsNj9_8EnJAGsu_z92dYxwOtgD_uPKnoOOt4ITewKSEK23re2KLrbOli5miqEB-YsW-TUm5lsADE7-5l88JfGxHF2vxFP56TmnDVRHw%3D)
---

I never left for battle without doing **THESE TWO THINGS. **
1\. I thanked God for all that I have and prayed that He brings me back to my family.
2\. Surrendered myself to His plan
He made sure I made it home every time and continued to let me serve in his image.

This is Veteran, Tom Royals. I decided to follow in my grandfather's footsteps to serve this great country on the same day everything I stood for came under attack.

I remember it like it was yesterday. I was in my junior year math class on September 11, 2001, when a plane hit the second tower. I immediately applied to The United States Naval Academy.

Two quotes from my application letter -
_I want to "earn the right to defend my country"

And that "When I die, I want to know that I have led a noble life in the service of God, country, and others." _
That's where my life began. A life dedicated to service.

**[Whether or not you choose to support me today is life or death for my campaign.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=200a266f2a03406986341b70fba02148&_e=4N3VkKJT7kDn_HL-U8xx43II1LAxprN6_1ZXQVa49rQukKZhrgD-YY5A9tn8Le9OqGQXZ9f3S6gKp6lQ7-YtsyGUSM3DspNjd8wFUM3kQn6Jn5ZQzSdsUHDToTGj17PLRSRh_48zgLaizE4EHeetENM-jYHks4X9FxNUlp9sz6Mu00R2I5QqJHuhzVd2_AK8H1L-gW1UBwr0AYngZlz9100NT5l_IFrUP7Y8Qld_Ryln-UT_FwX8cxE-VJG74lYtYbxslZBYftyANVAbGEFoCefZU-qZUucgNIA0lbf_eqaRe6T10EFwtq9ldWe6F_asEa5RIfmHn7tT0Fuo4BowIJV6BgIbvhWBXV9pxBoRx3vWA6v_twiNUAvijOTUdP6sOhqXNat3fZKp3bze-w9Aw9wBVl2yPraUM0qfdL-l-l9Win4a5gYVvDDsXqV2sTKXMAkN8ppNQ0zENxQMfI_Y5L5cmjWtcroeaoztG016yUQ%3D "Whether or not you choose to support me today is life or death for my campaign. ")**

After graduating and receiving my wings I was quickly deployed overseas to fight in Iraq & Afghanistan.

My service does not end overseas. There is still so much to fight for. However, the Radical Left and their cronies are doing everything they can to get in the way of my mission and have even claimed that my soon-to-be congressional seat is not at risk of being lost by the Left.
**This is not when I get off the warpath.**
**[This is when I double down and go to war for your values.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=200a266f2a03406986341b70fba02148&_e=4N3VkKJT7kDn_HL-U8xx43II1LAxprN6_1ZXQVa49rQukKZhrgD-YY5A9tn8Le9OqGQXZ9f3S6gKp6lQ7-YtsyGUSM3DspNjd8wFUM3kQn6Jn5ZQzSdsUHDToTGj17PLRSRh_48zgLaizE4EHeetENM-jYHks4X9FxNUlp9sz6Mu00R2I5QqJHuhzVd2_AK8H1L-gW1UBwr0AYngZlz9100NT5l_IFrUP7Y8Qld_Ryln-UT_FwX8cxE-VJG74lYtYbxslZBYftyANVAbGEFoCefZU-qZUucgNIA0lbf_eqaRe6T10EFwtq9ldWe6F_asZ2ZwG0STLtXEF7J5JwTZlkliVuaB_PNPpol9y0-vYNuLW3_X3r4ZfZCOEU6Yf_SSJgHaQFcVBVoF4IE_KfiAUzFTDygeeeccAp3TfHa9gG2w4ax3lHeBJGhcQ9qcGwZk4qIotTX2A0CDA2cpjasjVuIYl-VXm0L477FzbcxyeZ4%3D "This is when I double down and go to war for your values. ")**
The _same values_ I've spent my whole life trying to protect. The same values I will spend the rest of my life defending.

On the day that I die, I will have died a noble man. Not only because of my past service but for the service I will provide until that day.

I'll never let you down. I'll never surrender to anti-American values.

**[Now, all I need is your support to get there.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=200a266f2a03406986341b70fba02148&_e=4N3VkKJT7kDn_HL-U8xx43II1LAxprN6_1ZXQVa49rQukKZhrgD-YY5A9tn8Le9OqGQXZ9f3S6gKp6lQ7-YtsyGUSM3DspNjd8wFUM3kQn6Jn5ZQzSdsUHDToTGj17PLRSRh_48zgLaizE4EHeetENM-jYHks4X9FxNUlp9sz6Mu00R2I5QqJHuhzVd2_AK8H1L-gW1UBwr0AYngZlz9100NT5l_IFrUP7Y8Qld_Ryln-UT_FwX8cxE-VJG74lYtYbxslZBYftyANVAbGEFoCefZU-qZUucgNIA0lbf_eqaRe6T10EFwtq9ldWe6F_astq3zar-JQ0_AoT9WTnMV5Sp1rfKiM7nQSdsUQF9dIL4oR1IdHzLrsPOfZ0ulG2U2nRu2QJI5TkOS2-a_WJelPjVJNd7b4O1dCbLBX2IhLx-MHfBNk8eGd91MCBvr2zwmBAxs6y1TcW9JsSD1gZ6D-tiIeGUs7rJQXJycB0ynp4Q%3D "Now, all I need is your support to get there. ")**

This is not going to be easy, but those words have never stopped me.
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=200a266f2a03406986341b70fba02148&_e=4N3VkKJT7kDn_HL-U8xx43II1LAxprN6_1ZXQVa49rQukKZhrgD-YY5A9tn8Le9OqGQXZ9f3S6gKp6lQ7-YtsyGUSM3DspNjd8wFUM3kQn6Jn5ZQzSdsUHDToTGj17PLRSRh_48zgLaizE4EHeetENM-jYHks4X9FxNUlp9sz6Mu00R2I5QqJHuhzVd2_AK8H1L-gW1UBwr0AYngZlz9100NT5l_IFrUP7Y8Qld_Ryln-UT_FwX8cxE-VJG74lYtYbxslZBYftyANVAbGEFoCefZU-qZUucgNIA0lbf_eqaRe6T10EFwtq9ldWe6F_ashYx7EfftMs9vxcQgbz7ZwbBj9hA7QNGZr9rm_66-xltVC2wdBPkonTQnrR9QfZVLl3ew2Knqlbfu9vugqY3YJc8OtUoOu5KFqYljFwLIxV3zJ4SuKVLsnwsAmKbPs83LJcP8ZTE57xsGfyC1Y2hOI_aWvIIrQCwyzAUefU4o238%3D "BUTTON")
---
Thank you for your time and consideration. Thank you for allowing me to serve.

Thomas J. Royals, Naval Flight Officer

clean_body: When I die, I want to know that I have led a noble life in the service of God, country, and others. | | | | | | I never left for battle without doing THESE TWO THINGS. 1\. I thanked God for all that I have and prayed that He brings me back to my family. 2\. Surrendered myself to His plan He made sure I made it home every time and continued to let me serve in his image. This is Veteran, Tom Royals. I decided to follow in my grandfather's footsteps to serve this great country on the same day everything I stood for came under attack. I remember it like it was yesterday. I was in my junior year math class on September 11, 2001, when a plane hit the second tower. I immediately applied to The United States Naval Academy. Two quotes from my application letter - I want to "earn the right to defend my country" And that "When I die, I want to know that I have led a noble life in the service of God, country, and others." That's where my life began. A life dedicated to service. "Whether or not you choose to support me today is life or death for my campaign. " After graduating and receiving my wings I was quickly deployed overseas to fight in Iraq & Afghanistan. My service does not end overseas. There is still so much to fight for. However, the Radical Left and their cronies are doing everything they can to get in the way of my mission and have even claimed that my soon-to-be congressional seat is not at risk of being lost by the Left. This is not when I get off the warpath. "This is when I double down and go to war for your values. " The same values I've spent my whole life trying to protect. The same values I will spend the rest of my life defending. On the day that I die, I will have died a noble man. Not only because of my past service but for the service I will provide until that day. I'll never let you down. I'll never surrender to anti-American values. "Now, all I need is your support to get there. " This is not going to be easy, but those words have never stopped me. | | "BUTTON" Thank you for your time and consideration. Thank you for allowing me to serve. Thomas J. Royals, Naval Flight Officer | | | Paid for by Tom Royals for Congress. With the 2024 primaries just a few months away, it’s important to me that we ensure your voice is heard and your vote is counted.
**I’m running for Attorney General to defend voting rights (and all our rights!) and fight back against the far-right’s relentless attacks on our democracy.**
I believe the right to vote is sacred — but right-wing politicians across the country have suppressed that right by purging voter rolls, supporting discriminatory ID laws, closing polling locations, and doing everything in their power to make it harder to vote.
_As Attorney General, I’ll protect and expand the right to vote._
But right now, I want to make sure you can exercise that right! So take less than a minute to complete [_**our one-question survey**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71671719/432860779/1677644639?refcode=email_101623_registered&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTYzNzliNy00OTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifvb2-EQjvpvkNNqBcu_TO4Qlp0NDWjRFTY5cb4dyUM=&emci=1338f9b0-496c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=956379b7-496c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) and let us know if you’re registered to vote.
Cresco voters are going to make a big difference in this race!
Thanks for responding,
Eugene DePasquale

body:
what comes next for NC

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71672220/432862058/823540626?refcode=ea.6ea75dd7-4a6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6ea75dd7-4a6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWE3NWRkNy00YTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ovJ3-l1YBBBw8ouLv_TOVCI1wHdiEjAfELTP9lEp__E=&emci=8021c85f-396c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=6ea75dd7-4a6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I get a lot of questions from folks like you about what the 2024 elections mean for our state. My answer is that they mean _everything._ You’ve probably heard the phrase “the election of our lifetimes” before. It seems to get used just about every single election year. But it’s not hyperbole — each election does have real-life consequences that will determine the course of our future. During my terms as governor, Democratic lawmakers and I have worked hard to undo some of the damage Republican legislators and the last Republican Governor caused. But now that the GOP has a one-vote supermajority in Raleigh, they’re trying to undo our progress and move our state backward. _A dangerous abortion ban._ _Anti-democracy legislation to throw our elections into chaos._ If they’re not defeated at the ballot box next year, these radical lawmakers will continue to do untold harm to our communities. **[Peter, I’m personally asking you to step up and fight back. clean_body: what comes next for NC | Peter, I get a lot of questions from folks like you about what the 2024 elections mean for our state. My answer is that they mean everything. You’ve probably heard the phrase “the election of our lifetimes” before. It seems to get used just about every single election year. But it’s not hyperbole — each election does have real-life consequences that will determine the course of our future. During my terms as governor, Democratic lawmakers and I have worked hard to undo some of the damage Republican legislators and the last Republican Governor caused. But now that the GOP has a one-vote supermajority in Raleigh, they’re trying to undo our progress and move our state backward. A dangerous abortion ban. Anti-democracy legislation to throw our elections into chaos. If they’re not defeated at the ballot box next year, these radical lawmakers will continue to do untold harm to our communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. | | Good morning, friend! We know Monday mornings are busy, but we just got some good news we couldn’t wait to share with you: **We’ve crunched our mid-month reporting numbers and it looks as though we’re**** _almost_**** __****on track for our monthly fundraising goal!**
Yes, you read that correctly: **_almost_** __ being on track is still good news! Why? Because we know that Team Kean can help us close the gap easily.
---
[**CLOSE THE GAP**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=e110d3fe15c045a0baeef86ad8d6fd2f&_e=QnXXV3H6IZcCjnwRxmmYTWwYSAlWC5681WjIByx0L1fcCJcfAoVbuK3rd42Y-ESQJY0cBzIFTvdFq_1Aj2CnQcCXPZrArl78Wfr7M-7dau08Dpj-zAyKUe6r6qRDZ_rn-8kPy58SGW3AOSGGrFTyen54X-Rz4YNWNyHU_3CWco0PJAPhM1WFulsoatsv3dc4tLSOiooyxOMlupjKW9F8KzORuvJgnV_ObzQaXuks3Ze2IVkNIKgKZVUVzl8-p9mkshraQOkBQcXPcS8v-dbnXR090iwl0Ggesehqunfn1S_m4XN1jtR7zr-oWLGt1tKy75HcSdS3nsi2pf62WWr7K3uF8K7VMVFWhsJsdiGniXbjZkXmZ2GbwceyoQxV6S2t)

clean_body: Will you be one of them? | | | | | Good morning, friend! We know Monday mornings are busy, but we just got some good news we couldn’t wait to share with you: We’ve crunched our mid-month reporting numbers and it looks as though we’re almost on track for our monthly fundraising goal! Yes, you read that correctly: almost being on track is still good news! Why? Because we know that Team Kean can help us close the gap easily. This is one of our only chances to get back on track before the final stretch of the month, but thankfully there isn’t much ground that needs to be made up. We’ve calculated that we need just to get us on pace for our monthly goal. By stepping up and becoming one of just 30 Unique Donors, you’ll be earning the distinction of an elite group who heard the call and stepped up to help Team Kean. Your dedication to our mission of defending NJ-07 doesn’t go unnoticed, and is deeply appreciated. name: Kerry McQuisten
subject: Here comes our Worldwide Freedom Initiative...
body:
| | |

| | |

| | **International: We're gearing up for France!**

---
---
**Stand, speak, and act for your freedom.** If those words sound like the opposite of the globalist agenda you hear coming out of the WEF crowd, you're right. In just a few weeks, Republicans Overseas (RO) and our RO France office are hosting our first Worldwide Freedom Initiative summit in Paris.

The summit brings together right and center-right leaders from around the world. We're exploring the ill effects of the "woke" agenda and other topics. We have leaders like Gov. Kristi Noem coming with us to represent America.

The Worldwide Freedom Initiative was cofounded by Randy Yaloz, Solomon Yue and myself, and we're thankful to the Republican Overseas chapter leaders who are making this event happen.

Randy deserves high praise for his hard work, boots on the ground. [Here he is hosting our Independence Day Kickoff Event, which was a huge success.](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/8zKMobb_E8ONIkayoiIZIw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnD_xRP0UgODRlMWM2OGFmZDFjYjlhOGNhMjNiODhmODgzY2RjNjNEcGh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnlvdXR1YmUuY29tL3dhdGNoP3Y9eEQwVmgyMEFxSzQmZmJjbGlkPUl3QVIyRTZfU3QwRzZFQk4xUU54MHNjSlJDMTVTQ1lBcTFsWlRYYURKTXpJaXRsNG5XRXVDdmNPb1lDak1XBXNwY2V1QgplKlF3LWW_SMT7UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABfYw~~)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This Week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues that Powered by People is following this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

BIG VOTING RIGHTS WIN

On Friday, a U.S. district judge struck down Galveston County’s racially
gerrymandered redistricting map, ordering the majority-Republican
Commissioners Court to redraw the map by October 20.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58636?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1001&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ][IMG]

The ruling represents a big win for voting rights in Texas and for Black
and Latino voters in Galveston County who had been drawn out of political
power by the GOP. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58636?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1002&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ]You can read more about the case here.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58636?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1003&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ]READ MORE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

SCHOOL FUNDING HELD HOSTAGE

Governor Abbott vowed on Thursday to hold school funding and teacher pay
raises hostage in his fight to pass a billionaire-backed school voucher
scam that would take money out of our public schools to subsidize private
education for the wealthy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58637?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1004&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ][IMG]

By denying this funding while schools across the state face crippling
budget deficits and teacher workforce shortages, Abbott is hoping to
strongarm the bipartisan majority of anti-voucher Texas House members into
passing the voucher scam that Texas billionaires are pushing.

That means it’s more important than ever that your Texas House members
hear from you. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/31098?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1005&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ]Please call your Texas House representative today and
urge them to reject Abbott’s voucher scam.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/31098?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1006&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ]CALL YOUR HOUSE REP

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

ABBOTT’S LATEST BORDER STUNTS

The Texas Senate just passed Governor Abbott’s bill to allow state and
local police to arrest and imprison migrants who are seeking asylum in our
country—a gross violation of constitutional law, asylum seekers’ rights,
and the federal government’s clear supremacy on issues of immigration.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58638?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1007&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ][IMG]

As Abbott escalates his cruel, ineffective political stunts on the border,
it’s all the more important that President Biden uses the full power of
his office to make progress on real solutions that can address the
challenges at our border and establish a safe, legal, orderly immigration
system.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58638?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1008&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ]This piece by experts at FWD.us lays out several concrete steps the
Biden Administration can take to get this done while Republicans in
Congress block comprehensive immigration reform. I hope you’ll give it a
read.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58638?source=ema20231016-233452&t=1009&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3 ]READ MORE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=233452%2E444211%2EPjYFj3

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Isaac Bryan, my colleague and our state’s Assembly Majority Leader, has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71673956/432868315/-1415976427?refcode=em-10.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZkNjA5NjMtNGU2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cad_Xp2WkybYsmRWI8V31aagcLlzo0sC0tSF7dPinX4=) | _“Laura Friedman is a champion for social justice in all ways. She has supported legislation to provide alternatives to incarceration, end neighborhood oil drilling, expand restorative justice programs, and alleviate poverty. Laura Friedman will be a powerful advocate for progressive change in the US Congress and for these reasons and many more, I am proud to endorse her."_ \- Isaac Bryan, California Assembly Majority Leader
---
It is always an honor to receive recognition from those fighting alongside you every day, and I’m gratified that our Assembly Majority Leader believes I am the best candidate to forward our progressive values in Congress.

She has supported legislation to provide alternatives to incarceration, end neighborhood oil drilling, expand restorative justice programs, and alleviate poverty. Laura Friedman will be a powerful advocate for progressive change in the US Congress and for these reasons and many more, I am proud to endorse her." \- Isaac Bryan, California Assembly Majority Leader It is always an honor to receive recognition from those fighting alongside you every day, and I’m gratified that our Assembly Majority Leader believes I am the best candidate to forward our progressive values in Congress. = Thank you, Laura If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Team Sepi
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I hope you know how much your support means to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, the subject line says it all, but I’m going to repeat it all the same:
I hope you know how much your support means to me.
We reach out a lot, and I know that with the world the way it is there are many campaigns and organizations that you could be following and donating to.
But we can’t do this without you, and that is just the honest truth. Thanks to you we are building a campaign that can win in Arizona.
I know some of you started following me because I’m running for Kyrsten Sinema's seat. A good reason.
I know some of you started following me because I’m running to beat Kari Lake. Another good reason.
And I know some of you have been here since my days in the House. Maybe even before that.
But for this kid who grew up sleeping on the floor, this Marine who came back from Iraq ready to fight for a better life, and this Dad who wants to build a better world for my kids...
Really, it means a lot. So thank you.
Now, today, I’m not asking you to donate. But I do have a request:
[**Endorse my campaign for Senate in Arizona by adding your name. Take one more step towards victory in 2024 with me. It’s a simple act, but it speaks volumes about what we’re trying to do here.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231016-1-15&refcode2=1338.734936.w3Q_U9&akid=1338%2E734936%2Ew3Q_U9)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_oct23/?source=em231016-1-15&refcode2=1338.734936.w3Q_U9&akid=1338%2E734936%2Ew3Q_U9)
Thank you again.
-Ruben

clean_body: Peter, the subject line says it all, but I’m going to repeat it all the same: I hope you know how much your support means to me. We reach out a lot, and I know that with the world the way it is there are many campaigns and organizations that you could be following and donating to. But we can’t do this without you, and that is just the honest truth. Thanks to you we are building a campaign that can win in Arizona. I know some of you started following me because I’m running for Kyrsten Sinema's seat. A good reason. I know some of you started following me because I’m running to beat Kari Lake. Another good reason. And I know some of you have been here since my days in the House. Maybe even before that. But for this kid who grew up sleeping on the floor, this Marine who came back from Iraq ready to fight for a better life, and this Dad who wants to build a better world for my kids... Really, it means a lot. So thank you. Now, today, I’m not asking you to donate. But I do have a request: Thank you again. -Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
The reality is we need everyone involved to give what they can to show that this team is stronger than ever before. | | |

Peter, We have made major strides building a country that prioritizes everyday Americans, but Joe and Kamala agree -- **our work is not finished.** Americans have seen what the other side has to offer: an extreme and out-of-touch agenda. We rejected it in 2020, and we’ll reject it again in 2024. But the reality is Joe and Kamala can’t win this fight alone. This has been a grassroots campaign from day one, and it’s going to take a massive show of support from this team to make sure Joe and Kamala’s message is reaching voters all over the country. [**That’s why, as a supporter of Team Biden-Harris, we’re asking you to pitch in $25 (or whatever you can)!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZMfJjR1YRsu2onYECWuIPGERAqR1hIndceQ2ng9uEZ0hIg7JjWLidmcEgE049wLQOLWhMVqkf4yhUeZ-wLDdRxah7_N8W29eR5J8aXCCz-PjXAzHNzZQgLv0k8gJJ_xJqKHJYI1_V8p4qkb5oBDPQZvZaC4fKV4YCj2Gw7nLn9yZO_PYFphGX97J8rQUUIXeCWrwJpYpZO1VwFkibudGSkS_Sq4zf1K1jQypcaIYzND52-WJ8JpM_3nhy-orxsH8TUlZAMKi33Zi2AYUiPnNtAK41IVkhOZ_0i1lAe1Uvy1NvzYsQsmQVRyeCIvRHdqoIz99sOiZvdOgZdHBJR37ue1cRWIsAkXJpjU3mA3j6j7g/40h/WXLn9dooSJynNHKTvJZQow/h0/zhJecOGe7KrlSja3QlRJNLtRa5W8JiMbPFAs8K86yLo) We know we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us in 2024 and it’s up to us to reelect Joe and Kamala and continue building on the progress we’ve made. This is absolutely UNACCEPTABLE!

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef744d54c390464585de64abe10a3aa9&_e=0nNDde6e3qYUv9Q0Oe9nGw4mNyhcN7nltUDYgptPdgvaVgvbfOPScwz7U35OzkQRpSo-kHGJxQbaoohGs8P87G5iCgNyGxvVW5Z--JoBij5BKb0GAY4kYXNnox24v36-TrkEBmPmH8vMGS0o-H_-AreqN07iqCcaFxyoKiTHiZKgZvoIOuZaflnGcrkh_5PSj0FTsBeGM1oDqKH9rLR-1cRbanT8qVvOdBikakKTsVRGFsfawMEAsXLRgzh4gd_3xSGGNbqI-VXSq03Q_s72aqcHuKMMhduSXz5h2H7YBsw%3D)

Fellow Patriot, This is absolutely UNACCEPTABLE! A University of Virginia Student group said that Palestine should destroy Israel "by whatever means they deem necessary." This student group is condoning the rape, torture, kidnapping and execution of women, childrenand the elderly. **And while many Virginia conservatives are standing up against this vile hate, UVA and Tim Kaine are SILENT. ** **Let me be clear: Tim Kaine says NOTHING when violent hate comes to our taxpayer-funded institutions. ** It's not just apathy - it's pure cowardice. **[Virginia needs a leader that is not afraid to stand up to hate, and I'm ready to be that leader - but I can't get to Washington to fight against terrorism and terrorist sympathizers without your help. Can you join our team today in standing strong against this hate?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef744d54c390464585de64abe10a3aa9&_e=0nNDde6e3qYUv9Q0Oe9nGw4mNyhcN7nltUDYgptPdgvaVgvbfOPScwz7U35OzkQRpSo-kHGJxQbaoohGs8P87G5iCgNyGxvVW5Z--JoBij5BKb0GAY4kYXNnox24v36-TrkEBmPmH8vMGS0o-H_-AoFoU8Ed2bMQkHcvgSIs9lyOUEwxw4w2wPzh3CYxQhJ7Gc4tOcPn9c-4QjcdFyw3FPL4dvFFt2qgz1RCEdfIqjtOY3R2rsAHiRqEe8_6k_Q2pjUqEDK8d33AXDaQYF1TbzRUH1Tem0axxES-vHLxRP4%3D)**

During my time serving in the U.S. Navy, I was on the front lines taking on terrorists like those in Hamas. These people aren't social justice fighters. They don't want peace for the Palestinian or the Middle East. T**hey want the execution of all Jews, Israelis, and Americans - and today 's Leftists are standing by that message. ** It is absolutely DISGUSTING that politicians like Tim Kaine are silent against this hate - but then again, I'm not surprised. Tim Kaine doesn't know what it's like to take on terrorists. He doesn't know the true horror that these people want to unleash on innocent civilians. He never wore the cloth of our nation and put his life on the line for freedom. **I do. Because I 've seen it firsthand while serving our country. ** ** ** **When terrorists attack, I take it personally, and there is NO room for terrorist sympathy in America. ** **[Virginia deserves a Senator who will stand up against hate, and I'm up for the job. Join our team today to CONDEMN violence against civilians in Israel and all over the world. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef744d54c390464585de64abe10a3aa9&_e=0nNDde6e3qYUv9Q0Oe9nGw4mNyhcN7nltUDYgptPdgvaVgvbfOPScwz7U35OzkQRpSo-kHGJxQbaoohGs8P87G5iCgNyGxvVW5Z--JoBij5BKb0GAY4kYXNnox24v36-TrkEBmPmH8vMGS0o-H_-AjFyoY2cbd9LhpRA9MDwLUMrJ2AZ0YpBl6G5gyc-BlF2GlFoa7z-svatk1eG_LK1tStsp1mI-6yQopF0yrBKdga7NzjOP3nUvi8V9oRmMb5_KWPCFaIAf-L9EA82xw6Y7ZumWX2Wpm4Xsls2bIse2ZI%3D)**

A University of Virginia Student group said that Palestine should destroy Israel "by whatever means they deem necessary." This student group is condoning the rape, torture, kidnapping and execution of women, childrenand the elderly. And while many Virginia conservatives are standing up against this vile hate, UVA and Tim Kaine are SILENT. Let me be clear: Tim Kaine says NOTHING when violent hate comes to our taxpayer-funded institutions. It's not just apathy - it's pure cowardice. During my time serving in the U.S. Navy, I was on the front lines taking on terrorists like those in Hamas. These people aren't social justice fighters. They don't want peace for the Palestinian or the Middle East. They want the execution of all Jews, Israelis, and Americans - and today 's Leftists are standing by that message. It is absolutely DISGUSTING that politicians like Tim Kaine are silent against this hate - but then again, I'm not surprised. Tim Kaine doesn't know what it's like to take on terrorists. He doesn't know the true horror that these people want to unleash on innocent civilians. He never wore the cloth of our nation and put his life on the line for freedom. I do. Because I 've seen it firsthand while serving our country. When terrorists attack, I take it personally, and there is NO room for terrorist sympathy in America. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) | I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I'm running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything.The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Everything you need to know about Nikki's surging poll numbers | | | | | BREAKING: NIKKI DEFEATS BIDEN | Fox News just released a poll showing Nikki as the ONLY CANDIDATE decisively defeating Biden in a head-to-head match up. That's not all. She's second in New Hampshire and South Carolina, she's gaining ground in polls across the country, and her team of grassroots supporters is expanding in droves. | | Nikki is the one who will win and get our country back on track, but now we need YOUR help. "Will you rush in a donation right away to help Nikki fuel her campaign so we can amplify this message across America and WIN? " With just 23 days until the third debate ... With just 91 days until the first votes are cast... Keeping this surge of momentum going has never been more important. "Will you rush your support for Nikki NOW?" | | Thank you for your support! -Team Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: I'm respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of 2024, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231016-1?refcode=em20231016-1&refcode2=906_552475_kkEZmm&akid=906%2E552475%2EkkEZmm)
Hi Peter, it's Tammy Duckworth.
**[I'm respectfully asking if you'll make a contribution to support my friend Bob Casey's re-election campaign. Let me tell you why.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231016-1?refcode=em20231016-1&refcode2=906_552475_kkEZmm&akid=906%2E552475%2EkkEZmm)**
Bob is a fierce advocate for working families in Pennsylvania and across the country and, right now, he's facing the toughest campaign of his career. **This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of 2024, and the stakes couldn't be higher.**
Mitch McConnell and national Republicans have zeroed in on Pennsylvania as a must-win Senate race in their mission to take back the majority. They're preparing to do everything they can to regain Senate control by coming after Bob and flipping Pennsylvania red.
Not only that, but Bob's new opponent, David McCormick, has the ability to self-fund. That means PA could see even more political spending than it did in 2022 -- _and I don't think you need me to remind you that they spent a record-breaking $381 million in PA last time around._
**[We need to stand with Bob to keep a real Pennsylvanian in the Senate, and defend our Democratic majority. Bob is relying on this team to have his back, so I hope you'll chip in a few dollars to support him today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231016-1?refcode=em20231016-1&refcode2=906_552475_kkEZmm&akid=906%2E552475%2EkkEZmm)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231016-1?refcode=em20231016-1&refcode2=906_552475_kkEZmm&akid=906%2E552475%2EkkEZmm)**
Thank you for your support. I truly appreciate it.
All my best,
Tammy Duckworth

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=906%2E552475%2EkkEZmm)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=906%2E552475%2EkkEZmm)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Team Engel
subject: Why lie, Ciscomani?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Kirsten’s opponent, Juan Ciscomani, doesn’t want voters to know his real stance on abortion.
When asked in interviews, he tries to dodge the question ( literally running away [https://x.com/EngelForArizona/status/1575265341109719040?s=20] from it in 2022) or says he believes it’s a state issue.
But when it comes time to vote in the House, his anti-choice position becomes very clear. He helped put together a funding bill that restricted safe and affordable abortion medication, tried to prevent the Department of Defense from covering abortions for its service members, and has repeatedly voted against reproductive freedoms.
There’s a reason Ciscomani is trying to hide his record on abortion: He knows that voters in AZ-06 are pro-choice.
Kirsten Engel, on the other hand, has never had to hide her position on abortion. That’s because she’s unapologetically pro-choice and will fight nonstop in Congress to defend reproductive rights nationwide.
Kirsten can flip this seat blue next November if our campaign has the resources we need to get her message out. With just over a year until Election Day, building a strong campaign has never been more critical. Can we count on you to chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_101623_AbortionCisco_act]

clean_body: [] Peter, Kirsten’s opponent, Juan Ciscomani, doesn’t want voters to know his real stance on abortion. When asked in interviews, he tries to dodge the question ( literally running away [] from it in 2022) or says he believes it’s a state issue. But when it comes time to vote in the House, his anti-choice position becomes very clear. He helped put together a funding bill that restricted safe and affordable abortion medication, tried to prevent the Department of Defense from covering abortions for its service members, and has repeatedly voted against reproductive freedoms. There’s a reason Ciscomani is trying to hide his record on abortion: He knows that voters in AZ-06 are pro-choice. Kirsten Engel, on the other hand, has never had to hide her position on abortion. That’s because she’s unapologetically pro-choice and will fight nonstop in Congress to defend reproductive rights nationwide. Kirsten can flip this seat blue next November if our campaign has the resources we need to get her message out. With just over a year until Election Day, building a strong campaign has never been more critical. Can we count on you to chip in now? | | Voting begins TODAY for municipal elections across Georgia, **_and we need your help._**

We’re reaching out to voters across Georgia to make sure they’re showing up to vote in these critical local elections, because in low turnout elections like these, every voter we get to show up can make a HUGE difference.

So we have two requests.

**First:** [**_Will you commit to making calls to Georgia voters to make sure they have a plan to cast their vote on or before Election Day, November 7, 2023? **Second:** [**_Your donation right now will go directly toward funding our voter outreach program and ensuring we can reach voters all across Georgia before November 7. Will you pitch in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71675507/432874526/710125701?refcode=20231016.1_GAPU_10T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZlYzdlYi01NTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wprsMAFnp9U6aQ7apvA7awWvS2cLo1CJ4329mKmkPRI=)**_

name: Rep. Mary Miller
subject: Jim Jordan for Speaker
body:
Right now, our country is facing a crisis at our southern border and a world on fire because Joe Biden is the worst President in our lifetime.
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/eu/442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd/1d5de649248e499faf378ad5ef124038/CQc3ap-rEYTQM8707EMCupTtHfze6gfY1NuUcZUaS6v1JtHH_0mOpsVEFsuU6PDyonjH5ierAAfwGhrFC_pildz-2XW2ZnUvwdcuwaHFB7w=) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/eu/442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd/1d5de649248e499faf378ad5ef124038/CQc3ap-rEYTQM8707EMCupTtHfze6gfY1NuUcZUaS6v1JtHH_0mOpsVEFsuU6PDyonjH5ierAAfwGhrFC_pildz-2XW2ZnUvwdcuwaHFB7w=)

| Peter – Right now, our country is facing a crisis at our southern border and a world on fire because Joe Biden is the worst President in our lifetime. **House Republicans must unify around a strong, conservative leader as Speaker of the House, and JIM JORDAN is the man for the job.** As Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee, Jim Jordan has taken on Joe Biden's "America Last" open border and soft-on-crime agenda. [**If you support my decision to back Jim Jordan, I hope I can count on you to stand with me by supporting my fight to save this country****.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/c/442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd/1d5de649248e499faf378ad5ef124038/CmHrsaRlBiX05GhRCEtBdxmkwCzEb1pvuvE5ZN4dr68ySQnrNmqJBOJEaeoasF2ss02JnlEjXh551kXACL1VdX8qWzUoQEQ_V4kc6HSZTEzmYUcFyBm22Pal-xFLwzWQftVuMs3JpUL7ImGDi33WxhuJFeCg6VUJ5cuSFjPQaEobVxouvh3D8KEF3BCmH2-pVt0naFRpvsqrDQfYFst7g5VJEnM_ZPUu7BIxvIks4HS3MFTcRPsu4jgAMMm1THbVGwNyPnTy9izhK2F8OisdD1O_EOgGxvY6uZHJYsZefw0TLTb0h_LmLnBhunHFPlDfaskoCueN-aQJuektq8Emo4p_-sAkE0LTZn2hkuMkfEHJK3uw70Rn3dt4qjMF7f-F2OCOidK75-OgNYljLPJoPA==) **The situation in America is dire.** Democrats have installed their political henchmen in MAJOR positions of power. They have weaponized the Deep State bureaucracy to go after Biden's political opponents and even want to throw them in jail. The only way to save this country is through tough and strong action by Republicans in Congress: **The weaponized DOJ and FBI should be defunded. Joe Biden and Mayorkas should be IMPEACHED. And America’s ENERGY must be UNLEASHED. ** You and I both know we are no longer living in the America we grew up in. **But with Jim Jordan as Speaker and Donald Trump as President, we will save this country and defeat the Democrats in their attempted hostile takeover of America****.** I hope you’ll join me in this upcoming battle for the heart and soul of this country. With these two men at the helm, we can MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. _God Bless,_ Mary Miller P.S. I’m fighting every single day in the halls of Congress. The Democrats and Swamp insiders have painted a big red target on my back. I need all the help I can get from grassroots conservatives to win my re-election. [**Please chip in whatever you can afford by contributing here****.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/c/442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd/1d5de649248e499faf378ad5ef124038/CmHrsaRlBiX05GhRCEtBdxmkwCzEb1pvuvE5ZN4dr68ySQnrNmqJBOJEaeoasF2ss02JnlEjXh551kXACL1VdX8qWzUoQEQ_V4kc6HSZTEzmYUcFyBm22Pal-xFLwzWQftVuMs3JpUL7ImGDi33WxhuJFeCg6VUJ5cuSFjPQaEobVxouvh3D8KEF3BCmH2-pVt0naFRpvsqrDQfYFst7g5VJEnM_ZPUu7BIxvIks4HS3MFTcRPsu4jgAMMm1THbV48x0uxB25TFMUClTcWDyW9vbhDqVhCNiiqv32obS4F5COJc88xWYW-w41hURpslL-bktIN-bsadC-jJ9RN9VqAepbYBIfxgXZTAtLPMQUOrZDLroGHAD3AD3PeyG2NqfK9BH9FLpgMlpTqEPr6gLwg==)

Egyptian and Saudi leaders during meetings about support for Israel on

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Beyond Fossil Fuels Town Hall with Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, you're invited!

On Tuesday, Oct. 17th, leading climate champions U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna will join Our Revolution’s LIVE Virtual Town Hall to organize for a world beyond fossil fuels, prevent backyard drilling in California, and fight for environmental justice for all.

Click here to RSVP for this special event! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231016_INV_leekhannatownhall3_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1011&akid=4796%2E5885482%2EF8DbW0)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231016_INV_leekhannatownhall3_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1012&akid=4796%2E5885482%2EF8DbW0

RSVP HERE! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231016_INV_leekhannatownhall3_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1013&akid=4796%2E5885482%2EF8DbW0)

We’ll also hear from Californians whose lives have been directly affected by fossil fuels, and activists working to fend off Big Oil’s attempt to overturn SB1137, which the state legislature passed to ensure all oil and gas drilling is set back at least 3,200 feet from homes, schools, hospitals, nursing homes and more.

We hope you’ll join us at this important LIVE town hall event, which kicks off at 7pm PT/10pm ET on Tuesday, Oct. 17th! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231016_INV_leekhannatownhall3_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1014&akid=4796%2E5885482%2EF8DbW0)

The clock is ticking on the climate crisis. Each of the past three years has been the hottest year on record, and fossil fuel production is having horrible impacts on people’s health in real time today.

We need to move beyond fossil fuels before we lose everything. Every day, we witness the terrible evidence of our government’s failure to mount a resistance to fossil fuel corporations. Changing this will take all of us.

RSVP today for Our Revolution’s Beyond Fossil Fuel Town Hall with Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna, and climate activists around the country! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10251?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231016_INV_leekhannatownhall3_0_2MAT_ourrevolution_na_na_leekhannatownhall&t=1015&akid=4796%2E5885482%2EF8DbW0)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
