**Letitia "Peekaboo" James's French Connection**

In October 2017, as a candidate for Attorney General during President Trump's first year in office, Letitia James combined and modified her additional mortgages into one loan for $625,000.00. However, atypical verbiage that is not considered ordinary was added to an affidavit with a note from Willard F Miller, an attorney for Wells Fargo Bank, which briefly described an additional loan that was previously issued for $770,000 on May 21, 2016, by Christopher J French and Kristen French.
For reference, then candidate Donald Trump filed to run for President on June 16, 2015, nearly one year prior to the dark money loan being issued to Letitia James.
This affidavit was then attached and recorded with her latest mortgage consolidation.

This dark money loan fails to conform to the norms of typical and lawful loan agreements, which is likely why James has gone through great lengths to hide this loan, and the true identity of the funder of the loan.

Something is rotten in the state of New York, and it's not just the smell urine and marijuana that originates from the New York City subway system.

On page 13 of Attorney General Letitia James's 2022 financial disclosure statement, she only listed some of her financial liabilities, including the $625,000 Wells Fargo mortgage. However, since 2017, New York's AG Letitia James hasn't once disclosed the origins of the $770,000 loan from French.

It is important to remember that Letitia James's entire campaign for New York Attorney General in 2018 was based upon "Getting Trump". She campaigned on the claim that Donald Trump was an illicit President, and she vowed to remove him from office if she were elected. Currently, as we head into the 2024 Presidential election, James and her office have committed election interference by weaponizing the office of New York Attorney General's Office against President Trump, his family, and their business ventures. Ironically, James has targeted the Trump family over the valuation of their real estate holdings, all while she appears to be illegally concealing an illicit dark money loan from the public. Additionally, as she continues to work with other radical Democrats to fabricate impropriety against President Trump and his family, she herself is engaged in illegal financial misdeeds through the intentional obfuscation of her loan from two individuals with the last name French who suspiciously are not able to be located or properly and legally identified in her mortgage and campaign documents.
This begs the question, why has Letitia James gone through such great lengths to hide the $770,000 loan that was recorded in 2017, as well as the origin of the loan? Who is James trying to protect, or who is trying to hide their true identity... and why?
It is illegal to knowingly use a fake name or alias on a signed affidavit. There is no financial record linking a Christopher J French and a Kristen French to Letitia James. Could their names potentially be an alias for Christian J French, whose mothers' name coincidentally happens to be Cristina French?
And if Christopher J. French is indeed an alias for Christian J French, did Christian J. French buy off the New York Attorney General for $770,000.00?
If this turns out to be the case, how much interest did French, and his anti-Trump, family owned, progressive, New York based TV network earn in our government?
Perhaps it's time for the New York State Inspector General to investigate New York Attorney General Letitia James's French Connection.

For nearly a decade, Mr. Bartlett regularly appeared on the television news forum "Richard French Live" on WRNN as a member of the legal panel, discussing current issues concerning the law and society." | | ---|---|--- Upon further investigation, on June 15, 2022, Mayo appeared on a legal panel with NY Attorney General Letitia James. Additionally, Mayo has his participation in a panel with Attorney General James prominently displayed on the front page of his law firm's website. | | ---|---|--- On the , under the "Management Team" section, Richard French's bio highlights his ties to President Barrack Hussein Obama. " The Emmy Award-winning program is a forum that counts politicians, pundits and personalities as contributors ranging from President Obama to the biggest newsmakers from the national to regional level. A multiple Emmy and state broadcaster awardee, Richard came to broadcasting from the world of politics." A review of Richard French's YouTube channel for his show reveals that majority of his episodes are anti-Trump in nature, and his banner says "Can America Handle Another Trump Presidency". | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- The details for the $770,000 loan that AG James has been hiding and withholding from her financial disclosures are nonexistent in James's 34 page 11/3/2017 mortgage agreement that was recorded with the Office of the Register within New York City's Department of Finance. Additionally, James never mentioned the $770,000 loan from French in her financial disclosure form when she was running for office to become New York's Attorney General. Her failure to disclose this loan on her financial disclosure forms is not only unethical, but it is highly illegal. This dark money loan fails to conform to the norms of typical and lawful loan agreements, which is likely why James has gone through great lengths to hide this loan, and the true identity of the funder of the loan. Something is rotten in the state of New York, and it's not just the smell urine and marijuana that originates from the New York City subway system. On page 13 of Attorney General Letitia James's 2022 financial disclosure statement, she only listed some of her financial liabilities, including the $625,000 Wells Fargo mortgage. However, since 2017, New York's AG Letitia James hasn't once disclosed the origins of the $770,000 loan from French. | | ---|---|--- It is important to remember that Letitia James's entire campaign for New York Attorney General in 2018 was based upon "Getting Trump". She campaigned on the claim that Donald Trump was an illicit President, and she vowed to remove him from office if she were elected. Currently, as we head into the 2024 Presidential election, James and her office have committed election interference by weaponizing the office of New York Attorney General's Office against President Trump, his family, and their business ventures. Ironically, James has targeted the Trump family over the valuation of their real estate holdings, all while she appears to be illegally concealing an illicit dark money loan from the public. Additionally, as she continues to work with other radical Democrats to fabricate impropriety against President Trump and his family, she herself is engaged in illegal financial misdeeds through the intentional obfuscation of her loan from two individuals with the last name French who suspiciously are not able to be located or properly and legally identified in her mortgage and campaign documents. This begs the question, why has Letitia James gone through such great lengths to hide the $770,000 loan that was recorded in 2017, as well as the origin of the loan? Who is James trying to protect, or who is trying to hide their true identity... and why? It is illegal to knowingly use a fake name or alias on a signed affidavit. There is no financial record linking a Christopher J French and a Kristen French to Letitia James. Could their names potentially be an alias for Christian J French, whose mothers' name coincidentally happens to be Cristina French? And if Christopher J. French is indeed an alias for Christian J French, did Christian J. French buy off the New York Attorney General for $770,000.00? If this turns out to be the case, how much interest did French, and his anti-Trump, family owned, progressive, New York based TV network earn in our government? Perhaps it's time for the New York State Inspector General to investigate New York Attorney General Letitia James's French Connection. ### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=652d8d862f051c252266cbf5&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_652d8c732f051c2522669f93&l=en-US&s=e9g6Z35j6POqyRzhFtSUFnyigmk%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**
---
---
|
---

| | I’ve been in the politics game for a long time, Derek, and I honestly can’t recollect an election here in Virginia that carries more weight than our General Assembly election next month. For the first time since 2019, all 140 seats in the General Assembly are on the ballot. 40 of them are in the Democratic-controlled Virginia Senate, where we hold a narrow 4-seat margin. A Virginia Senate where, because of our majority, we’ve stopped a slew of GOP proposals aimed at weakening voting rights, kept them from rolling back climate initiatives, and prevented them from loosening commonsense gun restrictions like repealing the red flag law. _****[If you can, rush $5 to help me elect Democrats throughout VA to turn our legislature blue next month>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71677346/432880959/-106063578?refcode=mw_em_231016_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTJhZjZmNi01OTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=teLtuZMKmj63m-0mYwyory6BPUdx5jV4VLppJUNZ9RE=)****_ It’s been a political stalemate in the Commonwealth. Democrats haven’t been able to get anything done because the Republican-controlled House won’t let them, and we’ve stopped them from passing legislation detrimental to Virginians. **But that means if the GOP holds on to the House of Delegates and takes over our 4 seats in the Virginia Senate, there’s nothing stopping them. At all.** This election has real, tangible consequences that Virginians will face in their everyday lives. [__**That’s why I’m sending you one final reminder to register to vote – today’s the last day you can get it done – and make a plan to get to the polls. **__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71677347/432880960/852988634?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTJhZjZmNi01OTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=teLtuZMKmj63m-0mYwyory6BPUdx5jV4VLppJUNZ9RE=&emci=7dee08b5-416c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1a2af6f6-596c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237) Join me in making your voice heard on November 7th and standing on the right side of history. name: Team Mondaire
subject: Mike Lawler spends more time on TV than in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
The people of NY-17 deserve leaders committed to good policy, not television.
Team—is it Congressman or commentator Mike Lawler? With the amount of airtime he’s taking up on news outlets across the country, we're not so sure...
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71677425/432881494/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231016_TV_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231016_TV_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b66c3566-5a6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjZjMzU2Ni01YTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6T3By-vdkWxU8SNuITb_AZcDnUh9I3CjkrDed_P69V8=)
---

_CNN, Fox News, Bloomberg News_ —it doesn’t matter. Mike Lawler will go on literally any station that will have him in order to appear like the reasonable adult in the room.

But what he’s not talking about is how he is willing to back election denier Jim Jordan for Speaker and how he has enabled and elevated to power folks like Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert by giving MAGA Republicans their majority. He supports the baseless impeachment inquiry into President Biden and consistently votes for extreme legislation that the MAGA extremists put on the table.

# You're invited to a BIRTHDAY Celebration!
---
---
Maria is celebrating her 47th birthday on Sunday, October 22nd. Join the party!
There will be cake, ice cream, and plenty of singing with a DJ and Karaoke. You attending is the GIFT...
If anyone would like to stay later, at 3:00 p.m., we will go door-knocking in the surrounding areas with local candidates. I hope you will join the celebration!
Special Guest: PA SUPERIOR COURT CANDIDATE MARIA BATTISTA.
RSVP's Required

body:
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55284?t=6&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
The Bucks County commission race "could tell us a lot about who will win the presidential election in 2024... As Bucks County goes, Pennsylvania will go."

[**If Democrats want to win Pennsylvania in 2024, we HAVE to win Bucks County in 2023. Split a donation between Bucks United and the Voter Protection Project.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55284?t=7&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7) | [RUSH A DONATION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55284?t=8&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
---
Folks,

The stakes are simply too high for this race in Pennsylvania to remain "obscure" any longer.

**Right now, Democrats Bob Harvie and Diane Marseglia are in a neck-and-neck race with Republicans over control of the Bucks County Board of Commissioners — which oversees how people vote in the county.**

If Republicans control the county commission, they could make it a lot harder for people to vote, swinging the district for Republicans up and down the ballot in 2024. And if MAGA Republicans sue the county like Trump did after 2020 (11 times!), we have to make sure it's Democrats defending voters' voices not election deniers.

[So that's why we’re asking — please split a donation between Bucks United (the Democrats' group) and the Voter Protection Project. We absolutely MUST win this year.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55284?t=9&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bucks United and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55285?t=10&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55286?t=11&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55287?t=12&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55288?t=13&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55284?t=14&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
This race really is going to come down to the wire.

In 2019, Democrats took control of the board for the first time in _40 years_ with just a few hundred votes. Now, experts are expecting this year's race to be just as close.

**With so much on the line and margin for error so slim, every dollar really can make the difference.**

[So please, rush a donation right now to Bucks United and the Voter Protection Project. Let's make sure Democrats win Bucks in 2023 so we can win again in 2024.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55284?t=15&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bucks United and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55285?t=16&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7)

Thanks,

Bucks United
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11228%2E878179%2EgmgYk7).**

If Republicans control the county commission, they could make it a lot harder for people to vote, swinging the district for Republicans up and down the ballot in 2024. And if MAGA Republicans sue the county like Trump did after 2020 (11 times!), we have to make sure it's Democrats defending voters' voices not election deniers. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bucks United and VPP will go through immediately: This race really is going to come down to the wire. In 2019, Democrats took control of the board for the first time in 40 years with just a few hundred votes. Now, experts are expecting this year's race to be just as close. With so much on the line and margin for error so slim, every dollar really can make the difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bucks United and VPP will go through immediately: Thanks, Bucks United | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Second Amendment Questionnaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I really need your response | Fellow American – Chuck Grassley here.

body:
it’s important...

---
Hi, friend, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important.
Unfortunately, we’re pacing about $8,493 of where we should be at this point in the month. **[_Will you donate $5 to help get us back on track so we can defeat Rick Scott?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71678087/432883492/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTMxYjIyMzEtNWQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=edoTDzmrztBxEG3SI9tBLhls8D7ZZTH769pYq_ct8k0=)**
We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent, Rick Scott, is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.
Look, friend, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and _beat_ them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody who doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families. clean_body: it’s important... | | | Hi, friend, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important. Unfortunately, we’re pacing about $8,493 of where we should be at this point in the month. = We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent, Rick Scott, is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat. Look, friend, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and beat them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody who doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families. | | Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, the right to choose has been attacked all across the country. Among those attacks include anti-choice clinics posing as healthcare providers. This practice is predatory and must be put to a stop.

Josh is leading the effort in Congress with the Stop Anti-Abortion Disinformation Act. This bill would prevent these crisis pregnancy centers from falsely advertising as healthcare providers.

[We need 5,000 supporters by the end of the day to take a stand with Josh and show these predatory “clinics” they have no place in New Jersey. body:
Q3 FEC reports came out over the weekend. Here’s how it all shook out:
#
Peter,
Every candidate running for federal office was required to submit the full report of their campaign’s third quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission on Sunday. **Here’s how it shook out in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race:**
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38614?refcode=em20231016-4003&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4003%2E614464%2E3VUTAx)**
**We released our record-breaking number last week — $1.5 million raised from all 114 counties across Missouri.** Our average donation for the quarter was just $31, with 99% of donations under $200.
We outraised Josh Hawley and set the record for the most ever raised in the first nine months of a Senate challenger’s campaign in Missouri, all thanks to your help.
**But unfortunately, it’s not all good news today, Peter:**
**National Republicans ramped up their support for Hawley last quarter by transferring more than $500,000 directly into his campaign.**
**[FIGHT BACK NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38614?refcode=em20231016-4003&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4003%2E614464%2E3VUTAx)**
We already knew that corporate insiders view our movement as a serious threat. After all, they started attacking Lucas on the day he got into this race. And when report after report showed Hawley’s approvals tanking among Missouri voters, they made big, public investments into his flailing campaign.
But this is a huge bailout for Hawley from the national GOP. They’re hoping it’ll give Hawley the edge he needs to start off strong and come out swinging in 2024. And we all know their support won’t stop there...
**That’s why we urgently need your help today, Peter.** Lucas Kunce has built a record-breaking grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley entirely powered by real people like you. But when we’re up against national insiders and corporate mega-donors who are willing to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to re-elect Hawley to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year, we’ve got to keep our campaign prepared to fight back at every step of the way.
We need the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue building a winning campaign.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce today? New polling shows our race in a dead heat, so your support right now could help us close the gap, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38614?refcode=em20231016-4003&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4003%2E614464%2E3VUTAx)**

clean_body: Q3 FEC reports came out over the weekend. Here’s how it all shook out: Peter, Every candidate running for federal office was required to submit the full report of their campaign’s third quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission on Sunday. Here’s how it shook out in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race: We released our record-breaking number last week — $1.5 million raised from all 114 counties across Missouri. Our average donation for the quarter was just $31, with 99% of donations under $200. We outraised Josh Hawley and set the record for the most ever raised in the first nine months of a Senate challenger’s campaign in Missouri, all thanks to your help. But unfortunately, it’s not all good news today, Peter: National Republicans ramped up their support for Hawley last quarter by transferring more than $500,000 directly into his campaign. We already knew that corporate insiders view our movement as a serious threat. After all, they started attacking Lucas on the day he got into this race. And when report after report showed Hawley’s approvals tanking among Missouri voters, they made big, public investments into his flailing campaign. But this is a huge bailout for Hawley from the national GOP. They’re hoping it’ll give Hawley the edge he needs to start off strong and come out swinging in 2024. And we all know their support won’t stop there... That’s why we urgently need your help today, Peter. Lucas Kunce has built a record-breaking grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley entirely powered by real people like you. But when we’re up against national insiders and corporate mega-donors who are willing to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to re-elect Hawley to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year, we’ve got to keep our campaign prepared to fight back at every step of the way. We need the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue building a winning campaign. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and finally take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for everyday people — and we can’t afford to waste it. Thanks for being part of it, — Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Lynn Peterson
subject: Hard to get more MAGA than this…

body:
House Republicans are going to try and make Jim Jordan our next Speaker.
|
---

| | Peter, it's looking like House Republicans will try to advance **Jim Jordan** as Speaker tomorrow on the floor. And it's going to be _very_ telling how Lori Chavez-DeRemer votes. It's hard to get more extreme than Jim Jordan. This is someone who's supported defunding the FBI, someone who wants a national abortion ban with zero exceptions, someone who pushed Donald Trump's election lies in the lead-up to January 6, and who went as far as to advocate for Mike Pence to _overturn_ the election results of 2020. **If Lori Chavez-DeRemer votes for Jim Jordan, it will be the clearest sign yet of her putting MAGA ideology above the needs of the people of Oregon's Fifth District.** We need to be ready to hold her accountable (because if the recent past is any indication, she tows her party's line when push comes to shove). [**Will you chip in $5 to help me take the fight to Lori Chavez-DeRemer and flip this critical swing district in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71678490/432884845/974409837?refcode=2023-10-16-jordan&recurring=&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=07abaa97-5e6c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FiYWE5Ny01ZTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=00PrtgXB7L_4THu_oeXdDqXgyf5WGFpQ_3oUyFiV3mc=) More soon, _Lynn_ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Lynn Peterson <info@electlynnpeterson.com> Date: Fri, Oct 13, 2023 at 3:15 PM Subject: Surprise: Republicans still can’t get their House in order To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Forwarded Message |

subject: We’re extending the deadline

body:
|
#
---
We messed up, team. Last night, we had a big fundraising deadline to make sure we’re on track to reach our monthly fundraising goal at the end of October, and the bad news is **we missed our goal.** Republicans have already named Nikki a top target heading into 2024, so her race here in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District could decide which party controls the House. With so many critical fights still ahead of us — from investing in our communities’ infrastructure to lowering everyday costs for working families — we can’t afford to let National Republicans expand their majority and further obstruct our progress. We must meet this moment with the same energy we had last year when we helped elect Nikki to Congress. So, we’re extending our deadline until tomorrow night — and we’re asking: **[Can we count on you to rush an urgent donation of $5 or more to help us catch up on our missed goal? clean_body: | We messed up, team. Last night, we had a big fundraising deadline to make sure we’re on track to reach our monthly fundraising goal at the end of October, and the bad news is we missed our goal. Republicans have already named Nikki a top target heading into 2024, so her race here in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District could decide which party controls the House. With so many critical fights still ahead of us — from investing in our communities’ infrastructure to lowering everyday costs for working families — we can’t afford to let National Republicans expand their majority and further obstruct our progress. We must meet this moment with the same energy we had last year when we helped elect Nikki to Congress. So, we’re extending our deadline until tomorrow night — and we’re asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = = | = = | = = Thank you in advance for stepping up today. — Team Nikki Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Crouch?=
subject: Former Frankfort City Councilman, Mulberry Town Councilman-elect Lewis Wheeler Endorses Suzanne Crouch for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Former Frankfort City Councilman and current Mulberry Town Councilman-elect Lewis Wheeler has pledged his endorsement for Suzanne Crouch for Governor.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/former-frankfort-city-councilman-mulberry-town-councilman-elect-lewis-wheeler-endorses-suzanne-crouch-for-governor?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f3f169bfb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_06_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f3f169bfb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Oct. 16, 2023

MEDIA CONTACT
Robert Vane
robert@veteranstrategies.com
Former Frankfort City Councilman, Mulberry Town Councilman-elect Lewis Wheeler

Indianapolis, IND — Former Frankfort City Councilman and current Mulberry Town Councilman-elect Lewis Wheeler has pledged his endorsement of Suzanne Crouch for Governor.

"One of the many things that I love about raising my family in Indiana is the strong capable women in leadership that my daughters can look up to as role models," Wheeler said. "For many years, I had to explain to my girls that there were great women leaders totally different from the Nancy Pelosi’s, Barbara Boxer's, Debbie Wasserman Schulz's, and Kamala Harris's of the Democrat Party. I proudly supported Suzanne Crouch in an election where the great ladies of our state took the Secretary of State's office, the State Treasurer's Office, and the Auditor's Office. I was not surprised when she did an outstanding job of leading our state in her role as State Auditor. I found her warmth and wisdom to set her apart from others. Her leadership, rightfully so, put her on the ticket for Lieutenant Governor when the eyes of the world were on Indiana. She did not disappoint! She delivered! She managed to keep her identity and individualism, all the while diligently working for Indiana in her role as
Lieutenant Governor. I know she will lead us into greater economic growth, a better tax climate, and, all the while, being a shining example for the future young lady leaders of our state. She is the best choice for Governor and she has my full support!"

Wheeler is an Ivy Tech professor and Mulberry Town Councilman-elect. He served as a Frankfort City Councilman from 2015 to 2019.

For more information about Suzanne Crouch and her campaign for Governor, please visit https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4f3f169bfb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_16_06_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f3f169bfb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D.

============================================================
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/email-12656752?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
| [Support Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=bc74d6e566&e=c00a6982d2 "Support Bill Eigel")
---
|
---
| | Dear fellow Patriots,

I wanted to provide some updates. Since the campaign launched, we have been traveling from county to county meeting with so many incredible Missourians.
* Missourians fighting to protect their children from pornographic material and the gender-industrial-complex.
* Missourians who are trying to put food on the table amidst rising inflation.
* Missourians who are crying out for free and fair elections.

The message is clear: Missourians are sick and tired of the status quo. They are tired of out-of-touch politicians taking us down a path of managed decline. They want a fighter, and I promise you - I will be that fighter. I hope you will [_**join us**_](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=07715ce021&e=c00a6982d2) in this fight to deliver a bold, conservative Missouri.

Take some time and see what we've been up to below!

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: this time last year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey Derek, do you remember this time last year as well as I do? We were in our final month of the 2022 election, traveling to every corner of our Commonwealth to talk with voters about the issues most important to working families and local communities. **I remember how much was on the line.** From protecting abortion rights to defending the right to vote and our democracy, I knew just how high the stakes were for hard-working Pennsylvanians. **But on Election Day, millions of Pennsylvanians came together to send a clear message: Here in Pennsylvania,_real freedom will always prevail._** Now, our hard work is paying off. In just the past year, we’ve expanded opportunities for Pennsylvania workers, enacted universal free breakfast so no child starts the school day hungry, and enacted automatic voter registration or every Pennsylvanian eligible to vote. This time last year, our victory was far from certain — but because of the strength of this people-powered team, we came together and defeated the far-right’s divisive vision for Pennsylvanian, and immediately got to work. **But this fight isn’t over. It’s just getting started.** And I know that far-right extremists will try to halt our progress every chance they get. clean_body: Hey Derek, do you remember this time last year as well as I do? We were in our final month of the 2022 election, traveling to every corner of our Commonwealth to talk with voters about the issues most important to working families and local communities. I remember how much was on the line. From protecting abortion rights to defending the right to vote and our democracy, I knew just how high the stakes were for hard-working Pennsylvanians. But on Election Day, millions of Pennsylvanians came together to send a clear message: Here in Pennsylvania,real freedom will always prevail. Now, our hard work is paying off. In just the past year, we’ve expanded opportunities for Pennsylvania workers, enacted universal free breakfast so no child starts the school day hungry, and enacted automatic voter registration or every Pennsylvanian eligible to vote. This time last year, our victory was far from certain — but because of the strength of this people-powered team, we came together and defeated the far-right’s divisive vision for Pennsylvanian, and immediately got to work. But this fight isn’t over. It’s just getting started. | **_BREAKING from THE NEW YORK TIMES:_
"DeSantis Wants to ROLL BACK Press Freedom"** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231016_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=2027%2E564421%2E5Wi6YN) We're boiling with rage at Ron DeSantis right now.

**The NYT just reported that DeSantis is going all-out DICTATOR in his attempt to destroy the Freedom of the Press.**

He wants to sue, bankrupt, and jail reporters who fight against him!

Listen, DeSantis is praying that good people like you don't take action to stop him.

[Our team has been fighting DeSantis since DAY ONE, and now we're launching a brand new petition to show public anger against his plot. We need to see 10,000 signatures to defend the press by 10:00 P.M. or else DeSantis will become a full-blown dictator!!](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231016_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=2027%2E564421%2E5Wi6YN) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE PRESS AGAINST RON DESANTIS »](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231016_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=2027%2E564421%2E5Wi6YN)
---
We know you're busy... but please, take a moment to read these key excerpts from the article:
"Over the course of an hour, Mr. DeSantis and his guests laid out a detailed case for **revisiting a landmark Supreme Court decision protecting the press from defamation lawsuits**."

"The decision set a higher bar for defamation lawsuits involving public figures, and for years it was viewed as sacrosanct. **That standard has empowered journalists to investigate and criticize public figures without fear that an unintentional error will result in crippling financial penalties.** "

"Mr. DeSantis, a likely Republican presidential candidate, **put the effort at the center of his war against the mainstream media.** "

"**Two justices on the conservative-majority Supreme Court, Clarence Thomas and Neil M. Gorsuch, have indicated their willingness to roll back the ruling** in written dissents in recent years..."
---
As you can see, this situation is becoming more dire by the day – the MAGA Supreme Court could be ready to back DeSantis!!

[We need to fight back against wannabe Dictator DeSantis – NOW. Please do the right thing, and add your name to this petition standing with the Free Press immediately! »](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20231016_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=2027%2E564421%2E5Wi6YN)

Peter:

I’m stressed. My finance team just called me to let me know we’re still
$23,736 short of our October fundraising goal — this is especially bad
news because national Republican groups are attacking me earlier than ever
before.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=1337%2E35263%2EZzPGqQ ]Before I explain any more, I wanted to ask: Is there any way you can
split a contribution between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign to help us
reach our mid-month fundraising goal today? It’s important.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Jon Tester and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-tester.5zk3A_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=1337%2E35263%2EZzPGqQ ]SPLIT $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=1337%2E35263%2EZzPGqQ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve
someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in
Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to
fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union
jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable
internet and hospitals within driving distance.

Peter, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from
most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I still farm the same land my
grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s
right for the people of Montana and across the country.

Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and
shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on
grassroots supporters like you.

That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this
one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long
way in a campaign like ours.

So, here’s the part where I ask: [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=1337%2E35263%2EZzPGqQ ]Can you make a split contribution of
$17.77 (our average online donation) today to Tammy Baldwin and my
campaign to meet our mid-month goal? Your donations keep me fighting for
regular folks in Washington and will help us respond to the onslaught of
out-of-state money coming in to attack my record.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Jon Tester and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-tester.5zk3A_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=1337%2E35263%2EZzPGqQ ]SPLIT $10 NOW

We’re close to the finish line, and your support right now really helps me

— Jon

Patriot,

---
This Halloween, it’s really going to be hard to find something scarier than the idea that the greatest, freest, strongest, richest, most powerful country in world history is being run by a zombie.

---

**BREAKING: Calls mount for House GOP to recruit Liz Cheney for Speakership after Rep. Steve Scalise drops out** After Cheney stood up to Donald Trump and participated in the January 6th Committee, she earned the respect of a lot of Americans.

So we’re not surprised that there are voters calling for her to be the next Speaker of the House.

**But we must know what local Democrats think. So we’re conducting an urgent poll:** **[Do you think the House GOP should nominate Liz Cheney to be speaker?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-speaker?source=FFR_20231016_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=20307%2E4449941%2ERbpoxM)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-speaker?source=FFR_20231016_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=20307%2E4449941%2ERbpoxM) | **[YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-speaker?source=FFR_20231016_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=20307%2E4449941%2ERbpoxM)**

body:
BREAKING NEWS
Trump-backed Jim Jordan chosen as Speaker nominee
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js]
Hi, it’s Jeff Sites, the Democratic Army Veteran running for Congress against Jim Jordan.
My opponent was just chosen as a GOP nominee to become Speaker of the House of Representatives -- having received 124 votes from fellow Republicans in a secret ballot.
Jim Jordan also has the backing of Donald Trump and others inside the MAGA caucus.
It’s unclear if he’ll eventually become Speaker – but it’s looking very possible, and that should scare the hell out of us.
I’m running for Congress to defeat Jim Jordan – not just to make sure he isn’t Speaker – but to make sure he’s retired from American politics.
I need your help to send him packing. Will you split $20 or more between Roland Gutierrez’s campaign against Ted Cruz and my efforts to send Jim Jordan into political retirement once and for all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js]
Jim Jordan is a conspiracy theorist, Trump-loving, partisan hack. The American people – and the people of Ohio’s 4th district – deserve so much better than him representing them.
I intend to defeat him at the polls. But I need your help.
Thanks for your support,
Jeff Sites
P.S. If you want to learn more about my background, please watch my campaign launch video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-js] and consider pitching in a few bucks to help me spread the word:

subject: We are the resistance stopping Jordan’s Speaker bid
body:
Farmers, fighters for democracy and freedom, and you—| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679953/432890608/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)
---
Friend, It looks like Jim Jordan spent the weekend busily bribing and lying to GOP members who were holding out voting for him to become the next Speaker of the House. This morning, more so-called “never Jordan” spineless members of the Republican caucus announced that they would flip flop and vote for Jordan on the floor tomorrow. Even former Speaker Kevin McCarthy, who lasted less than nine months as Speaker of the ungovernable House GOP, is now saying to Fox News that **he feels “very good” about Jordan winning 217 Republicans in Tuesday’s floor vote:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679954/432890609/1649708063?refcode=eoq3-thanksNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679955/432890610/1649708063?refcode=resistanceML_graphic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)
---
What is standing in Jordan’s way now that some of the more flexible House Republicans are bending themselves into pretzels to justify their turnabout on Jordan’s fitness to lead? The answer is: **US! You, this team, and the people on the ground in our district. People all across the country see the threat of Jordan becoming Speaker of the House and aren’t going to accept it lying down.** Take our friend Chris Gibbs, a former GOP County Chair in Shelby County and rural Ohio farmer. Chris has been a constituent of Jordan’s for decades, and he recently came out swinging against Jim Jordan’s cynical takeover of the House GOP:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679956/432890611/1649708063?refcode=eoq3-thanksNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679957/432890612/1649708063?refcode=resistanceML_graphic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)
---
The threat that Jim Jordan poses to the entire country is massive, and real—and now more imminent than ever. But the resistance is strong, and we need to keep up the pressure and work harder to fight back against Jordan. We need to hit him where it hurts by lifting Tamie to victory and kicking Jordan out of Congress altogether. Jordan is unpopular at home, and his ploy to become Speaker is not supported here. **[Tamie can defeat him, with the resources and support to run big guns in this campaign. Can you help Tamie build the machine to take on Jim Jordan and win with a contribution of $25 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679958/432890613/1649708063?refcode=resistanceNGP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71679959/432890614/1649708063?refcode=eoq3-thanksNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg5OTZhN2YtNjQ2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8ukg_bQy_YlSg61CwXdmb1CFb9GmSlv5nx62RUay_6I=)

Hi team, I learned as an Army officer that one of the most important things a leader can do is _listen_. And as someone who is applying for the job of Representative it's important to me that I... well... _represent_. So I wanted to check in as a team and hear from you directly about what's weighing most on your mind right now — whether it’s national security, book bans, healthcare, the cost of groceries, reproductive freedom, or whatever comes to mind. **[Will you take 2 minutes to share your thoughts so I can fight for the things that matter most to you? Use this form>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71680216/432891362/2084408855?ms=EM_FL_EHA_20231016_su_fallsurvey_cand_kw_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzljNDYxOC02NTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5bRcLxg5roEyVRZErGL28ieIMzpyiqTxn-FvLJstBvo=&emci=d6187987-516c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=979c4618-656c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)** | [Share Your Thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71680217/432891363/2084408855?ms=EM_FL_EHA_20231016_su_fallsurvey_cand_kw_30da_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzljNDYxOC02NTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5bRcLxg5roEyVRZErGL28ieIMzpyiqTxn-FvLJstBvo=&emci=d6187987-516c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=979c4618-656c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5643323)

Ashley 🚁

name: John Padora for Congress
subject: fwd: Ken Buck and Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw John’s message, friend. Republicans in Washington all the way from as extreme as Lauren Boebert to as ineffective as Ken Buck have let us down.
__ | | | We wanted to make sure you saw John’s message, friend. Republicans in Washington, from as extreme as Lauren Boebert to as ineffective as Ken Buck, have let us down. They’ve let our district down. They’ve let our state down. And they’ve let our country down. And we’ve had enough. **[Send someone who will fight for us to Congress by donating to John Padora’s campaign before the end of the day today.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=20ab36c6e34a493cbe5c15b7c3165797&_e=n1tUQHgllnyfVOog5HQgA-TzfJmDW5iTLwST3nzAcBdkEoSkz-Ypvbi63mpPb1xzEL1lnLaRsTz0FkUm1c1xDBLpWOe8v-vXmOfLTd1pBa-RnsFYP-acKOgfA1_iCI6rwCPLCTKmzoeJbOcoIpDI4r6qZYXgo2oKK5Uq23YKH3F2fZ-0qv9L7MoVpMsrkJdOmPCPBzmmZxBygqAXxLu5K_9PfslHEJUcP7T49PFy02z5ITe0btN80PJp949Brd_48HgkLHxFD4r4qsUyzGtqQUrrguIDywvJm_vZgf2RXRm0YhNIRfuTYllvLMF8bBsxEDCq5k37-VswQlvx03EROzYwDHTmsjBoelWR6yXBReU_SZiyHiDUpXjPrEv27phmOVgJDfNnmaJCVumWK1O3BnIxEivUbmfUKykYDAASu9o%3D)** Thank you, John Padora for Congress \------ Begin original message ------ [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=20ab36c6e34a493cbe5c15b7c3165797&_e=n1tUQHgllnyfVOog5HQgA-TzfJmDW5iTLwST3nzAcBdkEoSkz-Ypvbi63mpPb1xzEL1lnLaRsTz0FkUm1c1xDBLpWOe8v-vXmOfLTd1pBa-RnsFYP-acKOgfA1_iCI6rwCPLCTKmzoeJbOcoIpDI4r6qZYXgo2oKK5Uq23YKH3F2fZ-0qv9L7MoVpMsrkJdOmPCPBzmmZxBygqAXxLu5K_9PfslHEJUcP7T49PFy02z5ITe0btN80PJp949Brd_4LXTkCBxpPJ6xTedrfD-6UEmGgTlvASWMZCzWDe7lJm3P3-vXM5Snog26vxBVD27EVKc815_CAYFkyVQdO8AbwCQTQTBnoj4CMcKIC99fCES6r4XM2_QAzCoDPEySzigRP-g6Z6YVJsb_l23RyOk72ukZyRB3IYCU9sx6BaZbiQY%3D) You might not think Ken Buck and Lauren Boebert have much in common. Lauren Boebert is, after all, one of the most unhinged and extreme members of Congress in Washington. But they are both hurting our country in different ways. Boebert spews extremism, chaos, and disunity all for some soundbites and viral videos on social media. Ken Buck doesn’t do that, but he certainly has enabled people like Boebert to feel empowered in their extremism. And that extremism has led to a dysfunctional and chaotic House. I want to go to Washington to fix the problems facing our community. I want us to get back to doing our jobs rather than causing chaos. But I need your help to do it. **[Will you chip in $20.24 to help me reach my 10/16 mid-month goal, defeat Ken Buck, flip the House back to Democratic control, AND fight for you in Washington?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=20ab36c6e34a493cbe5c15b7c3165797&_e=n1tUQHgllnyfVOog5HQgA-TzfJmDW5iTLwST3nzAcBdkEoSkz-Ypvbi63mpPb1xzEL1lnLaRsTz0FkUm1c1xDBLpWOe8v-vXmOfLTd1pBa-RnsFYP-acKOgfA1_iCI6rwCPLCTKmzoeJbOcoIpDI4r6qZYXgo2oKK5Uq23YKH3F2fZ-0qv9L7MoVpMsrkJdOmPCPBzmmZxBygqAXxLu5K_9PfslHEJUcP7T49PFy02yB4-Sk55MtaOVxzf6wARZp0EyKTz5O9CBmhev57WsfmkrbWBINivbJVPEkZSh13FEiW-UF9ZEuUcKyz_kuZ5SCFHvSxyVm5MSoLtEB3T3aJuJwagHd6Nc2nLyXHk4iCp8_EfZem_-5ENdQuieQGkE17y78TTWBz1HVJoIGxKJ_t3JV_VLUAucHWIW2xfOAQOI%3D)** I’ve told you that both Democrats and Republicans have left communities like ours behind. But now it’s clear to me that only Democrats are interested in actually solving any of these problems. The Republicans can’t even agree on who should be Speaker. **[If you’ve had enough of this, chip in to help me defeat Ken Buck and fight for you and for the Fourth District.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=20ab36c6e34a493cbe5c15b7c3165797&_e=n1tUQHgllnyfVOog5HQgA-TzfJmDW5iTLwST3nzAcBdkEoSkz-Ypvbi63mpPb1xzEL1lnLaRsTz0FkUm1c1xDBLpWOe8v-vXmOfLTd1pBa-RnsFYP-acKOgfA1_iCI6rwCPLCTKmzoeJbOcoIpDI4r6qZYXgo2oKK5Uq23YKH3F2fZ-0qv9L7MoVpMsrkJdOmPCPBzmmZxBygqAXxLu5K_9PfslHEJUcP7T49PFy02z5ITe0btN80PJp949Brd_4DjmA-5B-WJp3t3FrRr0Z6KfeuhXKyNXDryUfo-jL1jo3S7PBUVjXWHF1iNHhD4ll28FDqqH7XBzG-k2aOVuFyXQnFt_W5RsRCrXJSJyXWLdNBhcvRSeqS2mHy-Y1M9-2oe3n6-IF1Sx0wF54bZtIKwVxb1DDTA5Rc-sGtN70p2Q%3D)** Thanks, John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=20ab36c6e34a493cbe5c15b7c3165797&_e=n1tUQHgllnyfVOog5HQgAzxfjsq_Z_7Oa8xFsonPdu5WOmk3_nfoWdSH8ChCzkIQ4XbH8ODHnQ8r6RLy_x-scWMJQDxATfviezOpJMfBPRwCnswPfM5HklIQGSqBqBpJXYtdFSpTGQYIArVqD1dwlRtqbT9bQQ3OwHRgOodf0JZIwgmMnLE5tOevvaZGiGaDiUPaaSywa8Q6Ty8L9zGoqA%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=20ab36c6e34a493cbe5c15b7c3165797&_e=n1tUQHgllnyfVOog5HQgA-TzfJmDW5iTLwST3nzAcBdkEoSkz-Ypvbi63mpPb1xzEL1lnLaRsTz0FkUm1c1xDBLpWOe8v-vXmOfLTd1pBa-RnsFYP-acKOgfA1_iCI6rwCPLCTKmzoeJbOcoIpDI4r6qZYXgo2oKK5Uq23YKH3F2fZ-0qv9L7MoVpMsrkJdOmPCPBzmmZxBygqAXxLu5K_9PfslHEJUcP7T49PFy02yQJq1L6dwxpy65qb2QS6c8KfIqGzgZfuar7bGnMzlKWilvVec3Jw16O1J2FGj_epHLI5lJvABlakAR6L7jK6OA5CLXQ2Lb4dazL67xEzSd1BjO23oY6UChJ_EztSOWUQ1ChnJrKxAarqlRJBQqYk-jvRTfowgH_ZevW30zyFUfvyDeW6GFg2JUe-4lOVSXcoY%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: A mother grizzly was killed and now her cub is an orphan
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Hunting season is taking its toll. Help protect grizzlies and the planet before it’s too late: Donate $27 today!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053720?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053721?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053722?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053723?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
A mama grizzly bear was GUNNED DOWN in Montana. **Her cub is now an orphan.** And it will likely starve or freeze to death without her. Not to mention, hunting season is picking up. That means the helpless, orphaned cub may even get caught in the crossfire of trophy hunters. [_**Don’t let another grizzly cub face the same fate. Donate $27 today and help protect grizzly bears and the planet before another grizzly dies.**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053724?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053724?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
With hunting season in full swing, this may not be the last we hear of preventable grizzly deaths. While grizzlies are protected under the Endangered Species Act, black bears aren’t so lucky. Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting them across the country. They **trap them with painful metal clamps.** They release hunting dogs to **track and terrorize bears** before they are murdered.
And now, trophy hunters and private interests are chomping at the bit to remove protections for grizzly bears. That would let them kill more bears and take over their lands. All to turn a profit. With _**only 2,000 grizzlies remaining**_ in the lower 48 states, we’re running out of time to save them. But it isn’t too late yet. Thanks to generous supporters like you, we still have a chance to make real change. Change that would help protect grizzlies and the lands they call home. But we’re up against the powerful trophy hunting lobby. And if we don’t act soon, we could lose grizzlies forever.
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053725?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Vulnerable grizzlies are in serious trouble this hunting season. Donate $27 now to help protect them and the planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053720?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053721?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053722?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053723?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Grizzly bears once numbered 50,000 in the continental U.S. But human impact decimated their population. **Hunting, trapping, and habitat loss put grizzlies at serious risk.** That’s why they received protections under the Endangered Species Act.
But even with protections, grizzlies are still struggling to survive. Their habitat is shrinking. Their food sources are increasingly hard to find. And climate change is driving them closer to the brink. As a result, **_fewer and fewer cubs are surviving to reach adulthood._** And adult bears are dying at alarming rates, too.
Soon, _things could get even worse for grizzlies._ States in the northern Rockies are working to remove ESA protections for these threatened animals. If they succeed, there will be devastating consequences. Trophy hunters could be allowed to kill grizzlies indiscriminately, and with no consequences. And once grizzlies are driven out of their lands, Big Polluters will swoop in. They have hopes to open these lands up for mining, logging, and other planet-harming practices.
As if that wasn’t enough, removing protections for grizzlies will make them vulnerable to some of the most gruesome hunting practices we’ve seen. Just last year, Idaho Fish and Game found a female grizzly with **12 bullets** in her. **She was shot an estimated 40 times.** No animal deserves this fate, Friend. But without protections, more and more grizzlies could be staring down the barrel of a trophy hunter’s gun.
**Protect bears and the planet from greedy interests before the loss is too great. Rush your $27 donation now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053720?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053721?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053722?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053723?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We can’t afford for grizzlies to lose their protections. What you may not know is that _grizzlies help keep our planet healthy!_ These intelligent animals keep prey populations in check. That allows other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, grizzlies roam far and wide, enriching soils and transporting vital nutrients as they go. But it doesn’t end there -- scientists are continuously discovering more and more ways grizzlies play an important part in their ecosystems.
That’s why we have to protect these bears at all costs. And that means protecting the Endangered Species Act. These vital laws don’t just protect bears, though. They provide critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. They’re also some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change.
Yet, trophy hunters and Big Polluters think it’s more important to kill for fun and put our planet in danger. All for the sake of profit. **Plain and simple, the inhumane treatment of bears and their cubs can’t continue.** One bullet doesn’t just kill a mother bear. It means her cubs will be left to die as well. And if bears are wiped out, their lands will be ravaged for profit, too.
I need you in this fight if bears and the planet are going to stand a chance. Your membership support to Friends of the Earth today will allow us to take a stand against private interests who want to hunt down vulnerable species like bears, wreak havoc on their environments, and are contributing to ecological destruction on our planet. Join the fight for our planet and precious bears before they are hunted to extinction, and make your $27 membership contribution today!
**Bear cubs may soon be left to starve or freeze to death. Protect them and our planet and donate $27 today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053720?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053721?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053722?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2053723?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

body:
With every passing month, the fossil fuel industry is doubling down on its efforts to keep its allies in elected office to expand their stranglehold and deter climate action.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71681056/432894316/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231016-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjNmJhNDY0LTY3NmMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YORBtYaaMrKYeDGVtozLNDlEevazxriPiGYT7DJTy5E=)

| As we head into the final months of 2023, we’re gearing up to move full steam ahead to continue to do the most important work to protect our planet and its people.

With every passing month, the fossil fuel industry is doubling down on its efforts to keep its allies in elected office to expand their stranglehold and deter climate action. _**But we cannot sit idly by.**_

[_**That’s why today I’m asking you to invest $5 in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71681058/432894318/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231016-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjNmJhNDY0LTY3NmMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YORBtYaaMrKYeDGVtozLNDlEevazxriPiGYT7DJTy5E=)

**$5 may not seem like much compared to the millions of dollars spent by the fossil fuel industry, but if everyone reading this email invested just $5 in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, it enables us to:**

**✅** Invest much-needed resources in crucial races up and down the ballot to support our climate champions who are not beholden to fossil fuel money and are fighting to protect our planet.

**📋** Hire more staff and recruit more volunteers to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, and get out the vote for our climate champions.

**🚪** Launch our neighbor-to-neighbor field organizing program to help take the fight against Big Oil door-to-door in key districts and elect climate champions down the ballot.

We’re fighting to secure a livable future, and you are an essential part of our movement. Every dollar has an immediate impact on our ambitious plan, and we need you on our side.

[_**Will you contribute $5 today to show your support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and join us as we do the most important work of our lifetime?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71681060/432894320/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231016-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjNmJhNDY0LTY3NmMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YORBtYaaMrKYeDGVtozLNDlEevazxriPiGYT7DJTy5E=)

clean_body: With every passing month, the fossil fuel industry is doubling down on its efforts to keep its allies in elected office to expand their stranglehold and deter climate action. | = | As we head into the final months of 2023, we’re gearing up to move full steam ahead to continue to do the most important work to protect our planet and its people. With every passing month, the fossil fuel industry is doubling down on its efforts to keep its allies in elected office to expand their stranglehold and deter climate action. But we cannot sit idly by. = $5 may not seem like much compared to the millions of dollars spent by the fossil fuel industry, but if everyone reading this email invested just $5 in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, it enables us to: ✅ Invest much-needed resources in crucial races up and down the ballot to support our climate champions who are not beholden to fossil fuel money and are fighting to protect our planet. 📋 Hire more staff and recruit more volunteers to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, and get out the vote for our climate champions. 🚪 Launch our neighbor-to-neighbor field organizing program to help take the fight against Big Oil door-to-door in key districts and elect climate champions down the ballot. We’re fighting to secure a livable future, and you are an essential part of our movement. Every dollar has an immediate impact on our ambitious plan, and we need you on our side. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. **Jim Jordan’s extremism knows no bounds — he is the one of the last people we need holding the gavel in the House.**

Jordan has repeatedly abused his power in Congress, tried to get the results of the 2020 election overturned, and has spent years doing Trump’s dirty work — not to mention his racist attacks at Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg and Fulton County DA Fani Willis for simply doing their jobs.

The American people deserve better. We deserve a leader willing to work for _US_ , not for Trump, an extreme agenda, or special interests.

[Peter, we don’t need a MAGA crony leading in the House. name: Team Reeves
subject: Release: Reeves Elected Chair of Key Subcommittee Paving the Way for Virginia Gaming Commission
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Contact:James ManetzLegislative Director, Office of Senator Bryce Reevesjames@brycereeves.com(540) 645-8440Reeves Elected Chair of Key Subcommittee Paving the Way for Virginia Gaming CommissionOctober 16th, 2023: RICHMOND, VA- Today, Senator B
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/OWu6qdLMLCrN4U2E_f0XRMIngiE=343)
---
| Contact:James ManetzLegislative Director, Office of Senator Bryce Reevesjames@brycereeves.com(540) 645-8440
---
| Reeves Elected Chair of Key Subcommittee Paving the Way for Virginia Gaming Commission
---
| | |
---
| October 16th, 2023: RICHMOND, VA- Today, Senator Bryce Reeves ([R-Spotsylvania](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fapps.senate.virginia.gov%2FSenator%2Fmemberpage.php%3Fid=S88/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/BOSzLUVmRqq5xNlNKgyP4l4Hub0=343)) was unanimously elected chairman of the [Joint Subcommittee to Study the Feasibility of Establishing the Virginia Gaming Commission](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fstudies.virginiageneralassembly.gov%2Fstudies%2F667/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/w0iaZltNA1xnmmsk3qpkfxigF5s=343) following a nomination from Senator McPike ([D-Manassas](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fapps.senate.virginia.gov%2FSenator%2Fmemberpage.php%3Fid=S98/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/PTHBTIQl3DbqmikoUKf7PRnI1kg=343)). Delegate Paul Krizek ([D-Fairfax](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fvirginiageneralassembly.gov%2Fhouse%2Fmembers%2Fmembers.php%3Fid=H0281/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/VqPu1pIKHR_DoIzn65mN5I7nFMc=343)) was promptly elected Vice-Chair by the Subcommittee. The Subcommittee, established by the passage [HJ548](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=231%26typ=bil%26val=hj548/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/_6OURjXmtKvVsi26mnrRVVJkBp8=343) during the 2023 Virginia General Assembly Legislative Session, had its inaugural meeting today in the new General Assembly Building. [HJ548](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=231%26typ=bil%26val=hj548/2/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/zAkbN6BDRxZSqo9UiKPwyeOXNEI=343), a Joint Resolution patroned by Delegate Krizek and co-patroned by Delegate Terry Austin ([R-Alleghany](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fvirginiageneralassembly.gov%2Fhouse%2Fmembers%2Fmembers.php%3Fid=h0253/1/0100018b3a514a66-87fb39d8-6571-4205-90d9-01db8f89e26a-000000/EzcY2gFszgG8no3WWPYJ7LIjTKw=343)) and Senator Reeves, seeks to unify oversight and enforcement of Virginia’s gaming system. Currently, this falls under Virginia Alcoholic Beverage Control (VA ABC), the Virginia Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services (VDACS), the Virginia Racing Commission (VRC), and the Virginia Lottery Board. Senator Reeves emphasized the significance of the Subcommittee's role in adapting to the evolving digital landscape. In his opening remarks as Chair, he stated, “I appreciate what the members on this dais have done over the past few years. The very complicated gambling setup is one of the [main] reasons we are here. Online gaming platforms have become increasingly popular raising questions about jurisdiction and oversight, and we as policymakers must adapt to the digital landscape. Players and establishments must have confidence that their games are conducted fairly and securely. We know that there has been an insidious aspect of this business targeting our low-income and minority communities. We need to build confidence in this industry’s integrity by safeguarding the vulnerable among us. Virginia must lead in fostering a well-regulated gambling industry that services its citizens and fosters a better future.“ In his opening remarks as Vice-Chair, Delegate Krizek acknowledged the significant and recent transformation of Virginia's gambling landscape, emphasizing the importance of effective regulation. "Virginia’s gambling landscape has experienced remarkable transformation as you all know. The General Assembly recognizes this and has tasked this committee with ensuring that effective regulation is a priority. Indeed, effective regulation must be the core component of whatever gaming agency structure we choose to put forward. Likewise, we must include attention to a uniform and robust problem gambling prevention and treatment effort.“ Members of the Subcommittee are united in their efforts to establish a single regulatory agency for the comprehensive oversight and enforcement of all gaming activities in Virginia. This could include sports betting, casinos, historical horse racing terminals, skill games, and more, with the aim of eliminating conflicts of interest and promoting a fair and secure gaming environment.
---

Likewise, we must include attention to a uniform and robust problem gambling prevention and treatment effort.“ Members of the Subcommittee are united in their efforts to establish a single regulatory agency for the comprehensive oversight and enforcement of all gaming activities in Virginia. This could include sports betting, casinos, historical horse racing terminals, skill games, and more, with the aim of eliminating conflicts of interest and promoting a fair and secure gaming environment. | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | or | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
