name: John Fetterman
subject: Can I count on you to help out Sara Innamorato today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Sara Innamorato is running for Allegheny County Executive, and PA’s crucial upcoming elections are just weeks away.
#
Hey Derek,
Sara Innamorato is running for Allegheny County Executive, and PA’s crucial upcoming elections are just weeks away.
Allegheny County is my home, it's where I chose to raise a family, and I know that our neighbors deserve a collaborative and passionate leader like Sara as our next Executive.
But **Sara is being outspent 8 to 1 in this race.** She’ll need a lot of grassroots support to be able to fight back, so I need to ask:
**[Can I count on you to show up for Sara by chipping in $5 or whatever you can to her campaign today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49738?t=1&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)**
**[Donate »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49738?t=2&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)**
Sara Innamorato would be the first woman to serve as Allegheny County Executive, and she has always fought for all of us. I served as Mayor in Braddock for four terms, and I know that Sara has the tools to be a successful executive and bring people together from all around this county.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49738?t=3&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)
**Republicans are pouring million$ into this race to try to defeat Sara, so we need to stand with her.**
**[So please, chip in $5 or anything you are able to help Sara. We need to do everything we can to ensure that Sara Innamorato can win against her opponent and continue delivering real progress for Allegheny County.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49738?t=4&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)**
Thank you!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231016-8622-footer&t=5&refcode2=8622_434096_TxEmIN&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=8622%2E434096%2ETxEmIN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Lose Cruz PAC
subject: An update on Q3
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
This shouldn’t surprise Ted since he spends most of his time working on his sh*tty podcast.
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=120%2E623276%2EmMGQTf)
Last week, we told you part-time Senator Ted Cruz raised more than $5.4 million in the third quarter — more than his closest Democratic opponent, Rep. Colin Allred.
Since then, _a lot_ has changed (and quite dramatically) but we’re definitely not complaining. **Take a look for yourself:** 👀⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231016?refcode=em20231016&amount=&refcode2=120_623276_mMGQTf&akid=120%2E623276%2EmMGQTf)
Last week’s Q3 numbers were preliminary. Yesterday marked the Q3 FEC filing deadline where the final numbers were released. This is now the _second_ quarter in a row where Allred has trounced Cruz in fundraising.
**
It's clear to us Texans are ready for a change. And we're looking to help them by doing everything we can to Lose Cruz next November.**
And while the 2024 election may seem like a distant thought, we know that while yesterday’s news was a reassuring boost to our movement, the road ahead will still be challenging and it’s essential that we continue to outraise Ted if we’re going to send him into retirement once and for all.
_**But we'll need a surge of grassroots support if we're going to stay competitive and _win_. [Can you pitch in $5 or anything you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231016?refcode=em20231016&amount=5&refcode2=120_623276_mMGQTf&akid=120%2E623276%2EmMGQTf)_**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231016?amount=5&refcode=em20231016&refcode2=120_623276_mMGQTf&akid=120%2E623276%2EmMGQTf)**
Thank you! 🙂
In solidarity,
— LCPAC

name: Dr. Anita Somani (via Ohio Dems)
subject: The best prescription I can write...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
is for Ohio to vote YES on Issue One
|
Team, I recently stood with Ohio Democrats in support of Issue One, which would protect reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution and prevent laws like the GOP’s extremist anti-abortion ban from taking effect. ****As an OB-GYN – as well as an Ohio state representative – I know firsthand exactly how important that protection is, which is why ****[I’m asking you right now to chip in and help fuel the fight for reproductive freedom ahead of Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71681835/432897079/-1291348375?refcode=odp_em_231016_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNkYzIyOS02YjZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6raAudFkJ18aroOxfqO6BG2DNb15tN6BoHO5Ce19XrY=)**** Issue One isn’t about politics, and it’s not even just about abortion access. It’s also about the right to IVF, contraception, and the right of all to make the healthcare and reproductive decisions that are right for us, without interference from the government or politicians with no medical experience or background. We’ve seen the consequences of such an extremist ban right here in Ohio. Last summer, when the GOP ban was in effect, physicians and patients weren’t sure what options they had. This led to a lot of confusion, and to patients being sent out of state for care – including a ten-year-old who needed abortion care. But during that same period, there were women in hospitals facing life-threatening situations, and doctors like myself and my colleagues faced with the prospect of losing their patient or their license. These are the same circumstances playing out in other states with such restrictions – like Idaho, where maternity centers are shutting down and doctors are leaving the state rather than come to a place where the care they could provide would be criminalized and their own ability to have a family impacted. I’m working every day to care for Ohio women and families. And the best prescription I can write is for Ohio to vote YES on Issue One by November 7. But time is running out, and it’s all hands on deck. So I’m asking, right now:** **[Will you pitch in $5 to help support the fight for reproductive healthcare and elect Democrats in Ohio who will stand up for our healthcare access and our fundamental rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71681841/432897092/-1291348375?refcode=odp_em_231016_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNkYzIyOS02YjZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6raAudFkJ18aroOxfqO6BG2DNb15tN6BoHO5Ce19XrY=)**** Thank you for standing up in this important fight. Dr. Anita Somani
OB-GYN
Ohio State Representative, HD 11 ** ** | ****A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →**** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71681842/432897093/-1291348375?refcode=odp_em_231016_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNkYzIyOS02YjZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6raAudFkJ18aroOxfqO6BG2DNb15tN6BoHO5Ce19XrY=) **

clean_body: is for Ohio to vote YES on Issue One | Team, I recently stood with Ohio Democrats in support of Issue One, which would protect reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution and prevent laws like the GOP’s extremist anti-abortion ban from taking effect. **As an OB-GYN – as well as an Ohio state representative – I know firsthand exactly how important that protection is, which is why = Issue One isn’t about politics, and it’s not even just about abortion access. It’s also about the right to IVF, contraception, and the right of all to make the healthcare and reproductive decisions that are right for us, without interference from the government or politicians with no medical experience or background. We’ve seen the consequences of such an extremist ban right here in Ohio. Last summer, when the GOP ban was in effect, physicians and patients weren’t sure what options they had. This led to a lot of confusion, and to patients being sent out of state for care – including a ten-year-old who needed abortion care. But during that same period, there were women in hospitals facing life-threatening situations, and doctors like myself and my colleagues faced with the prospect of losing their patient or their license. These are the same circumstances playing out in other states with such restrictions – like Idaho, where maternity centers are shutting down and doctors are leaving the state rather than come to a place where the care they could provide would be criminalized and their own ability to have a family impacted. I’m working every day to care for Ohio women and families. And the best prescription I can write is for Ohio to vote YES on Issue One by November 7. But time is running out, and it’s all hands on deck. So I’m asking, right now: = Thank you for standing up in this important fight. Dr. Anita Somani OB-GYN Ohio State Representative, HD 11 | A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? → | = ** | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

Peter,

In 2022, Latina workers earned _**only 52 cents to the dollar paid to white, non-Hispanic male workers.**_

We’re leading the way! Linda joins the ranks of Latinas fighting for equal pay.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: NEW: CA special election called
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Here’s how it’s going to make things more challenging.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31559%2E3422442%2EgaAV_0)
Governor Newsom has officially called a special election in the race for California’s Senate seat. **Here’s what that means for us.**
_Quick refresh: After Senator Feinstein passed away, Newsom appointed Laphonza Butler to fulfill the remainder of her term. Senator Butler will serve through at least November 2024. But because of California law, a special election can be held to elect someone who will serve from November 2024 through early January 2025, when all new Senators are sworn in._
**California will now have two elections side by side:**
1. To elect someone to serve November 2024-January 2025
2. To elect someone who will serve a normal six year term beginning in January 2025

The same candidates are running in both races, and there’s one really BIG consequence to that. Check out this Politico headline:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231016-1?refcode=EMAM16_1_SPE_20231016_V1_F&refcode2=31559_3422442_gaAV_0&akid=31559%2E3422442%2EgaAV_0)
That's right, Derek, this race is going to get even more expensive. That’s because contribution limits have now doubled. **So folks who could afford to give $6,600 (the federal limit) can now give $13,200.**
That puts a grassroots powered campaign like ours at a massive disadvantage. Politico reported that as of June 30th, our opponent **Adam Schiff had 495 donors who had already given the max $6,600. If all of those donors gave another $6,600, he’d raise another $3.2 million.**
By comparison, we have 47 donors who have given the maximum, and 99% of our contributions are $100 or less.
Katie is SO proud to be running a grassroots powered campaign, but this unexpected change means we could be facing an even steeper cash deficit than we anticipated. We know this team can help us make up the difference: [**Can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231016-1?refcode=EMAM16_1_SPE_20231016_V1_F&refcode2=31559_3422442_gaAV_0&akid=31559%2E3422442%2EgaAV_0)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231016-1?refcode=EMAM16_1_SPE_20231016_V1_F&refcode2=31559_3422442_gaAV_0&akid=31559%2E3422442%2EgaAV_0)
More to come,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM16_1_SPE_20231016_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31559_3422442_gaAV_0&akid=31559%2E3422442%2EgaAV_0)**

Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
clean_body: Here’s how it’s going to make things more challenging. Governor Newsom has officially called a special election in the race for California’s Senate seat. Here’s what that means for us. Quick refresh: After Senator Feinstein passed away, Newsom appointed Laphonza Butler to fulfill the remainder of her term. Senator Butler will serve through at least November 2024. But because of California law, a special election can be held to elect someone who will serve from November 2024 through early January 2025, when all new Senators are sworn in. California will now have two elections side by side: 1. To elect someone to serve November 2024-January 2025 2. To elect someone who will serve a normal six year term beginning in January 2025 The same candidates are running in both races, and there’s one really BIG consequence to that. Check out this Politico headline: That's right, Derek, this race is going to get even more expensive. That’s because contribution limits have now doubled. So folks who could afford to give $6,600 (the federal limit) can now give $13,200. That puts a grassroots powered campaign like ours at a massive disadvantage. Politico reported that as of June 30th, our opponent Adam Schiff had 495 donors who had already given the max $6,600. If all of those donors gave another $6,600, he’d raise another $3.2 million. By comparison, we have 47 donors who have given the maximum, and 99% of our contributions are $100 or less. Katie is SO proud to be running a grassroots powered campaign, but this unexpected change means we could be facing an even steeper cash deficit than we anticipated. We know this team can help us make up the difference: More to come, Team Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu]
It has been a difficult week, and our thoughts are with everyone affected–especially those in harm’s way. The events in recent weeks remind us of the great responsibility of our elected officials to serve the people. And developments in Washington have shown us the dangers of electing people who do not take that responsibility seriously. That’s why our work together is so important, and we are glad to share our update on the work we are doing.
First, THANK YOU to everyone who contributed ahead of last month’s FEC deadline. We’re proud of the strong campaign we’re building together. In fact, we’ve passed our fundraising milestone of 700 contributions through our digital program!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu]
We couldn’t have done it without people like you responding to these emails. We have a lot more work ahead of us before the primary in March and the general election in November, and we’re glad to know we can count on you to be part of it.
At the recent Texas Tribune Festival [https://www.texastribune.org/2023/09/23/texas-house-democrats-describe-government-chaos/?&emci=8b871d8a-536c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] , Lizzie talked about the importance of taking back the House 2024. With a Democratic majority, we can focus on the issues that matter—like ensuring equal access to the ballot box for all Americans; expanding access to quality, affordable health care; and protecting reproductive rights in all 50 states. Her panel, “The Blue Team,” talked about the challenges and opportunities in the current Congress, and priorities for the next one.
https://www.texastribune.org/2023/09/23/texas-house-democrats-describe-government-chaos/ [https://www.texastribune.org/2023/09/23/texas-house-democrats-describe-government-chaos/]
#TeamLizzie has been hard at work in the district. In the past few weeks, we’ve checked in with local Democratic clubs and organizations to discuss our strategy for winning not only our race in TX-07 but other important races in Texas (think Senate!).
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu]
The conversations we’re having across the district are crucial to our efforts to win back the House next year and send more responsible leaders like Lizzie to Congress so we can put an end to the partisan games we’ve all been observing, especially in recent weeks, and get back to work on the issues that matter to Texans.
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231016wu?refcode=lpfe231016wu]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=Kv%2FjJF6E3HbOKmzMnA0xxaXGnQOOWqywXjWDbMVoKHZSXA%2F4L8y1%2B6lwgqwQFs0LnYB7fqnfTUQYvFai3JI1BgNkFUcgLSnqr5cjEx9hpRPiedLLBCPUFVO%2FDWFYe9WcSyrsuefPF34t9RFt8tis7XImaN%2B9ykemg8r7k9anlTTlrpyMKTXVdz55OrGIBwm349F%2Bkpg8FRwCvxJK8Y%2B7%2B3DxTlmFSG0xvCeRs0gZvd8hQrcrlwJ80pLcIpdUzhij61Ax6uKwHDtr7PU2qlXvPC%2FC%2BwyNi5SlKlQIzsUzKIGlFTQc%2B6%2F1WasmccsQ1yW3apUPA6VvVi8IdC0iY7Kx1eGgWqMM6qSbnuf0FDdTyKmyeRRkTNmPxp9KS20nulWfGrgDk5NNd%2FVbM%2BuJzDrf2%2Bnr1ePtl06EQzoNZ5kleF3uskIr336oaaWn2Sicd7U1 .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Another GOP attempt to silence your voice at the ballot box
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4241%2E5257348%2EK3A2Mb ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I have
some disturbing news to share about yet another GOP attempt to silence
voters’ voices at the ballot box. Before I do, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4241%2E5257348%2EK3A2Mb ]can you make an urgent
$3
contribution to our campaign to help us fight back against this cynical
GOP effort?

Here’s the deal:

A California Republican is introducing legislation in the U.S. House to
limit the campaign contributions we need to help fight back against the
GOP money machine in this U.S. Senate race.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4241%2E5257348%2EK3A2Mb ]Tweet from Rep. Kevin Kiley: I will be introducing legislation to stop
Adam Schiff and other candidates for California's Senate seat from evading
campaign contribution limits. As things stand, they are planning to
solicit double the allowable amount from donors. This is an indirect
consequence of Gavin Newsom's unwillingness to let voters choose either of
their U.S. Senators.

Now take a deep breath before reading further, because this is important:

On March 5, 2024, Californians will actually vote twice in the U.S. Senate
election’s all-parties primary, and vote again on November 5 — twice. Once
for the special election, and once for the general election.

Which means we’re running in double the amount of races. Nothing else in
this race has changed – I don’t take Corporate PAC contributions, so I’m
relying on these grassroots dollars to win. And this Republican is seizing
on the opportunity to try and block us.

With 26 declared candidates in our race according to the Los Angeles
Times, we’re going to need to pour a massive amount of resources into
educating voters about the ballots.

If all these confusing details are making your head spin, that’s exactly
what California Republicans are banking on. Just imagine this nightmare
scenario:

Voters fill in their choice for U.S. Senate in one election while leaving
the other blank — and the GOP money machine seizes on voter confusion,
Trump on the ballot, and a highly consolidated Republican base to sneak
their preferred candidate through with a bare plurality of support.

We can’t put any dirty tricks past the GOP. Least of all by letting this
cynical effort to silence California voters’ voices pick up any traction.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231016_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4241%2E5257348%2EK3A2Mb ]Derek,
with our campaign running in 4 elections between 26 declared candidates
spanning every political party, I’m PERSONALLY asking for ALL the help we
can get to win this race. Can you chip in
$3 to
help my team respond to this GOP power grab and continue our efforts to

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, I have some disturbing news to share about yet another GOP attempt to silence voters’ voices at the ballot box. Before I do, [ ]can you make an urgent $3 contribution to our campaign to help us fight back against this cynical GOP effort? Here’s the deal: A California Republican is introducing legislation in the U.S. House to limit the campaign contributions we need to help fight back against the GOP money machine in this U.S. Senate race. [ ]Tweet from Rep. Kevin Kiley: I will be introducing legislation to stop Adam Schiff and other candidates for California's Senate seat from evading campaign contribution limits. As things stand, they are planning to solicit double the allowable amount from donors. This is an indirect consequence of Gavin Newsom's unwillingness to let voters choose either of their U.S. Senators. Now take a deep breath before reading further, because this is important: On March 5, 2024, Californians will actually vote twice in the U.S. Senate election’s all-parties primary, and vote again on November 5 — twice. Once for the special election, and once for the general election. Which means we’re running in double the amount of races. Nothing else in this race has changed – I don’t take Corporate PAC contributions, so I’m relying on these grassroots dollars to win. And this Republican is seizing on the opportunity to try and block us. With 26 declared candidates in our race according to the Los Angeles Times, we’re going to need to pour a massive amount of resources into educating voters about the ballots. If all these confusing details are making your head spin, that’s exactly what California Republicans are banking on. Just imagine this nightmare scenario: Voters fill in their choice for U.S. Senate in one election while leaving the other blank — and the GOP money machine seizes on voter confusion, Trump on the ballot, and a highly consolidated Republican base to sneak their preferred candidate through with a bare plurality of support. We can’t put any dirty tricks past the GOP. Least of all by letting this cynical effort to silence California voters’ voices pick up any traction. [ ]Derek, with our campaign running in 4 elections between 26 declared candidates spanning every political party, I’m PERSONALLY asking for ALL the help we can get to win this race. Can you chip in $3 to help my team respond to this GOP power grab and continue our efforts to reach every single voter in the Golden State? My grandparents and parents came to this country from Armenia and Lebanon in search of the American dream. Their sacrifice and determination is the reason why I’m here running for California’s 30th Congressional District today. **But with our current leadership, that very dream is being threatened.** | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71682450/432899820/-377887102?amount=20&refcode=JRFC_EM_FR_101623&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyMzgwNTctNmY2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KZKQvIk_D4wIIHBpk9O7aquIDiGjxoGZC7FmzKYdanY=)

I’m living proof that success depends on having the right opportunities. Thanks to my family's hard work, I was able to attend UCLA and became a public health doctor. I also worked for President Biden as the most senior Armenian American official at the State Department. I served as legislative director to Congresswoman Barbara Lee. I’m incredibly grateful for the sacrifices they made that got me to where I am today. With your support, we can make sure everyone, no matter what their background, has a real shot at the American dream.

I’m running for California’s 30th Congressional District because I want everyone to have the opportunity to achieve the American dream. Rather than focus on bipartisanship in Congress to address urgent issues facing Americans, Republicans are working around the clock to **_dismantle the dream entirely._**

If Matt Gaetz and his far-right cabal were in office when my grandparents arrived here, I don’t know that things would have turned out the same for me. name: Team Youngkin
subject: can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SPIRIT OF VIRGINIA
body:
Friend, we hope we can!

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/c/930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b/86634d99b2514105bba020e5d6acedce/amrWEMiamfEmqz5lR07NtNIVO4upb6Da0dkhULlp32XWDeI5_JKBU70EnBPD3W5sG6N2Y2LF-_huHBSPlbfo9xTuB6frbbe13i_m8y_Dy3NqzwBVPLkGUwy8xn5Q8uTVknP4g-adnojPZyIs2Tfa3kBvPwGndrmz7xD3sAIGXhL7yBYsxLkQineKaJh1ioocFSoiQBq7WVSYUKEqDYo-X0bu0Izua1Bzvdmj__F6au2Ur9xgPEy8j4TR1HLtA5c27BiMrcXQ5Q63Z09fJBGBNowDPTqzsJVQBBmfXPf58TdHOmVp5U23H9SuULvZI-LLeqJe3lXM0w_Puxnssl5OmWdJFtwJUHAruxC1k5lAkA0X3hropb-Ok9Ur1conLUYF9MnpC-LCFQBS0EUYLV_dRg==)

---
Friend,

Joe Biden, the DNC, and extreme dark money political groups from across the country have made it clear: They will do everything in their power stop Glenn Youngkin’s commonsense conservative agenda in Virginia.

They’ve poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the closing weeks of this election. Virginia Democrats are using this money on scare tactics and lies, because they have no vision or agenda to offer the Commonwealth.

**And if they continue to outraise and outspend us, they will take Virginia back to the failed policies of the past.**

[That’s why Governor Youngkin needs your help.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/c/930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b/86634d99b2514105bba020e5d6acedce/amrWEMiamfEmqz5lR07NtNIVO4upb6Da0dkhULlp32XWDeI5_JKBU70EnBPD3W5sG6N2Y2LF-_huHBSPlbfo9xTuB6frbbe13i_m8y_Dy3NqzwBVPLkGUwy8xn5Q8uTVknP4g-adnojPZyIs2Tfa3kBvPwGndrmz7xD3sAIGXhL7yBYsxLkQineKaJh1ioocFSoiQBq7WVSYUKEqDYo-X1-FFDTzZtq3k_qPeNyfl9zw00t0k4xddcdHY3R-ppjnF1-roY4RTQ72SvUFNmHxqEXOE0F8inivMKyu6Yf44DUZ_vr55DHXMVj8CFer89nl42j4tLjDTg0Aq9sVmkWNCiZtO7e4_9a-lRWE5FY7a6Vjde-hYOh6Au3VUFZN6YI_)

**[It’s time to get in the game.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/c/930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b/86634d99b2514105bba020e5d6acedce/amrWEMiamfEmqz5lR07NtNIVO4upb6Da0dkhULlp32XWDeI5_JKBU70EnBPD3W5sG6N2Y2LF-_huHBSPlbfo9xTuB6frbbe13i_m8y_Dy3NqzwBVPLkGUwy8xn5Q8uTVknP4g-adnojPZyIs2Tfa3kBvPwGndrmz7xD3sAIGXhL7yBYsxLkQineKaJh1ioocFSoiQBq7WVSYUKEqDYo-X1-FFDTzZtq3k_qPeNyfl9zc-QfHNYuYfjAG--DTABayV1Dg1VoWz7nyezchOFeRrkVnTy7XSq107NRmqQFDweA-bScPW9GjyYPpELIiKKC-Z53FdoTlQfhgCELdIFGM6K6DE9kjMZJsizFWjZ6pdLNTVRTlTChTOgK1Jxx17JYs)**

We only need to win a few competitive seats to hold the House and flip the Senate and elect quality candidates who will be committed allies for Governor Youngkin in the General Assembly.

Everything we’ve accomplished so far - empowering parents, lowering the cost of living, supporting our law enforcement heroes, and jumpstarting Virginia’s economy - is at stake.

**To move Virginia forward, Governor Youngkin needs your support.

They’ve poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the closing weeks of this election. And if they continue to outraise and outspend us, they will take Virginia back to the failed policies of the past. Friend, I wanted to send you a quick update on our work in Washington. There's a lot going on in DC, but our investigation continues with urgency, and we just found a trove of new evidence once again proving Joe Biden lied about his family's shady business dealings. As a Presidential candidate, Joe Biden said there was an "absolute wall" between his official work and the Biden family "business", but that was just another lie from Joe. **We just found out his Vice President 's Office sent and received over 29,000 official emails with Hunter, his brother Jim, and their companies while Vice President. Here's what we found:** 19,335 emails with Rosemont Seneca (Hunter's company) 4,243 emails with Hunter Biden 1,751 emails with Jim Biden 3,738 emails with Jim's Lion Hall Group _**That is 10 emails every single day of his tenure as Vice President.**_ The level of corruption and self-dealing by the Biden family while Joe was Vice President is astounding, and every week we find more and more evidence. Our team is hard at work, and I'm sure I'll be emailing you soon with more breaking news in our investigation.
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

Team DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fe544ad0d79e47419f60b48e8e403424&_e=_NeNObMidtLL2lEmBC54C4iVdtZZHlM3_FDeZwS3MLDCbJfmHQU93sVxZ1Y-e5fEeUTiFF2nHcDUya4RxI8UJKfT1vFxhHNLYgCdC0BPG3HqGfOtxaqSWWekEgQfE2Cjfmhdb-mVadFFsa6rIa8_pfOmkP1eV44ow93kcuCtqzfH-zQAY3_rA3AH7zMpKXov7CaG9K410KCDGsFoUuVua4XGpyATaTQHkdoAmOSc2QyAzkh4A65k3I5xI6CGsKidOybRN5Xjr7H0DfAhlThSYBDU8rq7M0CAcvsIhdDXtUD8t3mM4J9xYi_QIMivSBluRu0xOeOboKREIjnFJAUtKzkPU6VMNx778boTlFH60aazOe4YWcUcO4eqOXCSld5dwYxgJFfMedSkWEwmYOV8qg%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fe544ad0d79e47419f60b48e8e403424&_e=_NeNObMidtLL2lEmBC54C4iVdtZZHlM3_FDeZwS3MLDCbJfmHQU93sVxZ1Y-e5fEeUTiFF2nHcDUya4RxI8UJKfT1vFxhHNLYgCdC0BPG3HqGfOtxaqSWWekEgQfE2Cjfmhdb-mVadFFsa6rIa8_pfOmkP1eV44ow93kcuCtqzfH-zQAY3_rA3AH7zMpKXov7CaG9K410KCDGsFoUuVua4XGpyATaTQHkdoAmOSc2QyAzkh4A65k3I5xI6CGsKidVbKgVleyfVt9DrhK_n94XHYazPXgitOzGk2wzYQYiRWXs30uqxrYV0Ia8EHug7MgFI90t5EzB7SFQm2tYABlJo3UnnsVFnCRUHcEoMVEollWoUS7RKU9uGAHXdJ6-U5vS0YOW5upn8k3Lll-BMaiUQ%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

subject: URGENT - post-meeting update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
Hi Peter,

I just got out of a meeting with my team, and I have some news - _we 're behind where we need to be for our mid-month deadline TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT._
In the years since Joe Biden took office, the Democrat party has shown who they truly are.
From green-lighting lawlessness in our cities to ignoring the crisis at our border, they're taking our country down a dangerous path - _all while deep-pocketed liberal elites continue to fund their agenda._
As the Democrats lurch further and further to the Left, they're going to bring in more and more cash. That means we have to DOUBLE DOWN on our efforts to build a war chest capable of beating Tim Kaine in November.
_[With all this said, can you pitch in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help us meet our mid-month deadline?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=def36c355c84447e8e73d364695e1df9&_e=crJYhgewaqyvFl9llpD2DVrjLjtwtbzcPyHhXDMdvxFWpz4G2qXiJpDqqC6Xjoc0fCplA_HQ-QO4g_9A29eTAvQnn2sOZrUMN7jfZDr2mrEDOWVAv8xt26cJKTQIx0G052kCqzXSNiM5_fwkgdiNimKmkLXIhWeCdOcXmHIjMNOfay7VNCuzmoS0daVRwdLywWWQcBhU_wNAyCIej5rOwEwZjwpekzAXNdIsYOAHhkBWDQ4551i5pUu5aV09p8Pl0cdHxazZj1a2IH73nZ_oVwvE1onTCU3YXma5qHGmLJTfPwC4Y8rQRXBXDec8qbcF8uF8PV_W870U69IaWgeNMekoHg7HHhmkHqvVlt8i_4U%3D)_
**Every single contribution - no matter how big or how small - makes a massive difference in our efforts.**

name: Will Rollins
subject: I helped track down and prosecute insurrectionists. Now, their ringleader might be Speaker.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71683648/432903479/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYyZDg3MS03MTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Re195y26K9bfh8FHyc6ptIlOkzsYUhm5j6Um1pHf_wA=)
Peter, **Ken Calvert just endorsed one of the most extreme Members of Congress, Jim Jordan, for Speaker of the House: ** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71683649/432903480/1268080674?refcode=em-10.16.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDYyZDg3MS03MTZjLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Re195y26K9bfh8FHyc6ptIlOkzsYUhm5j6Um1pHf_wA=) The MAGA wing of the Republican Party has officially taken control of the House of Representatives. Not only was Jordan a ringleader to overturn the 2020 election, he led efforts to shut down the government in order to defund the Affordable Care Act and to ban abortion nationwide with no exceptions for rape or incest. Jordan and Calvert care more about pushing extreme ideologies than helping solve our country’s pressing problems. Why Chris Christie:
---
---
Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Derek keeps working to fix Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
We still don’t have a speaker, but progress must ensue.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71683704/432903706/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA3ZGU4MjUtNzI2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4GCGH8cjKsj4j6FyNx0xumxInclel19gwYjg1WgZjC8=&emci=ca437122-646c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=507de825-726c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Amid the chaos in Congress and the ongoing search for a speaker of the House, Derek has continued working and fighting for the people of Washington.

Just over the last few months, our nation has faced near-default, government shutdowns, and now, a vacant speaker's chair. The American people deserve better. It's time to choose unity over division, cooperation over chaos. _That's why Derek is committed to finding real bipartisan solutions that move our nation forward._

**Just take a look at some of what Derek has been working on:**

• **Economic Recovery:** Derek has been working hand-in-glove with the Biden Administration on standing up the RECOMPETE Program that he authored to help communities and create jobs.

• **Healthcare:** On top of continuing the fight for affordable healthcare access for all, Derek recently unveiled the _Mental Health Infrastructure Improvement Act_ to increase mental health and substance use disorder care access in underserved regions.

• **Education:** Derek joined a group of bipartisan legislators to reintroduce the _Supporting Early-Childhood Educators’ Deductions (SEED) Act_ , which aims to expand tax credits for early childhood educators and seeks to provide additional financial support to those working in the early childhood education sector.

• **Environmental protection:** Derek will never stop pushing for green energy solutions and policies to protect our environment for future generations, and recently announced over $18 million in funding for culvert restoration to improve fish passage across Washington's 6th District.

• **Read More:** [**Check out this recent opinion piece from _The Seattle Times_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71683705/432903707/-570131345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA3ZGU4MjUtNzI2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4GCGH8cjKsj4j6FyNx0xumxInclel19gwYjg1WgZjC8=&emci=ca437122-646c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=507de825-726c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835) that highlights Derek's journey toward a more productive, bipartisan, and responsive Congress.

Look, Peter, here's the bottom line: The road to change is never easy, and recent events have shown us that Congress is facing unique challenges. But, rather than being discouraged by gridlock, Derek knows that we have a profound opportunity to effect positive change in the weeks, months, and years to come. It's an opportunity we can't afford to waste.

[**Add your name to our petition if you agree that Congress has a responsibility to ensure the smooth functioning of our government and bipartisan solutions to move our nation FORWARD >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71683706/432903708/1920918902?ms=em23_231017_update_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_231017_update_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_231017_update_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231017_update_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=a0gig5kp39G4WoxLtbAkTf71Tds5zGNH15ju1nhQV601/SYqk6Zg7lj02WSaLtT5CBgP7fpy/hkS3TXTw5kAAIZG7ZW+n35LQoRAkat6/sKgMzDNhi7LIe971vOL8ors8sfaalRRZMZyxbcYLk2D3ahnVoW5LXcaFAGIq3Bmh/A=&refcode2=507de825-726c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA3ZGU4MjUtNzI2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4GCGH8cjKsj4j6FyNx0xumxInclel19gwYjg1WgZjC8=&emci=ca437122-646c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=507de825-726c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

clean_body: Will George Logan support this extremist? | | The House remains without a speaker because of dysfunction in the GOP. And the best they have is MAGA extremist Jim Jordan! I never thought I would say this — Jim Jordan is their Republican nominee for Speaker of the House! Jim Jordan continues to deny the results of the 2020 election, has ignored subpoenas about his involvement with Jan 6th, is anti-abortion, uses his role on committees to peddle conspiracy theories, has NEVER passed a piece of legislation in his 16 years in Congress, is accused of knowing about ongoing sexual abuse to student athletes and doing nothing to stop it ...... and of course, Donald Trump endorses Jim Jordan. This is their guy, and they are ready to call a vote because in their words “they want everyone on record!” The pressure campaign on moderates is strong- they have even enlisted the help of Fox News and Sean Hannity who sent an email to Republican members who had not committed to Jordan — giving them a deadline to tell him why? Privately Republicans in Congress say Jordan is too extreme, but they are too scared to say it publicly. So, the people of the 5th district deserve to know — does George Logan support Jim Jordan? Logan has shown repeatedly that he too is extreme, and backing Jordan for Speaker would prove just how extreme he really is. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. == | PAID FOR BY BUCKEYE LIBERTY PAC PO BOX 368 Falls Church, VA 22040

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name to support my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act, and let’s fight side by side to pass it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’ve got a bill to overhaul the judicial ethics system and restore public confidence in our courts. But it’s going to take a tough fight to get this done.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=103%2E4032634%2EfaFqk0)
---
This month, the U.S. Supreme Court went back into session. They’re taking on cases that challenge whether or not the CFPB is constitutional (it is) and whether abusers with domestic violence restraining orders can possess guns — just to name a few. The justices are still missing one big thing as they kick off this new term: a binding code of ethics. Yep — they’re the only federal judges who don’t have to follow an enforceable code of conduct. And they’re the ones with the most power to touch people’s lives. That’s bad enough, but when it comes to ethics, there are other holes we’ve got to plug throughout our whole federal judiciary. The American people should be confident that federal judges, including Supreme Court justices, are held to the highest ethical standards and free from conflicts of interest. When someone gets their day in court, they shouldn’t have to wonder whether the judge presiding over their case is making decisions based on their stock portfolio — or a spouse’s business interests — instead of the rule of law. And the principle of Equal Justice Under Law should mean, well, Equal Justice Under Law — not special secret access for billionaires who can go yachting with Supreme Court justices and gift them with lavish (and undisclosed) vacations. **I’ve got a bill — the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act — to overhaul the whole judicial ethics system and restore public confidence in our courts. But it’s going to take a tough fight to get this done.** [**Add your name to support my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act, and let’s fight side by side to pass it.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-judicial-ethics/?source=EMZ16X_JUD_E_20231016_V1S1&t=8&akid=103%2E4032634%2EfaFqk0) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-judicial-ethics/?source=EMZ16X_JUD_E_20231016_V1S1&t=9&akid=103%2E4032634%2EfaFqk0)
---
Here are some big pieces of what the bill would accomplish:
* Require Supreme Court justices to follow a binding Code of Conduct
* Strengthen restrictions on judicial gifts and privately funded travel
* Ban judges from owning individual stocks and securities, commercial real estate, trusts, and private companies (can you believe that’s not the law already?)
* Overhaul the broken recusal process, so Supreme Court justices would have to publicly respond — and justify their decision — if a litigant in a case asks the justice to recuse themselves

If we fight side by side, we can prevent conflicts of interest in our federal judiciary. We can make judges and justices follow appropriately high standards for ethical conduct. And I won’t stop there — I’ve got a plan to root corruption out of Washington, wherever it rears its head.
[**But I can’t do it alone. Add your name to say you’re in this fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-judicial-ethics/?source=EMZ16X_JUD_E_20231016_V1S1&t=10&akid=103%2E4032634%2EfaFqk0)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

---

name: Joe Kent
subject: FW: Are you bold enough to volunteer for Joe Kent?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Good Afternoon,
I wanted to make sure you saw Flo's email below.
Volunteers are critical to my campaign's success, and I greatly appreciate all of their hard work and support.
You can sign up at this link: [https://joekentforcongress.com/volunteer/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/loUeQzPFsRFTMyDzgn0Qhw/9z763sDQdGqOoUSHYOiX6rcg)
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
**From:** Flo Rossmiller
**Sent:** Wednesday, October 11, 2023 9:58 AM
**Subject:** Are you bold enough to volunteer for Joe Kent?
Dear Supporter,
We need your help getting Joe Kent elected! Grassroots volunteers are critical to this campaign's success.
**If you live in or near the district, we are asking you to: **
* Sign-wave
* Door knock
* Host a meet and greet
* Host a fundraiser
* Volunteer at event booths
* Display a yard sign
* Make phone calls
* Publicly endorse Joe

**If you live outside the district, we are asking you to consider hosting a fundraiser for Joe. **
Let us know what you can do by filling out our volunteer form here: [https://joekentforcongress.com/volunteer/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/loUeQzPFsRFTMyDzgn0Qhw/9z763sDQdGqOoUSHYOiX6rcg)
Got questions? Just hit the reply button and I'll get back to you ASAP!
Sincerely,
Flo Rossmiller
Joe Kent for Congress
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

This is a unique opportunity to hear directly from leaders dedicated to the principles that make our country strong. Senator Ron Johnson, a staunch advocate for limited government and fiscal responsibility, will share insights and perspectives crucial for the future of our state and nation.
**Purchase tickets today to secure your spot.**
The evening promises to be one of inspiration, insight, and camaraderie with like-minded individuals who share a vision for a prosperous Michigan.

This evening promises to be a gathering of passionate individuals committed to shaping the future of our great state. We thank our presenting sponsor, US Senate Candidate Dr. Sherry O’Donnell! We’ll see you at 6:30 PM at Friske Farms, 10743 N US Highway 31, Ellsworth, MI 49729. Featuring Speakers: US Senator Ron Johnson Chairwoman Kristina Karamo State Representative Neil Friske US Senate Candidate Sherry O’Donnell This is a unique opportunity to hear directly from leaders dedicated to the principles that make our country strong. Senator Ron Johnson, a staunch advocate for limited government and fiscal responsibility, will share insights and perspectives crucial for the future of our state and nation. Purchase tickets today to secure your spot. The evening promises to be one of inspiration, insight, and camaraderie with like-minded individuals who share a vision for a prosperous Michigan. We look forward to welcoming you at Friske Farms for an unforgettable evening! | PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States, SO HELP ME GOD. | | | | | | | | | | mailto:communication@migop.org ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 MIGOP, All rights reserved. body: On March 9, 2023 journalists Matt Taibbi and Michael Shellenberger testified before the U.S. Congress. That hearing set off a political divide in the nation was cut deeply along political lines. However, in the end, Elon Musk unleased what is known as “The Twitter Files” and suddenly Americans realized that their connotational right of Free Speech was being ripped from the fabric of Republic. | | Friend, Team Kelly had another busy week on campaign trail! This morning our campaign released that [Kelly signed the Taxpayer Protection Pledge](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/cbOiUuKF3/c?w=uYzzkKRFHIcLPulVd9XvqnjbOuOhY_h-fcbc45V5B1U.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9LZWxseUF5b3R0ZS9zdGF0dXMvMTcxMzg5MjU5NTkwOTQxOTQzNT9zPTIwIiwiciI6ImZjNzBjMWM5LTFjYzctNDgzYS05ZjA2LWJiNjQ4N2ZmMTIzYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJiMDhlNzAzLWE2MjctNDZmMy1iZThhLTVkNTY1NDQyNjIwMiJ9) from Americans for Tax Reform. As Governor, Kelly will protect and grow our New Hampshire Advantage to make our state even more affordable for Granite State families and businesses – and Kelly will fight tooth and nail to ensure the Democrats never implement an income or sales tax. On Wednesday, Kelly joined her fellow Granite Staters at the State House for a rally in support of Israel. Kelly had the opportunity to sit down with Rep. Jeanine Notter for her Chattin' Jeanine Show on Merrimack TV then headed up to Concord for the New Hampshire Home Builders Associations Beers with Builders event. On Friday, Kelly spoke at the NHGOP's FITN Summit then had a wonderful evening at the Options Pregnancy Dinner with Phyllis Woods and Mayor Paul Callaghan. Over the weekend Kelly ran in the 9th Annual James W. Foley Freedom Run, stopped by the New Hampshire Poutine Festival in Merrimack, and was the keynote speaker for the Sullivan County Annual Harvest Dinner. Keep up with all of our campaign updates on our [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/cbOiUuKF3/c?w=98WWWLdXsdjuQ9Ypi__waw-774iwJfzf6qLuVg-dDsE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0tlbGx5QXlvdHRlRm9yTkgiLCJyIjoiZmM3MGMxYzktMWNjNy00ODNhLTlmMDYtYmI2NDg3ZmYxMjNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0) page. Best, Team Kelly

Friend, I wanted to send you a quick update on our work in Washington. There’s a lot going on in DC, but our investigation continues with urgency, and we just found a trove of new evidence once again proving Joe Biden lied about his family’s shady business dealings. As a Presidential candidate, Joe Biden said there was an “absolute wall” between his official work and the Biden family “business”, but that was just another lie from Joe. **We just found out his Vice President’s Office sent and received over 29,000 official emails with Hunter, his brother Jim, and their companies while Vice President. Here’s what we found:** 19,335 emails with Rosemont Seneca (Hunter’s company) 4,243 emails with Hunter Biden 1,751 emails with Jim Biden 3,738 emails with Jim’s Lion Hall Group _**That is 10 emails every single day of his tenure as Vice President.**_ The level of corruption and self-dealing by the Biden family while Joe was Vice President is astounding, and every week we find more and more evidence. Our team is hard at work, and I’m sure I’ll be emailing you soon with more breaking news in our investigation.
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

| | It has been nearly two weeks since the GOP's in-fighting led to the ousting of Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, just days since their first pick to replace McCarthy withdrew, and mere hours since they made their latest selection. **We have endured weeks of all-out chaos that**** _should_****have been used for progress in our communities on issues like infrastructure, the environment, housing security, supporting our veterans and developing good-paying jobs.** Instead, the chaos caucus manufactured a new crisis and opted first to nominate someone who self-identifies with former grand wizard of the KKK, "David Duke, without the baggage" for Speaker of the House. It goes without saying that Scalise is a deeply problematic figure: His willingness to align with antisemitic white nationalists; his record on abortion, climate change, and civil liberties; his A+ rating from the NRA; and his vote to overturn the results of the 2020 election. **This was the Republicans'****_first_****choice. The second?** After Scalise pulled out, House Republicans conferred with at least two potential candidates — Ohio's Rep. Jim Jordan and Georgia's Austin Scott. Their caucus has since moved forward with Rep. Jordan as their speaker-designate. You may recall Rep. Jim Jordan from his emphatic objections to the results of the 2020 election and his false assertions that the election had been "stolen." **As they continue to scramble to tidy up their mess, I am eager to get back to work for Washingtonians and the rest of the country. We do not have time to waste on this, we must solidify a government spending bill and return to the critical issues plaguing our communities.** But, if the last two weeks are any indicator: everything may change in an instant. clean_body: | | | | It has been nearly two weeks since the GOP's in-fighting led to the ousting of Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, just days since their first pick to replace McCarthy withdrew, and mere hours since they made their latest selection. We have endured weeks of all-out chaos that shouldhave been used for progress in our communities on issues like infrastructure, the environment, housing security, supporting our veterans and developing good-paying jobs. Instead, the chaos caucus manufactured a new crisis and opted first to nominate someone who self-identifies with former grand wizard of the KKK, "David Duke, without the baggage" for Speaker of the House. It goes without saying that Scalise is a deeply problematic figure: His willingness to align with antisemitic white nationalists; his record on abortion, climate change, and civil liberties; his A+ rating from the NRA; and his vote to overturn the results of the 2020 election. This was the Republicans'firstchoice. The second? After Scalise pulled out, House Republicans conferred with at least two potential candidates — Ohio's Rep. Jim Jordan and Georgia's Austin Scott. Their caucus has since moved forward with Rep. Jordan as their speaker-designate. You may recall Rep. Jim Jordan from his emphatic objections to the results of the 2020 election and his false assertions that the election had been "stolen." As they continue to scramble to tidy up their mess, I am eager to get back to work for Washingtonians and the rest of the country. We do not have time to waste on this, we must solidify a government spending bill and return to the critical issues plaguing our communities. But, if the last two weeks are any indicator: everything may change in an instant. I will keep you posted as things unfold. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . | Hi there, it’s Sam.

A few days ago, my team sent you a message letting you know that our race to win the 24th District of Texas is picking up steam! [_**However, our campaign is financed by everyday folks, NOT super PACs, so I wanted to reach out quickly to ask if you’ll consider chipping in today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71685302/432909469/-101250736?refcode=BLU-SEC-20231016-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODlmMzdjZDItNzk2Yy1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CAaUDUObOmjJ-_KaRgTXK_7ZBRfLUeVJix1OIgsG-ek=)

Here are just a few things your contributions will go toward:
* Hiring campaign staff who will help to maximize our campaign’s impact.

* Getting yard signs to increase our visibility in the community.

* Running ads and sending mailers to spread our message to voters.

We have a lot of work to get done ahead of next year’s high-stakes election, and I’m counting on your support to help us invest in the critical resources we’ll need to win.

Hi Peter, it's Josh Shapiro -- and I need to share three reasons we all need to support Bob Casey in his re-election fight.
1. Bob is officially running against Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate -- a mega-millionaire who wants to overturn a woman's freedom to choose.
2. Republicans are dead set on doing in 2024 what they tried to do in 2020 and 2022 -- **flip Pennsylvania.**
3. I know first-hand what it takes to win a tough race in the Commonwealth, and the key is supporters like you stepping up whenever they can.

**[So what do you say? I'm asking you to chip in $5 or whatever you can today to support Bob-- our Democratic Senate majority is on the line in this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231016-2?refcode=em20231016-2&refcode2=909_552475_ZDsadY&akid=909%2E552475%2EZDsadY)**

Bob needs us -- and we have to have his back, just like you had mine.
Thank you for your generous support,
Josh Shapiro

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: ‘Fiscally irresponsible’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A lot of people out there are not paying the bill.
#
Here’s a comment we hear a lot: ‘I agree with progressives on a lot of issues, but I don’t believe in wasteful government spending.’
Well, neither do we. **Progressives believe in making investments that actually have returns.**
It means **investing in education** , so that people are actually able to participate in an economy that will pay higher wages — **which in turn yields higher revenues** — rather than making 80% cuts to the Dept. of Education for low-income schools.
It also means taxing the rich. **Because there are billionaires out there who are not paying the bill.** What they _are_ doing is taking Supreme Court Justices on private jets in order to facilitate rulings that further aggregate their wealth.
Taxing the rich is where we’re going to find the budget so that kids can go to good schools and so that we can make progress on policies like guaranteed healthcare in the United States of America.
[If you’d like to help power our movement this year, can you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to keep us pushing forward? Every dollar goes to our campaign for systemic change for working people in this country.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231016.zTS6B_&refcode=em20231016-5162-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5162%2E2526796%2E4Pv9St)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231016.zTS6B_&refcode=em20231016-5162-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5162%2E2526796%2E4Pv9St)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231016?refcode=em20231016-5162-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=21&refcode2=5162_2526796_4Pv9St&akid=5162%2E2526796%2E4Pv9St)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231016-5162-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=22&akid=5162%2E2526796%2E4Pv9St)**
---|---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RIGHT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=768a255d2936444d9ef2cd23268eb0b2&_e=6dmOY3zkqWFR1UPzSOxziIXSBeRJrJeCKosP9HnEHkm-cAL89WMuwMXYF_KIoh1znOmEIZw_Unvgsr4np1nACPoLo2yEhwflCWr4AGTuGQ9k8Roz3AQfrxxguH2eIomBj4_S1-TW7BG_PzKZQGAmeqwmTnm1u89E7uDWEeYsgrPoRT04pPEaoi0jO86vuycMwfTZwq2N1FqljPdgX5A6xBgP0RhhngQCZ_6FJZI-mLfukCvtSWA9x11Yk9v7sC4c_YNw10MJk7cP4362Jjoa8R4WJ37VQcWBAagL-raBUUBlBiSX2NWHRDjHYmQCeKHxeV2WPtlkQCMjrtYzPQpehwTVw2qY99in56hC8Fhhy8-NeC4fBLL3Du3Q3Es_8XTNW41JQ8cpAVjRlVF6HIcph9naaLzsehNjIhUCbhLdIQ90yzMLh15yQmeFfgt9_ZUkijDt0tzbZ95mJ7LMQtfII8PRZjCAOcsfYRULv_t8c5EsPpnRF2Z9crxb9_eiQH2M)
---
| | Patriot,

---
Remember when I chose to go to Michigan to deliver a speech directly to the PEOPLE on how I’ll save our country rather than attend the GOP debate?
---
And remember when the so-called experts in Washington said I was making a big mistake?
---
Well, take a look at this new poll out of Michigan...
---
_**DETROIT NEWS: TRUMP NOW LEADS JOE BIDEN BY 7 POINTS IN MICHIGAN**
_
---
By now, I think we can safely say I made the RIGHT DECISION by saying “no thank you” to the offer to attend the last debate.

---
So, for everyone out there who is keeping score of how many times I’ve been right on so many different topics over the years, I think we’re currently sitting at a very high number.
---
But before the Fake News says, “There he goes again. Trump can’t stop bragging” – I want to make something clear... I don’t say any of this to brag.

---
The truth is: **_I am not alone in being right so often._**

---
I only say things that the vast (silent) MAJORITY of Americans agree with. And the majority of Americans have a lot more sense than all of the experts in Washington – COMBINED!

---
All decent and patriotic citizens agree that our borders should be secure, that a travel ban that restricts immigration from nations compromised by radical Islamic terrorism is a smart idea, that we should drill for oil on our own land, that we should pursue a foreign policy that promotes peace and stability, that we shouldn’t keep burning through taxpayer dollars when inflation is killing us, and that letting violent criminals out of jail is a dangerously stupid idea.

---
Right now, our country needs real leadership. We need someone who is unafraid to say what all Americans are thinking. We need someone with an independent mind who will ignore the Washington experts and do what’s right for our country. We need a leader who has the courage to defy the powers-that-be and implement a bold vision to Make America Great Again!

---

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .| | | | | Patriot, Remember when I chose to go to Michigan to deliver a speech directly to the PEOPLE on how I’ll save our country rather than attend the GOP debate? And remember when the so-called experts in Washington said I was making a big mistake? Well, take a look at this new poll out of Michigan... DETROIT NEWS: TRUMP NOW LEADS JOE BIDEN BY 7 POINTS IN MICHIGAN By now, I think we can safely say I made the RIGHT DECISION by saying “no thank you” to the offer to attend the last debate. So, for everyone out there who is keeping score of how many times I’ve been right on so many different topics over the years, I think we’re currently sitting at a very high number. But before the Fake News says, “There he goes again. Trump can’t stop bragging” – I want to make something clear... I don’t say any of this to brag. The truth is: I am not alone in being right so often. I only say things that the vast (silent) MAJORITY of Americans agree with. And the majority of Americans have a lot more sense than all of the experts in Washington – COMBINED! All decent and patriotic citizens agree that our borders should be secure, that a travel ban that restricts immigration from nations compromised by radical Islamic terrorism is a smart idea, that we should drill for oil on our own land, that we should pursue a foreign policy that promotes peace and stability, that we shouldn’t keep burning through taxpayer dollars when inflation is killing us, and that letting violent criminals out of jail is a dangerously stupid idea. Right now, our country needs real leadership. We need someone who is unafraid to say what all Americans are thinking. We need someone with an independent mind who will ignore the Washington experts and do what’s right for our country. We need a leader who has the courage to defy the powers-that-be and implement a bold vision to Make America Great Again! If you are ready for that leader, then I am humbly asking for your support to win back the White House and SAVE AMERICA. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Team WFP
subject: Tell Congress: Demand a ceasefire now to save lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
The scale of humanitarian catastrophe now facing Palestinians in Gaza is growing by the hour. | | | Peter, We remain heartbroken by the horrific events that have unfolded in Israel and Palestine since last weekend. Thousands of Israeli and Palestinian civilians have been killed, including children and the elderly, with thousands more injured. Hamas has targeted and killed Israeli civilians, taking over 150 hostages and refusing to release them. The Israeli government has cut 2 million Palestinian civilians off from food, water, fuel, and electricity in preparation for a full-scale ground invasion. **The scale of humanitarian catastrophe now facing Palestinians in Gaza is growing by the hour — and further escalation would endanger the lives of millions of Israeli and Palestinian families alike. President Biden and Congress must act now to demand a ceasefire to save lives.** [**The Working Families Party is proud to join Rep. Cori Bush, Rep. Rashida Tlaib, Rep. Summer Lee, Rep. Delia Ramirez, and more in support of a Congressional resolution calling for immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to Gaza. Will you take a minute to urge your member of Congress to call for ceasefire and de-escalation in order to save as many lives as possible?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5bxrMh6DpGopZ2QuEF3QSjxgFjnZkTlKuevgZGzwTncKET1nqgy_6Ew0y5LsY3EHxeTQztd4SPO8U6Aohnhjdp2FNXtD73qk8T5Np5lAVL0cfD6uDsZTTg1qUenk89jPl0jMb3SyYIKjXNZy2GSgW7Lib6Yv-QXvVOQYNeldTs-M0_LVDSP1IKLsG0HngUVk_rp2YKNbvAiGYP1ViPjHFuz0AyGQgXg8X3sK7h0wP6J70e7RhOivKzdzLCFoK-x0VaLLc6CUKyUnG-vNgPN5XZYWYBfJ4GyiA2DQ9004Sl6g/40h/XImBfopKSXirvfDYujPaPg/h0/Zzk3VmPjvb1W2dzthuGtclQOFTi0JLhF6cQLgjNNrtw) **[Take Action »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5bxrMh6DpGopZ2QuEF3QSjxgFjnZkTlKuevgZGzwTncKET1nqgy_6Ew0y5LsY3EHxeTQztd4SPO8U6Aohnhjdp2FNXtD73qk8T5Np5lAVL0TI3vEx8L6W6o9c8LFAZ8uKZGp_aYNduHTfwkiC3Kr94Dm5MQbontSTmP-QkLNRX0mbX475fr_J2Ow3w-m2KfPr8zYTa9705GaHK_Kk_YZBrBjqrstG03ramPkG0J95MZX-wpUbwo0j6Tpv4kHgwCqof1q2zIoixkfqgjyv8ou93fHOVlc5rfA20jjqfY-jT5A/40h/XImBfopKSXirvfDYujPaPg/h1/ST4XxCDN_LjgaXJSAe2EP1DIgdnMMwpGrTgH1O0x9aI)** We believe that most people from all backgrounds across the world are appalled by Hamas's deliberate murder and abduction of Israeli civilians. We believe that they are also appalled by the Israeli government's disregard for Palestinian civilian life in its military response and siege. And we believe that they recognize that the Palestinian people are not Hamas, and that the Israeli people are not the Israeli government. Israel receives billions every year in U.S. military aid, and is likely to receive billions more to support its war on Hamas. The United States therefore bears responsibility for the conduct of Israel's war.

The Israeli military has cut off access to food, water, and electricity for civilians, in violation of international law. They’ve ordered millions to evacuate northern Gaza, an order that the United Nations immediately said would be “impossible” to accomplish “without devastating humanitarian consequences.”1 The Israeli President last week declared that “an entire nation” was responsible for Hamas’s attacks, words that seemingly aim to justify collective punishment in retribution.2 Meanwhile some elected leaders in the U.S. — including Republican members of Congress — have backed calls to “level” Gaza and “turn it into a parking lot.”3 We need to do all we can to stand up against this kind of rhetoric, and to stop further escalation from costing the lives of more children and families. [**Use this tool to urge your member of Congress to call for an immediate de-escalation and ceasefire in Israel and occupied Palestine and to send humanitarian aid and assistance to Gaza in order to save as many lives as possible.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5bxrMh6DpGopZ2QuEF3QSjxgFjnZkTlKuevgZGzwTncKET1nqgy_6Ew0y5LsY3EHxeTQztd4SPO8U6Aohnhjdp2FNXtD73qk8T5Np5lAVL0bIPbucEsuYsYUyCqIQHwss_lDsDclmHk9U6rXiBs4MZjNX4Sdh9f4owzMbCKTvxsuG_bnYE6stJD_2l-zDBhUt4KfDzw2-suZP_aA8fQUN7y4L4yAdtYGkDq_Y5ltWIBc5VwRQR4lC6mjRzHycPyFtpqvMZKJn_JFXzCTIvKzfXsKLTFHMPklb41fhG_AlN5Q/40h/XImBfopKSXirvfDYujPaPg/h2/JpX_wAMfkim_PtcogWJRH1WBd0Dt6CrHzu24fNdm7jM) In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. You can read [**the full resolution and list of current co-sponsors here**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWgCR_2-LFXDCF8juIH9zgS5BXn8ZupIXwn8zSRZEiBjEajoOlcy1RWxAeplJf79AlYlMqtTJs0rNe8rTEpy8KHNVM6m0ImICXywwkXryFpldpDPYDyeXCwOuGVXicYugEkjr4NBgjNK9tkvUD2zKQyAA2g8NoP1-TYvtqCEt7XG98ghHn3ZKY9V1S-c_OBPVzx1WmZG9CpmSQMvEIX9dygIH3mUBadL1iplldzattHQ1w4r7Fg-eTz5iDDtrUmCB_-0IPK8HOKvrbPsvmX0948XC0uqTdB6GHklOImY5NAR7mhivV1IPv5X7oJB5Tok2b735nsj_Ea8L2op-0uhfQvsMaJ4U4RwQtnosFPfJXsFkg6FspBNU_GH8nxrElGfiAeNL8JZ6mMWFIQjUMSEKZTcdioCIq9M-ikGWu8OqC2g5/40h/XImBfopKSXirvfDYujPaPg/h3/F41hx9jN4oBcltSVCzraEL0bTSTg9fK_2kzHHF-PB-w). clean_body: The scale of humanitarian catastrophe now facing Palestinians in Gaza is growing by the hour. | | | Peter, We remain heartbroken by the horrific events that have unfolded in Israel and Palestine since last weekend. Thousands of Israeli and Palestinian civilians have been killed, including children and the elderly, with thousands more injured. Hamas has targeted and killed Israeli civilians, taking over 150 hostages and refusing to release them. The Israeli government has cut 2 million Palestinian civilians off from food, water, fuel, and electricity in preparation for a full-scale ground invasion. The scale of humanitarian catastrophe now facing Palestinians in Gaza is growing by the hour — and further escalation would endanger the lives of millions of Israeli and Palestinian families alike. President Biden and Congress must act now to demand a ceasefire to save lives. We believe that most people from all backgrounds across the world are appalled by Hamas's deliberate murder and abduction of Israeli civilians. We believe that they are also appalled by the Israeli government's disregard for Palestinian civilian life in its military response and siege. And we believe that they recognize that the Palestinian people are not Hamas, and that the Israeli people are not the Israeli government. Israel receives billions every year in U.S. military aid, and is likely to receive billions more to support its war on Hamas. The United States therefore bears responsibility for the conduct of Israel's war. The Israeli military has cut off access to food, water, and electricity for civilians, in violation of international law. They’ve ordered millions to evacuate northern Gaza, an order that the United Nations immediately said would be “impossible” to accomplish “without devastating humanitarian consequences.”1 The Israeli President last week declared that “an entire nation” was responsible for Hamas’s attacks, words that seemingly aim to justify collective punishment in retribution.2 Meanwhile some elected leaders in the U.S. — including Republican members of Congress — have backed calls to “level” Gaza and “turn it into a parking lot.”3 We need to do all we can to stand up against this kind of rhetoric, and to stop further escalation from costing the lives of more children and families. In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. You can read . Sources: 1\. , CBS News, October 13, 2023 2\. , NBC News, October 13, 2023 3\. , Washington Post, October 13, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee just introduced a resolution
demanding the Biden Administration call for an immediate ceasefire and
de-escalation between Hamas and Israel. Justice Democrats Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Ilhan Omar, and Jamaal Bowman also signed
onto this resolution.

“Today I am introducing the Ceasefire Now Resolution, vital
legislation that calls for de-escalation and an immediate ceasefire in
Israel and Occupied Palestine, and for humanitarian assistance to
urgently be delivered to the 2.2 million people under siege and
trapped in Gaza.” —Cori Bush

Any member of Congress who remains silent or beats the drums of war after
the Israeli government has called for the forced displacement of 1.1
million Palestinians in less than 24 hours is condoning the ethnic
cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza.

Our incumbents in Congress are leading the fight in calling for
de-escalation. We know that they will face heavy spending in the 2024
elections for taking this politically courageous stance.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138996?refcode=em20231016-31361&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31361%2E1203867%2E7kZKZ- ]Peter, will
you contribute $3 right now to help us re-elect our
candidates in 2024 and elect even more leaders to Congress who will fight
for the human rights of all?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138996?refcode=em20231016-31361&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31361%2E1203867%2E7kZKZ- ]Contribute $3

We are [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138987?s=20%3Fsource%3Dem20231016-31361&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31361%2E1203867%2E7kZKZ- ]proud to endorse this resolution and stand up against the
Israeli government’s public ethnic cleansing campaign. We must end this
cycle of violence and we are urging every member of Congress to support
this resolution to protect innocent life now.

Thank you for your solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=31361%2E1203867%2E7kZKZ- ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=31361%2E1203867%2E7kZKZ- ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231016-31361-footer&t=1024&refcode2=31361_1203867_7kZKZ-&akid=31361%2E1203867%2E7kZKZ-
