Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee just introduced a resolution demanding the Biden Administration call for an immediate ceasefire and de-escalation between Hamas and Israel. Justice Democrats Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Ilhan Omar, and Jamaal Bowman also signed onto this resolution. “Today I am introducing the Ceasefire Now Resolution, vital legislation that calls for de-escalation and an immediate ceasefire in Israel and Occupied Palestine, and for humanitarian assistance to urgently be delivered to the 2.2 million people under siege and trapped in Gaza.” —Cori Bush Any member of Congress who remains silent or beats the drums of war after the Israeli government has called for the forced displacement of 1.1 million Palestinians in less than 24 hours is condoning the ethnic cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza. Our incumbents in Congress are leading the fight in calling for de-escalation. We know that they will face heavy spending in the 2024 elections for taking this politically courageous stance. [ - ]Peter, will you contribute $3 right now to help us re-elect our candidates in 2024 and elect even more leaders to Congress who will fight for the human rights of all? [ - ]Contribute $3 We are [ - ]proud to endorse this resolution and stand up against the Israeli government’s public ethnic cleansing campaign. We must end this cycle of violence and we are urging every member of Congress to support this resolution to protect innocent life now. Thank you for your solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ - ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ - ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats: -

Hi team, it’s Maya - Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo’s Finance Director.

As Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure that we have all the resources we need to get Yadira reelected. Republicans see their path to keep the majority running straight through states like Colorado, _and they are gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red._ _We’re falling immensely short of where we need to be_ to keep this battleground seat blue.

**Top pollsters are saying Yadira Caraveo is the second most vulnerable House Democrat in the entire country.** I need to tap into our grassroots movement, if we’re going to have a shot at fighting back against the far-right money being spent against us!

“The initial pilot program will [target] [...] the vote-rich Phoenix metropolitan area.” - The Washington Post, 10/13/23
Hello Peter
Did you hear the news? The Biden campaign is investing in organizers right here in Phoenix! President Biden knows how important our community will be to keeping the White House and beating Donald Trump. And there’s one candidate in this race who knows how to organize our community and beat Donald Trump: Raquel Terán.
Can you make an investment of $15 or more in our campaign now so we can continue building the movement we’ll need to win our election and help keep Donald Trump out of the White House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101623_BidenAZ&amount=15]

Raquel is our candidate, and she has always been clear about one thing: this campaign isn’t about her. It’s about all of us . It’s about our community and building a movement to ensure our voices are heard in Congress – and the White House! And to build that movement, we need your support. Will you please contribute $15 or whatever you can afford? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_101623_BidenAZ&amount=15]
Thank you!
Team Terán

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: MAGA Speaker race -- whoever wins, we ALL lose. The environmental movement needs to speak out:
body:
__Every gift will be triple matched, meaning your gift will instantly have 3X the impact. |
---

|
Peter -- this is bad, _really_ bad. Congress's worst anti-environment lawmakers are vying to become the next Speaker of the House -- and with a shutdown looming and the environment hanging in the balance -- we truly need your help.

[Really quick -- can you renew your membership to power our campaign and 3x your impact for the environment? Even $5 makes a difference right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_)

Here's where things stand: after removing Kevin McCarthy as Speaker as punishment for allowing a temporary deal without deep cuts to environmental protections, MAGA extremists are plotting to use the chaos to demand a Speaker who will push _even more aggressive_ polluter-friendly policies.

Their demands would be a disaster for the planet: _steep_ cuts to clean energy investments, gutting environmental justice programs, and mandating _more_ dirty drilling on public lands.

There's not one person in the running who would put the health of people over polluters' profits -- and **with a new shutdown just weeks away, we need to do everything we can to make sure environmental protections are not on the chopping block** amidst the chaos overtaking Congress.

[The best thing you can do right now is this: Renew your membership to power our campaigns to defend climate funding. Right now, all it takes is $5. Every gift will be triple matched, meaning your gift will instantly have 3X the impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_)

LCV teams are on Capitol Hill every day to make sure there are no cuts to clean energy progress or environmental funding in any spending deal. But we need to ramp up the pressure _in a major way_.

We're gearing up to run ads targeting vulnerable Republican lawmakers to push them not to keep siding with Big Polluters instead of people in their districts.

The truth is, this work is expensive -- and with all the attacks on the environment happening in Congress from extreme MAGA Republicans this year, our resources are running low. What we need most of all is your support.

**To keep our work going strong, we need to raise $30,000 before the end of the month. If everyone reading this right now were to pitch in just $5, we 'd blow through that goal in minutes. _Here 's where things stand:_**

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW:**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**MATCH STATUS:** [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_)

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, October 31, 2023
**Fundraising Goal:** $30,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_) |
---|---|---

[Please don't wait until this triple match offer expires. Renew your membership today. Even $5 can have an impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_)

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10099689&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDM1NzIxMQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDM1NzIxMQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10099689&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDM1NzIxMQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDM1NzIxMQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: Team Pramila
subject: How we can re-elect Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This time last year, Pramila was preparing for one of the most consequential midterm elections our democracy has ever seen.
#
Peter,
This time last year, we were preparing for one of the most consequential midterm elections ever. But due to slower fundraising, we had to extend our October fundraising deadline to hit our goal.****
**We don’t want to be in that position again**, Peter**. Not when there's so much at stake for our progressive movement. That’s why we’re reaching out to our most dedicated supporters with a big ask:**
**One of the most effective ways to re-elect Pramila and prepare for attacks from right-wing groups who want her out of Congress is by making a monthly contribution.**
With less than 90 days until the 2024 primaries now is the time to strengthen our recurring donor base. **We need to be prepared to fight back against the GOP, who will stop at nothing to silence Pramila and our movement.****
**
**[Can we count on you to begin a monthly donation of any amount to our campaign today? For the price of a cup of coffee, you can help sustain our campaign!](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46281?refcode=em20231016-3043&t=1&akid=3043%2E420207%2E8kLF5w)**
**[Make a monthly donation ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46281?refcode=em20231016-3043&t=2&akid=3043%2E420207%2E8kLF5w)**
Thank you,
Team Pramila
P.S. If you are unable to commit to a monthly contribution at this time, we completely understand. **[If you are willing to support our movement with a one-time donation, please click here to make a contribution of $6 or any amount you are able to give.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46279?refcode=em20231016-3043&t=3&akid=3043%2E420207%2E8kLF5w)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231016-3043-footer&t=4&refcode2=3043_420207_8kLF5w&akid=3043%2E420207%2E8kLF5w)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=3043%2E420207%2E8kLF5w)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3043%2E420207%2E8kLF5w)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
